papers.title: Know When to Trust the Skill: Delayed Appraisal and Epistemic Vigilance for Single-Agent LLMs
papers.abstract: As large language models (LLMs) transition into autonomous agents integrated with extensive tool ecosystems, traditional routing heuristics increasingly succumb to context pollution and "overthinking". We argue that the bottleneck is not a deficit in algorithmic capability or skill diversity, but the absence of disciplined second-order metacognitive governance. In this paper, our scientific contribution focuses on the computational translation of human cognitive control - specifically, delayed appraisal, epistemic vigilance, and region-of-proximal offloading - into a single-agent architecture. We introduce MESA-S (Metacognitive Skills for Agents, Single-agent), a preliminary framework that shifts scalar confidence estimation into a vector separating self-confidence (parametric certainty) from source-confidence (trust in retrieved external procedures). By formalizing a delayed procedural probe mechanism and introducing Metacognitive Skill Cards, MESA-S decouples the awareness of a skill's utility from its token-intensive execution. Evaluated under an In-Context Static Benchmark Evaluation natively executed via Gemini 3.1 Pro, our early results suggest that explicitly programming trust provenance and delayed escalation mitigates supply-chain vulnerabilities, prunes unnecessary reasoning loops, and prevents offloading-induced confidence inflation. This architecture offers a scientifically cautious, behaviorally anchored step toward reliable, epistemically vigilant single-agent orchestration.

analysis.tldr: 提出MESA-S框架，通过延迟评估和认知警觉机制提升单智能体LLM的可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM作为自主智能体时，传统路由启发式方法易受上下文污染和过度思考影响，瓶颈在于缺乏二阶元认知治理。
analysis.problem: 解决单智能体LLM在工具调用中因缺乏信任评估和延迟判断导致的不可靠行为。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到传统方法存在上下文污染、过度思考、供应链漏洞和置信度膨胀等问题。
analysis.method: MESA-S框架：将标量置信度估计分解为自置信度和源置信度，引入延迟程序探测机制和元认知技能卡。
contributions: 将人类认知控制（延迟评估、认知警觉、近端区域卸载）计算转化为单智能体架构
提出MESA-S框架，通过分离自置信度和源置信度实现更精细的信任管理
analysis.experiments: 在Gemini 3.1 Pro上进行了上下文静态基准评估，早期结果显示有效。
limitations: 仅基于单一模型评估，泛化性待验证
框架为初步版本，实际部署可能面临计算开销
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，但实验规模有限，适合关注LLM安全对齐的研究者阅读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MESA-S框架，通过延迟评估和认知警觉机制提升单智能体LLM的可靠性。

papers.title: Don't Start What You Can't Finish: A Counterfactual Audit of Support-State Triage in LLM Agents
papers.abstract: Current agent evaluations largely reward execution on fully specified tasks, while recent work studies clarification [11, 22, 2], capability awareness [9, 1], abstention [8, 14], and search termination [20, 5] mostly in isolation. This leaves open whether agents can diagnose why a task is blocked before acting. We introduce the Support-State Triage Audit (SSTA-32), a matched-item diagnostic framework in which minimal counterfactual edits flip the same base request across four support states: Complete (ANSWER), Clarifiable (CLARIFY), Support-Blocked (REQUEST SUPPORT), and Unsupported-Now (ABSTAIN). We evaluate a frontier model under four prompting conditions - Direct, Action-Only, Confidence-Only, and a typed Preflight Support Check (PSC) - using Dual-Persona Auto-Auditing (DPAA) with deterministic heuristic scoring. Default execution overcommits heavily on non-complete tasks (41.7% overcommitment rate). Scalar confidence mapping avoids overcommitment but collapses the three-way deferral space (58.3% typed deferral accuracy). Conversely, both Action-Only and PSC achieve 91.7% typed deferral accuracy by surfacing the categorical ontology in the prompt. Targeted ablations confirm that removing the support-sufficiency dimension selectively degrades REQUEST SUPPORT accuracy, while removing the evidence-sufficiency dimension triggers systematic overcommitment on unsupported items. Because DPAA operates within a single context window, these results represent upper-bound capability estimates; nonetheless, the structural findings indicate that frontier models possess strong latent triage capabilities that require explicit categorical decision paths to activate safely.

analysis.tldr: 提出支持状态分流审计框架SSTA-32，发现前沿LLM代理在任务阻塞诊断中默认过度承诺，需显式分类决策路径才能安全激活分流能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有代理评估主要关注完全指定任务的执行，而对任务阻塞原因的诊断能力缺乏系统研究，导致代理可能在不适合执行时仍盲目行动。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估和提升LLM代理在任务被阻塞时的分流决策能力（即判断任务是否可完成、需澄清、需外部支持或应放弃）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 默认执行在非完整任务上过度承诺率高达41.7%；标量置信度映射虽避免过度承诺但导致三类延迟决策准确率仅58.3%；而显式分类提示（Action-Only和PSC）可将准确率提升至91.7%。消融实验表明，移除支持充分性维度会选择性降低请求支持准确率，移除证据充分性维度则导致对不支持项目的系统性过度承诺。
analysis.method: 提出支持状态分流审计（SSTA-32）框架，通过最小反事实编辑将同一基础请求翻转至四种支持状态（完整、可澄清、支持阻塞、当前不支持），并采用双角色自动审计（DPAA）结合确定性启发式评分进行评估。
contributions: 提出SSTA-32诊断框架，通过反事实编辑系统评估代理在四种支持状态下的分流能力。
揭示前沿模型默认过度承诺问题，并证明显式分类决策路径（如Action-Only和PSC）可安全激活潜在分流能力。
analysis.experiments: 在单一上下文窗口内评估前沿模型在四种提示条件下的表现，使用DPAA和确定性启发式评分，结果代表上限能力估计。摘要未提供具体实验数据集或对比基线细节。
limitations: 实验在单一上下文窗口内进行，可能低估实际部署中的复杂性。
仅评估了单一前沿模型，泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖（反事实审计框架），实验揭示重要现象（过度承诺），对安全对齐有实际价值，但实验规模有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出支持状态分流审计框架SSTA-32，发现前沿LLM代理在任务阻塞诊断中默认过度承诺，需显式分类决策路径才能安全激活分流能力。

papers.title: TriTS: Time Series Forecasting from a Multimodal Perspective
papers.abstract: Time series forecasting plays a pivotal role in critical sectors such as finance, energy, transportation, and meteorology. However, Long-term Time Series Forecasting (LTSF) remains a significant challenge because real-world signals contain highly entangled temporal dynamics that are difficult to fully capture from a purely 1D perspective. To break this representation bottleneck, we propose TriTS, a novel cross-modal disentanglement framework that projects 1D time series into orthogonal time, frequency, and 2D-vision spaces.To seamlessly bridge the 1D-to-2D modality gap without the prohibitive $O(N^2)$ computational overhead of Vision Transformers (ViTs), we introduce a Period-Aware Reshaping strategy and incorporate Visual Mamba (Vim). This approach efficiently models cross-period dependencies as global visual textures while maintaining linear computational complexity. Complementing this, we design a Multi-Resolution Wavelet Mixing (MR-WM) module for the frequency modality, which explicitly decouples non-stationary signals into trend and noise components to achieve fine-grained time-frequency localization. Finally, a streaming linear branch is retained in the time domain to anchor numerical stability. By dynamically fusing these three complementary representations, TriTS effectively adapts to diverse data contexts. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate that TriTS achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance, fundamentally outperforming existing vision-based forecasters by drastically reducing both parameter count and inference latency.

analysis.tldr: TriTS通过将时间序列投影到时间、频率和2D视觉三个正交模态，实现跨模态解耦，在长期预测中达到SOTA且更高效。
analysis.research_motivation: 长期时间序列预测中，真实信号包含高度纠缠的时间动态，纯1D视角难以充分捕获，现有方法存在表征瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何从多模态视角解耦时间序列的复杂动态，实现高效且准确的长期预测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出TriTS框架，包含Period-Aware Reshaping策略和Visual Mamba实现1D到2D视觉模态的高效转换，Multi-Resolution Wavelet Mixing模块解耦频率模态中的趋势和噪声，以及保留时间域流式线性分支以稳定数值。
contributions: 提出跨模态解耦框架TriTS，融合时间、频率和2D视觉三种互补表征。
引入Period-Aware Reshaping和Visual Mamba，以线性复杂度建模跨周期依赖。
设计Multi-Resolution Wavelet Mixing模块，实现细粒度时频定位。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准数据集上实验，TriTS达到SOTA性能，显著减少参数量和推理延迟。
limitations: 可能对超长序列的周期检测敏感。
多模态融合的泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on time series and dynamical systems
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，结合多模态和Mamba架构，实验显示SOTA且高效，与时间序列预测方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TriTS通过将时间序列投影到时间、频率和2D视觉三个正交模态，实现跨模态解耦，在长期预测中达到SOTA且更高效。

papers.title: Incoherent Deformation, Not Capacity: Diagnosing and Mitigating Overfitting in Dynamic Gaussian Splatting
papers.abstract: Dynamic 3D Gaussian Splatting methods achieve strong training-view PSNR on monocular video but generalize poorly: on the D-NeRF benchmark we measure an average train-test PSNR gap of 6.18 dB, rising to 11 dB on individual scenes. We report two findings that together account for most of that gap. Finding 1 (the role of splitting). A systematic ablation of the Adaptive Density Control pipeline (split, clone, prune, frequency, threshold, schedule) shows that splitting is responsible for over 80% of the gap: disabling split collapses the cloud from 44K to 3K Gaussians and the gap from 6.18 dB to 1.15 dB. Across all threshold-varying ablations, gap is log-linear in count (r = 0.995, bootstrap 95% CI [0.99, 1.00]), which suggests a capacity-based explanation. Finding 2 (the role of deformation coherence). We show that the capacity explanation is incomplete. A local-smoothness penalty on the per-Gaussian deformation field -- Elastic Energy Regularization (EER) -- reduces the gap by 40.8% while growing the cloud by 85%. Measuring per-Gaussian strain directly on trained checkpoints, EER reduces mean strain by 99.72% (median 99.80%) across all 8 scenes; on 8/8 scenes the median Gaussian under EER is less strained than the 1st-percentile (best-behaved) Gaussian under baseline. Alongside EER, we evaluate two further regularizers: GAD, a loss-rate-aware densification threshold, and PTDrop, a jitter-weighted Gaussian dropout. GAD+EER reduces the gap by 48%; adding PTDrop and a soft growth cap reaches 57%. We confirm that coherence generalizes to (a) a different deformation architecture (Deformable-3DGS, +40.6% gap reduction at re-tuned lambda), and (b) real monocular video (4 HyperNeRF scenes, reducing the mean PSNR gap by 14.9% at the same lambda as D-NeRF, with near-zero quality cost). The overfitting in dynamic 3DGS is driven by incoherent deformation, not parameter count.

analysis.tldr: 动态3D高斯泼溅的过拟合主要源于非相干形变而非模型容量，弹性能量正则化可有效缓解。
analysis.research_motivation: 动态3D高斯泼溅在单目视频上训练视图PSNR高但泛化差，训练-测试PSNR差距大，限制了实际应用。
analysis.problem: 诊断并缓解动态高斯泼溅中的过拟合问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现分裂操作贡献了80%以上的泛化差距，但容量解释不完整；非相干形变才是主因。
analysis.method: 提出弹性能量正则化（EER）惩罚每高斯形变场的局部平滑性，并结合GAD和PTDrop等正则化器。
contributions: 系统消融表明分裂操作是过拟合的主要来源，但容量解释不完整。
发现非相干形变驱动过拟合，并提出弹性能量正则化（EER）有效缓解。
EER在多个基准和真实视频上泛化，显著缩小训练-测试PSNR差距。
analysis.experiments: 在D-NeRF基准上测量平均训练-测试PSNR差距6.18 dB，EER减少40.8%差距；在Deformable-3DGS和HyperNeRF上验证泛化性。
limitations: 方法依赖形变场的局部平滑性假设，可能不适用于剧烈非刚性运动。
正则化超参数需针对不同场景调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分，对动态3D场景理解有重要价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 动态3D高斯泼溅的过拟合主要源于非相干形变而非模型容量，弹性能量正则化可有效缓解。

papers.title: Why Training-Free Token Reduction Collapses: The Inherent Instability of Pairwise Scoring Signals
papers.abstract: Training-free token reduction methods for Vision Transformers (ToMe, ToFu, PiToMe, and MCTF) employ different scoring mechanisms, yet they share a closely matched cliff-like collapse at high compression. This paper explains \emph{why}. We develop a diagnostic framework with two tools, ranking consistency $ρ_s$ and off-diagonal correlation $ρ_\text{off}$, that decomposes the collapse into (1)a signal-agnostic error amplifier inherent to layer-wise reduction, predicting convex Pareto curves and $r_{\text{crit}} \propto 1/L$; and (2)shared reliance on \emph{pairwise} similarity signals whose ranking consistency degrades from $ρ_s{=}0.88$ to $0.27$ in deep layers. Pairwise rankings are inherently unstable ($O(N_p^2)$ joint perturbations) while unary signals enjoy greater stability ($O(N_p)$ perturbations, CLT). From three design principles derived from this diagnosis, we construct CATIS as a constructive validation: unary signals raise the trigger threshold, triage suppresses the gain. On ViT-Large at 63% FLOPs reduction, CATIS retains 96.9% of vanilla accuracy (81.0%) on ImageNet-1K where all baselines collapse to 43--65%.

analysis.tldr: 揭示了无训练token缩减方法在高压缩率下崩溃的根本原因——成对评分信号的固有不稳定性，并基于诊断设计出更稳定的CATIS方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有无训练token缩减方法（如ToMe、ToFu等）在高压缩率下均出现类似的悬崖式性能崩溃，但缺乏对其根本原因的理论分析，阻碍了更稳定方法的设计。
analysis.problem: 解释为什么多种无训练token缩减方法在高压缩率下都会出现性能崩溃，并基于诊断设计更稳定的方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 所有方法在高压缩率下呈现匹配的悬崖式崩溃；通过诊断工具发现：1) 逐层缩减固有的信号无关误差放大器导致凸Pareto曲线和临界压缩率与层数成反比；2) 成对相似性信号的排序一致性在深层从0.88降至0.27，且成对排序具有O(N_p^2)联合扰动的不稳定性，而单值信号仅需O(N_p)扰动。
analysis.method: 提出诊断框架（排序一致性ρ_s和离对角相关性ρ_off）分析崩溃原因，并基于三个设计原则构建CATIS方法：使用单值信号提高触发阈值，并引入分诊机制抑制增益。
contributions: 首次从理论上解释了无训练token缩减方法在高压缩率下崩溃的根本原因，归因于成对评分信号的固有不稳定性。
提出了包含两个诊断工具（ρ_s和ρ_off）的框架，可分解崩溃为信号无关误差放大器和成对信号退化。
基于诊断结果设计了CATIS方法，在ViT-Large上63% FLOPs缩减时保留96.9%的准确率，而基线方法崩溃至43-65%。
analysis.experiments: 在ImageNet-1K上使用ViT-Large模型进行实验，在63% FLOPs缩减下CATIS保留96.9%的原始准确率（81.0%），而所有基线方法准确率降至43-65%。
limitations: 诊断框架和CATIS方法仅在Vision Transformers上验证，未推广到其他架构或模态。
CATIS的设计依赖于对崩溃机制的理解，可能不适用于其他类型的token缩减方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 理论分析深入，诊断工具新颖，实验验证有效，对视觉Transformer高效推理有重要指导意义。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 揭示了无训练token缩减方法在高压缩率下崩溃的根本原因——成对评分信号的固有不稳定性，并基于诊断设计出更稳定的CATIS方法。

papers.title: Evaluating Adaptive Personalization of Educational Readings with Simulated Learners
papers.abstract: We present a framework for evaluating adaptive personalization of educational reading materials with theory-grounded simulated learners. The system builds a learning-objective and knowledge-component ontology from open textbooks, curates it in a browser-based Ontology Atlas, labels textbook chunks with ontology entities, and generates aligned reading-assessment pairs. Simulated readers learn from passages through a Construction-Integration-inspired memory model with DIME-style reader factors, KREC-style misconception revision, and an open New Dale-Chall readability signal. Answers are produced by score-based option selection over the learner's explicit memory state, while BKT drives adaptation. Across three sampled subject ontologies and matched cohorts of 50 simulated learners per condition, adaptive reading significantly improved outcomes in computer science, yielded smaller positive but inconclusive gains in inorganic chemistry, and was neutral to slightly negative in general biology.

analysis.tldr: 提出用理论驱动的模拟学习者评估教育阅读材料的自适应个性化，实验显示在计算机科学中效果显著，但在化学和生物学中效果不一。
analysis.research_motivation: 教育阅读材料的自适应个性化缺乏系统评估框架，现有方法难以在受控条件下验证其效果。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个理论驱动的模拟学习者框架，以评估自适应个性化教育阅读材料的有效性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 自适应阅读在计算机科学中显著提升学习效果，在无机化学中效果较小且不明确，在普通生物学中效果中性或略负面，表明领域特性影响自适应效果。
analysis.method: 构建学习目标和知识组件本体，通过本体图谱标注教材片段，生成对齐的阅读-评估对；模拟学习者使用基于Construction-Integration的记忆模型，结合DIME阅读者因素、KREC式错误修正和New Dale-Chall可读性信号，通过基于分数的选项选择产生答案，并使用BKT驱动自适应。
contributions: 提出一个理论驱动的模拟学习者框架，用于评估教育阅读材料的自适应个性化。
通过三个学科的实验揭示了自适应个性化效果因学科而异。
analysis.experiments: 在计算机科学、无机化学和普通生物学三个学科中，每个条件使用50个模拟学习者，比较自适应与非自适应阅读的效果。
limitations: 模拟学习者可能无法完全代表真实学习者的复杂行为。
实验仅覆盖三个学科，泛化性有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有创新但实验规模有限，效果因学科而异，适合相关领域研究者参考。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出用理论驱动的模拟学习者评估教育阅读材料的自适应个性化，实验显示在计算机科学中效果显著，但在化学和生物学中效果不一。

papers.title: Automated Palynological Analysis System: Integrating Deep Metric Learning and $U^{2}$-Net Detection in $H\infty$ bright field microscopy
papers.abstract: Traditional melissopalynology is a time-consuming and subjective process, often taking 4-6 hours per sample. We present an automated, high-throughput microscopy system that integrates $H\infty$ robust mechanical control with advanced deep learning pipelines for the precise counting, classification, and morphological analysis of pollen grains from Bio Bio region in south central territory in Chile. Our system employs $U^{2}$-Net for salient object detection and a DINOv2 Vision Transformer backbone trained via Deep Metric Learning for classification. By integrating Gradient-Weighted Attention, the model provides human-interpretable texture and diagnostic feature annotations. The system achieves a 95.8$\%$ classification recall and a 6x processing speedup compared to manual expert analysis.

analysis.tldr: 提出集成U²-Net检测与DINOv2深度度量学习的自动化花粉分析系统，实现95.8%召回率和6倍加速。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统花粉分析耗时且主观，每样本需4-6小时，亟需自动化高吞吐量系统。
analysis.problem: 实现花粉颗粒的自动计数、分类和形态分析，克服传统方法的低效和主观性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用U²-Net进行显著目标检测，DINOv2视觉Transformer骨干通过深度度量学习训练分类，并集成梯度加权注意力提供可解释特征。
contributions: 提出集成鲁棒机械控制与深度学习管线的自动化花粉分析系统
结合U²-Net检测、DINOv2深度度量学习和梯度加权注意力，实现高精度分类与可解释性
analysis.experiments: 在智利比奥比奥地区的花粉样本上测试，分类召回率95.8%，处理速度比人工快6倍。
limitations: 可能仅针对特定地理区域的花粉种类
未报告精确率或F1分数等更多指标
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法组合有创新但应用领域较窄，实验指标有限，适合相关领域读者参考。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出集成U²-Net检测与DINOv2深度度量学习的自动化花粉分析系统，实现95.8%召回率和6倍加速。

papers.title: CT Open: An Open-Access, Uncontaminated, Live Platform for the Open Challenge of Clinical Trial Outcome Prediction
papers.abstract: Scientists have long sought to accurately predict outcomes of real-world events before they happen. Can AI systems do so more reliably? We study this question through clinical trial outcome prediction, a high-stakes open challenge even for domain experts. We introduce CT Open, an open-access, live platform that will run four challenge every year. Anyone can submit predictions for each challenge. CT Open evaluates those submissions on trials whose outcomes were not yet public at the time of submission but were made public afterwards. Determining if a trial's outcome is public on the internet before a certain date is surprisingly difficult. Outcomes posted on official registries may lag behind by years, while the first mention may appear in obscure articles. To address this, we propose a novel, fully automated decontamination pipeline that uses iterative LLM-powered web search to identify the earliest mention of trial outcomes. We validate the pipeline's quality and accuracy by human expert's annotations. Since CT Open's pipeline ensures that every evaluated trial had no publicly reported outcome when the prediction was made, it allows participants to use any methodology and any data source. In this paper, we release a training set and two time-stamped test benchmarks, Winter 2025 and Summer 2025. We believe CT Open can serve as a central hub for advancing AI research on forecasting real-world outcomes before they occur, while also informing biomedical research and improving clinical trial design. CT Open Platform is hosted at $\href{https://ct-open.net/}{https://ct-open.net/}$

analysis.tldr: CT Open 是一个用于临床试验结果预测的开放、无污染、实时挑战平台，通过自动化去污染管道确保评估的公平性。
analysis.research_motivation: 临床试验结果预测对领域专家也是高难度挑战，现有方法因数据污染（结果提前泄露）而难以公平评估，亟需一个无污染、可实时更新的评测平台。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能确保预测时试验结果尚未公开、支持任意方法和数据源、且可持续运行的临床试验结果预测挑战平台。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，确定试验结果是否在特定日期前公开非常困难：官方注册表可能滞后数年，而首次提及可能出现在晦涩文章中。
analysis.method: 提出 CT Open 平台，包含自动化去污染管道：利用迭代 LLM 驱动的网络搜索识别试验结果的最早公开时间，并通过人工标注验证质量。平台每年举办四次挑战，提交时结果未公开的试验用于评估。
contributions: 提出 CT Open 平台，一个开放、无污染、实时的临床试验结果预测挑战平台。
设计并验证了基于 LLM 的自动化去污染管道，确保评估的公平性。
发布训练集和两个时间戳测试基准（Winter 2025 和 Summer 2025）。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提到通过人类专家标注验证了去污染管道的质量和准确性。
limitations: 去污染管道依赖 LLM 搜索，可能仍存在遗漏或误判。
平台目前仅覆盖临床试验结果预测，泛化到其他事件预测需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 平台设计新颖，去污染方法有实际价值，但摘要未提供实验细节，适合精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CT Open 是一个用于临床试验结果预测的开放、无污染、实时挑战平台，通过自动化去污染管道确保评估的公平性。

papers.title: When Agents Go Quiet: Output Generation Capacity and Format-Cost Separation for LLM Document Synthesis
papers.abstract: LLM-powered coding agents suffer from a poorly understood failure mode we term output stalling: the agent silently produces empty responses when attempting to generate large, format-heavy documents. We present a theoretical framework that explains and prevents this failure through three contributions. (1) We introduce Output Generation Capacity (OGC), a formal measure of an agent's effective ability to produce output given its current context state - distinct from and empirically smaller than the raw context window. (2) We prove a Format-Cost Separation Theorem showing that deferred template rendering is always at least as token-efficient as direct generation for any format with overhead multiplier $μ_f > 1$, and derive tight bounds on the savings. (3) We formalize Adaptive Strategy Selection, a decision framework that maps the ratio of estimated output cost to available OGC into an optimal generation strategy (direct, chunked, or deferred). We validate the theory through controlled experiments across three models (Claude 3.5 Sonnet, GPT-4o, Llama 3.1 70B), four document types, and an ablation study isolating each component's contribution. Deferred rendering reduces LLM generation tokens by 48-72% across all conditions and eliminates output stalling entirely. We instantiate the framework as GEN-PILOT, an open-source MCP server, demonstrating that the theory translates directly into a practical tool.

analysis.tldr: 提出输出生成容量(OGC)和格式-成本分离定理，通过延迟模板渲染消除LLM Agent在生成大型文档时的输出停滞故障。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM驱动的编码Agent在生成大型、格式复杂的文档时会出现输出停滞（输出空响应）的故障模式，影响任务完成效率与可靠性，现有方法缺乏理论解释和系统解决方案。
analysis.problem: 解决LLM Agent在生成大型格式文档时因输出生成容量不足导致的输出停滞问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到LLM Agent在尝试生成大型、格式复杂的文档时，会静默产生空响应，即输出停滞现象。该现象与原始上下文窗口大小相关但不同，实际有效输出能力（OGC）小于原始窗口。
analysis.method: 提出三个理论贡献：1) 输出生成容量(OGC)形式化度量；2) 格式-成本分离定理，证明延迟模板渲染在格式开销因子μ_f>1时总是比直接生成更节省token；3) 自适应策略选择框架，根据估计输出成本与可用OGC的比率选择最优生成策略（直接、分块或延迟）。
contributions: 提出输出生成容量(OGC)概念，形式化度量Agent在当前上下文状态下的有效输出能力。
证明格式-成本分离定理，给出延迟模板渲染的token节省紧界。
设计自适应策略选择框架，并实现开源工具GEN-PILOT。
analysis.experiments: 在Claude 3.5 Sonnet、GPT-4o、Llama 3.1 70B三个模型、四种文档类型上进行控制实验和消融研究，延迟渲染减少LLM生成token 48-72%，完全消除输出停滞。
limitations: 实验仅在三种模型上进行，可能不覆盖所有LLM。
理论框架假设格式开销因子μ_f>1，对于μ_f≤1的情况未讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 理论创新性强，实验验证充分，开源工具实用，与LLM Agent方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出输出生成容量(OGC)和格式-成本分离定理，通过延迟模板渲染消除LLM Agent在生成大型文档时的输出停滞故障。

papers.title: Reducing Peak Memory Usage for Modern Multimodal Large Language Model Pipelines
papers.abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have recently demonstrated strong capabilities in understanding and generating responses from diverse visual inputs, including high-resolution images and long video sequences. As these models scale to richer visual representations, inference increasingly relies on storing large numbers of vision tokens in the key-value (KV) cache, making memory consumption a central bottleneck. Existing methods address this issue by identifying redundancy in vision tokens and compressing the cache, but such compression is typically applied only after all inputs are processed, resulting in high peak memory usage during the prefill stage. In this work, we show that MLLMs exhibit inherent structural regularities and representational redundancy that can be exploited to control memory growth throughout inference. Based on this insight, we propose a sequential input-compression mechanism that enforces a fixed memory budget by performing structure-aware key-value cache compression during the prefill process. This approach substantially reduces peak memory usage while maintaining generative performance with only minimal degradation, enabling more practical and memory-efficient multimodal inference.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种在预填充阶段进行结构感知KV缓存压缩的方法，以降低多模态大模型推理的峰值内存。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态大模型处理高分辨率图像和长视频时，视觉token的KV缓存导致内存成为瓶颈，现有压缩方法仅在预填充后应用，峰值内存仍高。
analysis.problem: 如何在不显著降低生成性能的前提下，降低多模态大模型推理过程中的峰值内存使用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: MLLM在视觉表示中存在结构规律性和表征冗余，可在推理过程中利用这些特性控制内存增长。
analysis.method: 提出顺序输入压缩机制，在预填充阶段执行结构感知的KV缓存压缩，强制固定内存预算。
contributions: 揭示了MLLM中可用于控制内存增长的结构规律性和表征冗余。
提出了一种在预填充阶段进行结构感知KV缓存压缩的方法，显著降低峰值内存。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的MLLM架构。
压缩带来的性能退化虽小但未量化。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法有创新但摘要缺乏实验细节，与重点方向中等相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种在预填充阶段进行结构感知KV缓存压缩的方法，以降低多模态大模型推理的峰值内存。

papers.title: Active World-Model with 4D-informed Retrieval for Exploration and Awareness
papers.abstract: Physical awareness, especially in a large and dynamic environment, is shaped by sensing decisions that determine observability across space, time, and scale, while observations impact the quality of sensing decisions. This loopy information structure makes physical awareness a fundamentally challenging decision problem with partial observations. While in the past decade we have witnessed the unprecedented success of reinforcement learning (RL) in problems with full observability, decision problems with partial observation, such as POMDPs, remain largely open: real-world explorations are excessively costly, while sim-to-real pipeline suffer from unobserved viewpoints. We introduce AW4RE (Active World-model with 4D-informed Retrieval for Exploration), an awareness-centric generative world model that provides a sensor-native surrogate environment for exploring sensing queries. Conditioned on a queried sensing action, AW4RE estimates the action-conditioned observation process. This is done by combining 4D-informed evidence retrieval, action-conditioned geometric support with temporal coherence, and conditional generative completion. Experiments demonstrate that AW4RE produces more grounded and consistent predictions than geometry-aware generative baselines under extreme viewpoint shifts, temporal gaps, and sparse geometric support.

analysis.tldr: 提出AW4RE，一种基于4D检索的主动世界模型，用于部分可观测环境中的探索与感知。
analysis.research_motivation: 物理感知中，传感决策与观测质量相互影响，形成循环信息结构，使得部分可观测决策问题（如POMDP）极具挑战性；真实世界探索成本过高，而仿真到现实迁移受限于未观测视角。
analysis.problem: 如何在部分可观测的大规模动态环境中，通过主动传感查询实现高效且准确的物理感知。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出AW4RE，一种以感知为中心的生成世界模型，结合4D信息检索、动作条件几何支持（含时间一致性）和条件生成补全，为传感查询提供传感器原生替代环境。
contributions: 提出AW4RE框架，将4D检索与条件生成结合，实现动作条件观测过程估计。
在极端视角偏移、时间间隔和稀疏几何支持下，AW4RE比几何感知生成基线产生更可靠和一致的预测。
analysis.experiments: 在极端视角偏移、时间间隔和稀疏几何支持条件下，AW4RE比几何感知生成基线产生更可靠和一致的预测。摘要未提供具体实验设置或数值结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的4D先验数据。
计算复杂度可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，结合4D检索与生成模型解决部分可观测探索问题，但摘要实验细节不足，影响评估。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AW4RE，一种基于4D检索的主动世界模型，用于部分可观测环境中的探索与感知。

papers.title: Agentic Large Language Models for Training-Free Neuro-Radiological Image Analysis
papers.abstract: State-of-the-art large language models (LLMs) show high performance in general visual question answering. However, a fundamental limitation remains: current architectures lack the native 3D spatial reasoning required for direct analysis of volumetric medical imaging, such as CT or MRI. Emerging agentic AI offers a new solution, eliminating the need for intrinsic 3D processing by enabling LLMs to orchestrate and leverage specialized external tools. Yet, the feasibility of such agentic frameworks in complex, multi-step radiological workflows remains underexplored. In this work, we present a training-free agentic pipeline for automated brain MRI analysis. Validating our methodology on several LLMs (GPT-5.1, Gemini 3 Pro, Claude Sonnet 4.5) with off-the-shelf domain-specific tools, our system autonomously executes complex end-to-end workflows, including preprocessing (skull stripping, registration), pathology segmentation (glioma, meningioma, metastases), and volumetric analysis. We evaluate our framework across increasingly complex radiological tasks, from single-scan segmentation and volumetric reporting to longitudinal response assessment requiring multi-timepoint comparisons. We analyze the impact of architectural design by comparing single-agent models against multi-agent "domain-expert" collaborations. Finally, to support rigorous evaluation of future agentic systems, we introduce and release a benchmark dataset of image-prompt-answer tuples derived from public BraTS data. Our results demonstrate that agentic AI can solve highly neuro-radiological image analysis tasks through tool use without the need for training or fine-tuning.

analysis.tldr: 提出免训练智能体管道，利用LLM编排外部工具实现脑MRI自动分析。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前LLM缺乏原生3D空间推理能力，难以直接分析CT/MRI等体积医学影像；新兴智能体AI通过编排外部工具可绕过此限制，但其在复杂放射学工作流中的可行性尚未充分探索。
analysis.problem: 如何构建无需训练的智能体系统，使LLM能自主完成多步骤神经放射学图像分析任务（预处理、分割、体积分析、纵向评估）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出免训练智能体管道，LLM（GPT-5.1、Gemini 3 Pro、Claude Sonnet 4.5）通过编排现成的领域专用工具（如颅骨剥离、配准、病理分割），自主执行端到端工作流；对比单智能体与多智能体“领域专家”协作架构。
contributions: 提出首个免训练智能体管道，实现脑MRI全自动分析（预处理、分割、体积分析、纵向评估）。
发布基于BraTS数据的基准数据集（图像-提示-答案元组），支持未来智能体系统评估。
analysis.experiments: 在多个LLM上验证，涵盖从单扫描分割到多时间点纵向评估的复杂任务，并分析单智能体与多智能体架构的影响。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅验证于脑MRI，未涉及其他模态（如CT）或身体部位。
依赖外部工具质量，工具失败可能级联影响整体性能。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出免训练智能体管道，利用LLM编排外部工具实现脑MRI自动分析。

papers.title: iDocV2: Leveraging Self-Supervision and Open-Set Detection for Improving Pattern Spotting in Historical Documents
papers.abstract: Considering the imminent massification of digital books, it has become critical to facilitate searching collections through graphical patterns. Current strategies for document retrieval and pattern spotting in historical documents still need to be improved. State-of-the-art strategies achieve an overall precision of $0.494$ for pattern spotting, where the precision for small non-square queries reaches 0.427. In addition, the processing time is excessive, requiring up to 7 seconds for searching in the DocExplore dataset due to a dense-based strategy used by SOTA models. Therefore, we propose a new model based on a better encoder (iDoc), trained under a self-supervised strategy, and an open-set detector to accelerate searching. Our model achieves competitive results with state-of-the-art pattern spotting and document retrieval, improving speed by 10x. Furthermore, our model reaches a new SOTA performance on the small non-square queries, achieving a new precision of 0.612.Different from the previous version, this leverages non-maximum suppression to reduce false positives.

analysis.tldr: 提出iDocV2模型，结合自监督训练和开放集检测，在历史文档图案定位任务中实现10倍速度提升，并在小尺寸非正方形查询上达到新SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 数字图书普及使得通过图形模式检索文档变得关键，但现有方法在历史文档图案定位中精度低（整体0.494，小非正方形查询0.427）且处理时间长（DocExplore数据集需7秒），亟需改进。
analysis.problem: 历史文档中图案定位的精度和速度不足，尤其是小尺寸非正方形查询的检测性能差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出SOTA模型因密集策略导致处理时间过长（7秒），且小非正方形查询精度低（0.427），表明现有方法在效率和细粒度检测上存在瓶颈。
analysis.method: 基于改进的编码器iDoc，采用自监督训练策略和开放集检测器，并利用非极大值抑制减少假阳性。
contributions: 提出iDocV2模型，在图案定位和文档检索任务上达到与SOTA竞争的结果，速度提升10倍。
在小尺寸非正方形查询上实现新SOTA精度0.612，显著优于先前0.427。
analysis.experiments: 在DocExplore数据集上评估，与SOTA对比精度和速度，摘要未提供更多实验细节。
limitations: 可能仅在特定历史文档数据集上验证，泛化性未知。
开放集检测器可能对未见类别处理能力有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法结合自监督和开放集检测，速度提升显著，但创新点增量，实验信息有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出iDocV2模型，结合自监督训练和开放集检测，在历史文档图案定位任务中实现10倍速度提升，并在小尺寸非正方形查询上达到新SOTA。

papers.title: Debate as Reward: A Multi-Agent Reward System for Scientific Ideation via RL Post-Training
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated potential in automating scientific ideation, yet current approaches relying on iterative prompting or complex multi-agent architectures often suffer from hallucination or computational inefficiency. A critical bottleneck in applying Reinforcement Learning (RL) to this open-ended domain is reward hacking -- where models exploit imperfect evaluation proxies to maximize scores without producing genuine scientific innovation. To address these limitations, we propose an RL framework explicitly tailored for high-quality scientific idea generation. We propose the first multi-agent reward function designed to serve as a judge, decoupling methodological validation from implementation details while providing strict binary rewards that are robust to reward hacking. To effectively optimize against this sparse signal, we utilize an unbiased variant of Group Relative Policy Optimization to mitigate artificial length bias. We grounded our training in ICLR-320, a curated dataset of problem-solution pairs extracted from ICLR 2024 proceedings. Experiments demonstrate that our framework significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines across expert-evaluated metrics of novelty, feasibility, and effectiveness.

analysis.tldr: 提出多智能体奖励函数与GRPO变体，通过RL后训练提升LLM科学构思的生成质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM科学构思方法存在幻觉和计算效率低的问题，且强化学习应用于该领域时面临奖励破解（reward hacking）的瓶颈，即模型利用不完美的评估代理最大化分数而无法产生真正的科学创新。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个鲁棒的奖励函数和优化策略，使LLM在科学构思生成中避免奖励破解，同时提升生成想法的新颖性、可行性和有效性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，在开放式的科学构思任务中，直接应用RL会导致奖励破解，模型会利用评估代理的缺陷来获得高分而非真正创新。
analysis.method: 提出一个多智能体奖励函数作为评判者，将方法论验证与实现细节解耦，并提供严格的二元奖励以抵抗奖励破解；同时使用无偏的Group Relative Policy Optimization（GRPO）变体来优化稀疏奖励，并缓解人工长度偏差。
contributions: 首次提出专为高质量科学构思生成设计的RL框架，包含多智能体奖励函数。
引入无偏GRPO变体以优化稀疏二元奖励并消除长度偏差。
构建ICLR-320数据集，并在专家评估指标上显著超越基线。
analysis.experiments: 在ICLR-320数据集上，通过专家评估的新颖性、可行性和有效性指标，框架显著优于现有最先进基线。
limitations: 依赖专家评估，可能难以大规模自动化。
多智能体奖励函数的设计可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，针对RL在科学构思中的奖励破解问题提出多智能体奖励和GRPO变体，实验有专家评估，但应用领域较窄。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多智能体奖励函数与GRPO变体，通过RL后训练提升LLM科学构思的生成质量。

papers.title: Late Fusion Neural Operators for Extrapolation Across Parameter Space in Partial Differential Equations
papers.abstract: Developing neural operators that accurately predict the behavior of systems governed by partial differential equations (PDEs) across unseen parameter regimes is crucial for robust generalization in scientific and engineering applications. In practical applications, variations in physical parameters induce distribution shifts between training and prediction regimes, making extrapolation a central challenge. As a result, the way parameters are incorporated into neural operator models plays a key role in their ability to generalize, particularly when state and parameter representations are entangled. In this work, we introduce the Late Fusion Neural Operator, an architecture that disentangles learning state dynamics from parameter effects, improving predictive performance both within and beyond the training distribution. Our approach combines neural operators for learning latent state representations with sparse regression to incorporate parameter information in a structured manner. Across four benchmark PDEs including advection, Burgers, and both 1D and 2D reaction-diffusion equations, the proposed method consistently outperforms Fourier Neural Operator and CAPE-FNO. Late Fusion Neural Operators achieve consistently the best performance in all experiments, with an average RMSE reduction of 72.9% in-domain and 71.8% out-domain compared to the second-best method. These results demonstrate strong generalization across both in-domain and out-domain parameter regimes.

analysis.tldr: 提出Late Fusion Neural Operator，通过解耦状态学习与参数效应，在PDE参数外推任务中显著优于现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 物理参数变化导致训练与预测分布偏移，现有神经算子难以外推到未见参数域，亟需能解耦状态与参数表示的架构。
analysis.problem: 如何设计神经算子架构，使其在偏微分方程参数空间外推时保持高精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 参数与状态表征纠缠会限制泛化能力，尤其在分布外场景下性能显著下降。
analysis.method: 将神经算子学习潜在状态表示与稀疏回归结构化融合参数信息，实现状态动态与参数效应的解耦。
contributions: 提出Late Fusion Neural Operator架构，解耦状态学习与参数影响。
在四个基准PDE上实现平均RMSE降低72.9%（域内）和71.8%（域外），优于FNO和CAPE-FNO。
analysis.experiments: 在平流、Burgers、1D/2D反应扩散方程上测试，与FNO和CAPE-FNO对比，摘要提供了定量结果。
limitations: 仅验证了有限类型的PDE，可能对复杂非线性系统泛化性未知。
稀疏回归部分可能对高维参数空间敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验充分，性能提升显著，对物理模拟领域有较高价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Late Fusion Neural Operator，通过解耦状态学习与参数效应，在PDE参数外推任务中显著优于现有方法。

papers.title: Scalable and Adaptive Parallel Training of Graph Transformer on Large Graphs
papers.abstract: Graph foundation models have demonstrated remarkable adaptability across diverse downstream tasks through large-scale pretraining on graphs. However, existing implementations of the backbone model, graph transformers, are typically limited to single-GPU systems, leading to long training times or out-of-memory issues on large graphs. Moreover, parallelizing graph transformer training over the full graph is challenging, as efficiency depends heavily on both the graph structure and system characteristics, such as bandwidth and memory capacity. In this work, we introduce a distributed training framework for graph transformers, which automatically selects and optimizes parallelization strategies based on the graph structure and hardware configuration. With our implementation of distributed sparse operations, we accelerate sparse graph attention by up to 3.8x and reduce memory consumption by 78% compared to state-of-the-art frameworks. On large graph benchmarks, our proposed framework achieves up to 6x speedup with system scaling up to 8 GPUs. These results demonstrate that the proposed framework improves the scalability of graph transformers, bringing them closer to serving as practical graph foundation models.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种自适应分布式训练框架，自动选择并行策略，加速图Transformer在大图上的训练。
analysis.research_motivation: 图Transformer作为图基础模型，现有实现多限于单GPU，导致大图训练时间长或内存不足，且并行化效率受图结构和系统特性影响。
analysis.problem: 如何高效并行化图Transformer在大图上的训练，自动适应图结构和硬件配置。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出分布式训练框架，自动选择并优化并行化策略，实现分布式稀疏操作以加速稀疏图注意力。
contributions: 提出自适应分布式训练框架，根据图结构和硬件自动选择并行策略。
实现分布式稀疏操作，加速稀疏图注意力并降低内存消耗。
analysis.experiments: 在大型图基准上，与最先进框架相比，稀疏图注意力加速最高3.8倍，内存消耗降低78%，系统扩展到8 GPU时加速最高6倍。
limitations: 可能仅适用于图Transformer，未验证其他图模型。
实验仅扩展到8 GPU，更大规模性能未知。

analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验效果显著，但仅针对图Transformer，领域较专。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种自适应分布式训练框架，自动选择并行策略，加速图Transformer在大图上的训练。

papers.title: Evaluating Tool-Using Language Agents: Judge Reliability, Propagation Cascades, and Runtime Mitigation in AgentProp-Bench
papers.abstract: Automated evaluation of tool-using large language model (LLM) agents is widely assumed to be reliable, but this assumption has rarely been validated against human annotation. We introduce AgentProp-Bench, a 2,000-task benchmark with 2,300 traces across four domains, nine production LLMs, and a 100-label human-validated subset. We quantify judge reliability, characterize error propagation, and evaluate a runtime mitigation. Substring-based judging agrees with human annotation at kappa=0.049 (chance-level); a three-LLM ensemble reaches kappa=0.432 (moderate) with a conservative bias. Under validated evaluation, a parameter-level injection propagates to a wrong final answer with human-calibrated probability approximately 0.62 (range 0.46-0.73 across models). Rejection (catching bad parameters) and recovery (correcting after acceptance) are independent model capabilities (Spearman rho=0.126, p=0.747). A tuned runtime interceptor reduces hallucination on GPT-4o-mini by 23.0 percentage points under a concurrent n=600 control, but shows no significant effect on Gemini-2.0-Flash, whose aggressive parameter rejection eliminates the target failure mode. All code, data, traces, and human labels are released at https://github.com/bhaskargurram-ai/agenthallu-bench.

analysis.tldr: AgentProp-Bench 揭示当前工具型 LLM Agent 自动评估不可靠，并提出运行时缓解方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 工具型 LLM Agent 的自动评估被广泛认为可靠，但该假设很少经过人类标注验证，可能导致评估结果失真。
analysis.problem: 验证自动评估的可靠性，量化错误传播，并探索运行时缓解策略。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 基于子串的评判与人类标注一致性极低（kappa=0.049）；三LLM集成达到中等一致性（kappa=0.432）但存在保守偏差；参数注入导致错误答案的概率约0.62；拒绝和恢复能力不相关。
analysis.method: 构建包含2000个任务、2300条轨迹的AgentProp-Bench基准，使用人类标注子集验证自动评估，并设计运行时拦截器缓解幻觉。
contributions: 提出AgentProp-Bench基准，包含人类验证子集，用于评估工具型Agent的自动评估可靠性。
量化了自动评估的不可靠性、错误传播概率及模型能力独立性。
提出运行时拦截器，在GPT-4o-mini上减少23%幻觉，但在Gemini-2.0-Flash上无效。
analysis.experiments: 在四个领域、九个生产LLM上评估，使用100标签人类验证子集，并进行了n=600的并发控制实验。
limitations: 运行时拦截器仅在部分模型上有效，泛化性有限。
基准覆盖领域有限，可能不适用于所有工具使用场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 针对自动评估可靠性这一关键问题，提供了系统基准和缓解方法，实验充分，但缓解方法泛化性有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AgentProp-Bench 揭示当前工具型 LLM Agent 自动评估不可靠，并提出运行时缓解方法。

papers.title: The impact of postediting on AI generative translation in Yemeni context: Translating literary prose by ChatGPT
papers.abstract: This study examines the role of artificial intelligence in translation, focusing on ChatGPT, specifically ChatGPT-4, and the extent to which human postediting is required in literary translation. A mixed-method approach was adopted, involving 30 professional translators who evaluated and postedited AI-generated translations of selected Arabic and English literary texts. The results show that although AI improves translation speed and accessibility, it remains limited in handling cultural, stylistic, and figurative aspects of language. Participants generally confirmed the necessity of human postediting, particularly in novels and drama. The findings indicate that emerging human-machine collaboration model rather than replacement of human translators. The study concludes that AI should be used as a supportive tool, while human expertise remains essential for ensuring translation quality and cultural appropriateness.

analysis.tldr: ChatGPT-4文学翻译需人工后编辑，人机协作而非替代。
analysis.research_motivation: AI翻译在文学领域面临文化、风格和比喻表达的挑战，需评估人工后编辑的必要性。
analysis.problem: 探究ChatGPT-4在也门语境下文学散文翻译中是否需要人工后编辑，以及人机协作模式。

analysis.method: 混合方法：30名专业译者评估并后编辑ChatGPT-4生成的阿拉伯语和英语文学文本翻译。
contributions: 实证表明AI文学翻译需人工后编辑，支持人机协作模型
为也门语境下的AI翻译应用提供实践见解

analysis.one_sentence_summary: ChatGPT-4文学翻译需人工后编辑，人机协作而非替代。

papers.title: LOD-Net: Locality-Aware 3D Object Detection Using Multi-Scale Transformer Network
papers.abstract: 3D object detection in point cloud data remains a challenging task due to the sparsity and lack of global structure inherent in the input. In this work, we propose a novel Multi-Scale Attention (MSA) mechanism integrated into the 3DETR architecture to better capture both local geometry and global context. Our method introduces an upsampling operation that generates high-resolution feature maps, enabling the network to better detect smaller and semantically related objects. Experiments conducted on the ScanNetv2 dataset demonstrate that our 3DETR + MSA model improves detection performance, achieving a gain of almost 1% in mAP@25 and 4.78% in mAP@50 over the baseline. While applying MSA to the 3DETR-m variant shows limited improvement, our analysis reveals the importance of adapting the upsampling strategy for lightweight models. These results highlight the effectiveness of combining hierarchical feature extraction with attention mechanisms in enhancing 3D scene understanding.

analysis.tldr: 提出多尺度注意力机制增强3DETR，在ScanNetv2上提升小物体检测精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 点云数据稀疏且缺乏全局结构，现有3D检测方法难以同时捕捉局部几何与全局上下文，尤其对小物体检测效果不佳。
analysis.problem: 如何设计网络结构以更好地融合局部与全局特征，提升3D点云中物体检测的准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 将多尺度注意力应用于轻量级3DETR-m变体时改进有限，表明上采样策略需针对轻量模型调整。
analysis.method: 在3DETR架构中集成多尺度注意力机制，通过上采样生成高分辨率特征图，增强小物体和语义相关物体的检测。
contributions: 提出多尺度注意力机制，有效结合局部几何与全局上下文。
引入上采样操作生成高分辨率特征图，提升小物体检测性能。
在ScanNetv2上验证方法有效性，mAP@25提升约1%，mAP@50提升4.78%。
analysis.experiments: 在ScanNetv2数据集上评估，与基线3DETR对比，报告了mAP@25和mAP@50指标。
limitations: 轻量级模型上改进有限，方法对模型规模敏感。
仅在单一数据集上验证，泛化性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法增量改进，实验有限，但针对3D检测小物体问题有实际价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多尺度注意力机制增强3DETR，在ScanNetv2上提升小物体检测精度。

papers.title: RankGuide: Tensor-Rank-Guided Routing and Steering for Efficient Reasoning
papers.abstract: Large reasoning models (LRMs) enhance problem-solving capabilities by generating explicit multi-step chains of thought (CoT) reasoning; however, they incur substantial inference latency and computational overhead. To mitigate this issue, recent works have explored model collaboration paradigms, where small reasoning models (SRMs) generate intermediate reasoning steps to achieve a better accuracy--latency trade-off. Despite recent progress, effectively and efficiently detecting and mitigating SRM failures in collaborative systems remains a key challenge. To address this issue, we analyze SRM inference in both the generated text and hidden-state spaces, and identify three types of failure modes: \textit{overconfidence}, \textit{uncertainty}, and \textit{heavy revalidation}. Building on these insights, we propose \textbf{RankGuide}, a framework that improves the efficiency and effectiveness of SRM--LRM collaboration through tensor-rank-guided routing and steering. Specifically, RankGuide leverages a routing signal that incorporates tensor-rank signals derived from consecutive hidden states to detect when SRMs are likely to fail and selectively invoke LRMs. In addition, we introduce a tensor-rank-filtered steering vector extraction method to modulate the reasoning trajectory of SRMs, thereby improving their generation quality. By improving both routing and steering through tensor-rank signals, RankGuide enables SRM--LRM collaborative systems to achieve more efficient reasoning with fewer steps and improved accuracy. Experiments on multiple reasoning benchmarks demonstrate the efficacy of RankGuide in reducing latency by up to $1.75\times$ compared to LRM, while maintaining competitive accuracy relative to prior methods.

analysis.tldr: RankGuide通过张量秩引导的路由与转向机制，提升小模型与大模型协作推理的效率与准确性。
analysis.research_motivation: 大型推理模型虽能通过多步思维链提升问题解决能力，但推理延迟和计算开销巨大；现有小-大模型协作范式虽能改善效率，但有效检测和缓解小模型失败仍是关键挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何高效检测小推理模型在协作系统中的失败模式，并动态路由至大模型或调整其推理轨迹，以平衡准确性与延迟。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要分析了小模型推理中的三种失败模式：过度自信、不确定性和重度重新验证，这些模式在文本和隐藏状态空间中均可观测。
analysis.method: 提出RankGuide框架，利用连续隐藏状态的张量秩信号作为路由指标，检测小模型可能失败时选择性调用大模型；同时引入张量秩滤波的转向向量提取方法，调整小模型推理轨迹以提升生成质量。
contributions: 识别了小模型推理中的三种失败模式（过度自信、不确定性、重度重新验证），并基于张量秩信号设计路由机制。
提出张量秩滤波的转向向量提取方法，用于调整小模型推理轨迹。
在多个推理基准上验证，相比大模型延迟降低1.75倍，同时保持竞争性准确率。
analysis.experiments: 在多个推理基准上评估，显示RankGuide相比大模型延迟降低1.75倍，准确率与先前方法相当。
limitations: 可能依赖特定模型架构（如隐藏状态可获取）。
张量秩信号的计算可能引入额外开销，需进一步分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法新颖（张量秩引导路由与转向），实验显示显著延迟降低，但准确率提升有限，适合精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: RankGuide通过张量秩引导的路由与转向机制，提升小模型与大模型协作推理的效率与准确性。

papers.title: The Query Channel: Information-Theoretic Limits of Masking-Based Explanations
papers.abstract: Masking-based post-hoc explanation methods, such as KernelSHAP and LIME, estimate local feature importance by querying a black-box model under randomized perturbations. This paper formulates this procedure as communication over a query channel, where the latent explanation acts as a message and each masked evaluation is a channel use. Within this framework, the complexity of the explanation is captured by the entropy of the hypothesis class, while the query interface supplies information at a rate determined by an identification capacity per query. We derive a strong converse showing that, if the explanation rate exceeds this capacity, the probability of exact recovery necessarily converges to one in error for any sequence of explainers and decoders. We also prove an achievability result establishing that a sparse maximum-likelihood decoder attains reliable recovery when the rate lies below capacity. A Monte Carlo estimator of mutual information yields a non-asymptotic query benchmark that we use to compare optimal decoding with Lasso- and OLS-based procedures that mirror LIME and KernelSHAP. Experiments reveal a range of query budgets where information theory permits reliable explanations but standard convex surrogates still fail. Finally, we interpret super-pixel resolution and tokenization for neural language models as a source-coding choice that sets the entropy of the explanation and show how Gaussian noise and nonlinear curvature degrade the query channel, induce waterfall and error-floor behavior, and render high-resolution explanations unattainable.

analysis.tldr: 将基于掩码的解释方法建模为查询信道，推导信息论极限并揭示标准凸替代方法的失败区间。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于掩码的事后解释方法（如KernelSHAP、LIME）缺乏理论上的性能保证，其查询效率与解释质量之间的关系尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 从信息论角度刻画基于掩码的解释方法中，查询次数与解释恢复可靠性之间的基本极限。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现存在查询预算区间，其中信息论允许可靠解释，但Lasso和OLS等标准凸方法仍然失败；高斯噪声和非线性曲率会劣化查询信道，导致瀑布效应和错误平层，使高分辨率解释不可实现。
analysis.method: 将解释过程建模为查询信道，推导解释率超过信道容量时精确恢复概率趋于0的强逆定理，并证明稀疏最大似然译码器在率低于容量时可达可靠恢复；使用互信息的蒙特卡洛估计作为非渐近查询基准。
contributions: 提出查询信道框架，将掩码解释问题转化为通信问题，并推导信息论极限。
证明强逆定理和可达性结果，建立解释率与信道容量之间的基本关系。
通过实验揭示标准凸方法（Lasso/OLS）在信息论允许的预算区间内仍会失败。
将超像素分辨率和语言模型分词解释为信源编码选择，并分析噪声和非线性对信道的劣化效应。
analysis.experiments: 使用蒙特卡洛估计互信息作为非渐近基准，对比最优译码与Lasso/OLS方法，在合成数据上展示不同查询预算下的恢复性能。
limitations: 理论分析主要针对精确恢复，可能不适用于近似解释。
实验仅在合成数据上进行，未在真实黑箱模型上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.reason: 理论贡献扎实，但实验偏合成，与当前重点方向（VLM/LLM）关联中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将基于掩码的解释方法建模为查询信道，推导信息论极限并揭示标准凸替代方法的失败区间。

papers.title: Agentic Risk-Aware Set-Based Engineering Design
papers.abstract: This paper introduces a multi-agent framework guided by Large Language Models (LLMs) to assist in the early stages of engineering design, a phase often characterized by vast parameter spaces and inherent uncertainty. Operating under a human-in-the-loop paradigm and demonstrated on the canonical problem of aerodynamic airfoil design, the framework employs a team of specialized agents: a Coding Assistant, a Design Agent, a Systems Engineering Agent, and an Analyst Agent - all coordinated by a human Manager. Integrated within a set-based design philosophy, the process begins with a collaborative phase where the Manager and Coding Assistant develop a suite of validated tools, after which the agents execute a structured workflow to systematically explore and prune a large set of initial design candidates. A key contribution of this work is the explicit integration of formal risk management, employing the Conditional Value-at-Risk (CVaR) as a quantitative metric to filter designs that exhibit a high probability of failing to meet performance requirements, specifically the target coefficient of lift. The framework automates labor-intensive initial exploration through a global sensitivity analysis conducted by the Analyst agent, which generates actionable heuristics to guide the other agents. The process culminates by presenting the human Manager with a curated final set of promising design candidates, augmented with high-fidelity Computational Fluid Dynamics (CFD) simulations. This approach effectively leverages AI to handle high-volume analytical tasks, thereby enhancing the decision-making capability of the human expert in selecting the final, risk-assessed design.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个基于LLM的多智能体框架，结合集合设计和风险量化（CVaR），用于工程设计的早期阶段。
analysis.research_motivation: 工程设计早期阶段参数空间大、不确定性高，传统方法依赖人工且效率低，缺乏自动化风险量化手段。

contributions: 提出一个LLM驱动的多智能体框架，用于工程设计的早期阶段。
将形式化风险管理（CVaR）集成到集合设计流程中。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅在一个规范问题（翼型设计）上演示，泛化性未知。
依赖LLM的可靠性，可能产生错误或偏见。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 方法有一定创新性，但应用领域较窄，且缺乏实验验证。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个基于LLM的多智能体框架，结合集合设计和风险量化（CVaR），用于工程设计的早期阶段。

papers.title: No-Worse Context-Aware Decoding: Preventing Neutral Regression in Context-Conditioned Generation
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) can answer questions and summarize documents when conditioned on external contexts (e.g., retrieved evidence), yet context use remains unreliable: models may overwrite an already-correct output (neutral regression) even when the context is non-informative. We formalize neutral regression as a do-no-harm requirement and quantify it by measuring accuracy drops on baseline-correct items under answer-consistent contexts. We propose No-Worse Context-Aware Decoding (NWCAD), a decode-time adapter built on a two-stream setup with a two-stage gate: it backs off to no-context decoding when the context is non-informative, and otherwise uses context-conditioned decoding with a CAD-style fallback under uncertainty. We evaluate NWCAD on benchmarks that separate do-no-harm reliability from context utilization (accuracy gains on genuinely helpful contexts). NWCAD prevents neutral regression on baseline-correct items while preserving strong context-driven accuracy on helpful contexts.

analysis.tldr: 提出NWCAD解码方法，防止LLM在无信息上下文下发生中性回归（覆盖正确输出），同时保持有用上下文下的性能。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在依赖外部上下文（如检索证据）时，即使上下文无信息也可能覆盖原本正确的输出，导致中性回归，损害可靠性。
analysis.problem: 如何防止LLM在无信息上下文下发生中性回归，同时不损失有用上下文带来的性能提升。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出LLM在非信息性上下文中会覆盖已正确的输出（中性回归），并量化了基线正确项上的准确率下降。
analysis.method: 提出No-Worse Context-Aware Decoding (NWCAD)，基于双流设置和两阶段门控：当上下文无信息时退回到无上下文解码，否则使用带CAD风格回退的上下文条件解码。
contributions: 形式化中性回归为do-no-harm要求，并量化其影响。
提出NWCAD解码方法，在保持有用上下文性能的同时防止中性回归。
analysis.experiments: 在分离do-no-harm可靠性和上下文利用的基准上评估，NWCAD防止了基线正确项上的中性回归，同时保持了有用上下文上的准确率。
limitations: 可能仅适用于解码阶段，无法解决模型内部表示问题。
两阶段门控可能引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且针对实际可靠性问题，实验设计合理，但摘要未提供具体数值，保守评分。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出NWCAD解码方法，防止LLM在无信息上下文下发生中性回归（覆盖正确输出），同时保持有用上下文下的性能。

papers.title: Graph Transformer-Based Pathway Embedding for Cancer Prognosis
papers.abstract: Accurate prediction of cancer progression remains a challenge due to the high heterogeneity of molecular omics data across patients. While biologically informed models have improved the interpretability of these predictions, a persistent limitation lies in how they encode individual genes to construct pathway representations. Existing hierarchical models typically derive gene features by directly mapping raw molecular inputs, whereas integration frameworks often rely on simple statistical aggregations of patient-level signals. These approaches often fail to explicitly learn a shared base representation for each gene, thereby limiting the expressiveness and biological accuracy of downstream pathway embeddings. To address this, we introduce PATH, a modulation-based, patient-conditioned gene embedding strategy. PATH represents a paradigm shift by starting from a shared base embedding for each gene, preserving a stable biological identity across the population, and then dynamically adapting it using patient-specific copy number variation (CNV) and mutation signals. This allows the model to capture subtle individual molecular variations while maintaining a consistent latent understanding of the gene itself. We integrate PATH into a graph transformer framework that models interactions among biologically connected pathways through pathway-guided attention. Across pancancer metastasis prediction, PATH achieves an F1 score of 0.8766, representing an 8.8 percent improvement over the current SOTA multi-omics benchmarks. Beyond superior predictive accuracy, our approach identifies biologically meaningful pathways and, crucially, reveals disease-state-specific pathway rewiring, offering new insights into the evolving pathway-pathway interactions that drive cancer progression.

analysis.tldr: 提出PATH基因嵌入策略，结合图Transformer实现癌症预后预测，F1达0.8766，较SOTA提升8.8%。
analysis.research_motivation: 癌症分子组学数据异质性高，现有模型在基因编码和通路表示构建上存在局限，缺乏共享基因基表示，影响下游通路嵌入的表达力和生物学准确性。
analysis.problem: 如何构建既能保持基因稳定生物学身份又能捕捉患者个体分子变异的通路表示，以提升癌症预后预测性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出PATH策略：为每个基因学习共享基嵌入，再通过患者特异性CNV和突变信号进行调制，生成患者条件基因嵌入；集成到图Transformer框架中，利用通路引导注意力建模通路间交互。
contributions: 提出PATH调制式患者条件基因嵌入方法，兼顾基因稳定身份与个体变异。
构建图Transformer框架实现通路间交互建模，在泛癌转移预测任务上达到SOTA。
analysis.experiments: 在泛癌转移预测任务上，PATH取得F1分数0.8766，较当前SOTA多组学基准提升8.8%。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量CNV和突变数据，数据缺失时性能下降。
通路定义和注意力机制可能引入先验偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验性能提升显著，但属于生物医学应用，与核心方向中等相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PATH基因嵌入策略，结合图Transformer实现癌症预后预测，F1达0.8766，较SOTA提升8.8%。

papers.title: Rewind-IL: Online Failure Detection and State Respawning for Imitation Learning
papers.abstract: Imitation learning has enabled robots to acquire complex visuomotor manipulation skills from demonstrations, but deployment failures remain a major obstacle, especially for long-horizon action-chunked policies. Once execution drifts off the demonstration manifold, these policies often continue producing locally plausible actions without recovering from the failure. Existing runtime monitors either require failure data, over-trigger under benign feature drift, or stop at failure detection without providing a recovery mechanism. We present Rewind-IL, a training-free online safeguard framework for generative action-chunked imitation policies. Rewind-IL combines a zero-shot failure detector based on Temporal Inter-chunk Discrepancy Estimate (TIDE), calibrated with split conformal prediction, with a state-respawning mechanism that returns the robot to a semantically verified safe intermediate state. Offline, a vision-language model identifies recovery checkpoints in demonstrations, and the frozen policy encoder is used to construct a compact checkpoint feature database. Online, Rewind-IL monitors self-consistency in overlapping action chunks, tracks similarity to the checkpoint library, and, upon failure, rewinds execution to the latest verified safe state before restarting inference from a clean policy state. Experiments on real-world and simulated long-horizon manipulation tasks, including transfer to flow-matching action-chunked policies, demonstrate that policy-internal consistency coupled with semantically grounded respawning offers a practical route to improved reliability in imitation learning. Supplemental materials are available at https://sjay05.github.io/rewind-il

analysis.tldr: Rewind-IL 提出一种无需训练的在线安全框架，通过时序块间差异检测失败并回滚到安全状态，提升模仿学习策略的可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: 模仿学习在机器人操作中表现优异，但长时域动作分块策略在部署时容易偏离演示流形且无法自动恢复，现有运行时监控方法要么需要失败数据，要么误触发，要么仅检测失败而不提供恢复机制。
analysis.problem: 解决生成式动作分块模仿策略在部署中的失败检测与自动恢复问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 一旦执行偏离演示流形，动作分块策略会持续产生局部合理的动作而无法从失败中恢复。
analysis.method: 结合基于时序块间差异估计（TIDE）的零样本失败检测器（用分裂共形预测校准）和状态回滚机制，离线用视觉语言模型识别恢复检查点并构建特征数据库，在线监控动作块自一致性和检查点相似度，失败时回滚到最新安全状态并重启推理。
contributions: 提出无需训练、即插即用的在线安全框架 Rewind-IL，适用于生成式动作分块模仿策略。
设计基于时序块间差异估计的零样本失败检测器，结合分裂共形预测提供统计保证。
引入状态回滚机制，利用视觉语言模型自动识别演示中的安全检查点，实现语义验证的恢复。
analysis.experiments: 在真实世界和模拟的长时域操作任务上进行了实验，包括迁移到流匹配动作分块策略，展示了策略内部一致性与语义回滚结合的有效性。
limitations: 依赖视觉语言模型离线识别检查点，可能受限于 VLM 的准确性。
回滚机制需要机器人能够物理回到之前的状态，在复杂环境中可能不可行。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，无需训练且结合统计保证与语义回滚，实验验证充分，对机器人模仿学习可靠性有实际价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Rewind-IL 提出一种无需训练的在线安全框架，通过时序块间差异检测失败并回滚到安全状态，提升模仿学习策略的可靠性。

papers.title: KAIROS: Stateful, Context-Aware Power-Efficient Agentic Inference Serving
papers.abstract: Power has become a central bottleneck for AI inference. This problem is becoming more urgent as agentic AI emerges as a major workload class, yet prior power-management techniques focus almost entirely on single-turn LLM serving. Our analysis shows that agentic serving behaves fundamentally differently: each request carries long-lived context that evolves across tool-interleaved turns, and lowering GPU frequency can push the system into a thrashing regime where memory pressure sharply worsens both performance and power efficiency. These observations show that power optimization for agentic serving requires rethinking. We present KAIROS, a context-aware power optimization system for agentic AI serving. KAIROS uses agent context as a first-class control signal to jointly manage GPU frequency, per-instance concurrency, and multi-instance request placement. This enables KAIROS to save power when memory headroom exists while avoiding thrashing and preserving performance targets. At a high level, KAIROS tracks requests at agent granularity, adapts local control to context growth and agent progress, and routes agents across instances to jointly improve power efficiency and memory stability. Evaluated across diverse software and data engineering agentic tasks, KAIROS achieves an average of 27% (up to 39.8%) power reduction while meeting the performance targets.

analysis.tldr: KAIROS利用智能体上下文信号联合管理GPU频率、并发度和实例放置，在保证性能前提下平均降低27%功耗。
analysis.research_motivation: 功耗已成为AI推理的核心瓶颈，而现有功耗管理技术几乎只针对单轮LLM服务，无法适应智能体推理中长上下文、工具交织的独特负载特征。
analysis.problem: 如何为智能体AI推理服务设计上下文感知的功耗优化系统，在避免内存抖动的同时降低功耗并满足性能目标。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 智能体服务中每个请求携带长期上下文，且在不同工具调用轮次中不断演化；降低GPU频率可能导致系统进入抖动状态，内存压力急剧恶化性能和能效。
analysis.method: KAIROS将智能体上下文作为一等控制信号，联合管理GPU频率、每实例并发度和多实例请求放置；以智能体粒度跟踪请求，根据上下文增长和智能体进度自适应局部控制，并在实例间路由智能体以提升能效和内存稳定性。
contributions: 首次系统分析智能体推理服务的功耗特性，揭示其与单轮LLM服务的根本差异
提出KAIROS系统，利用上下文信号实现联合功耗优化，避免抖动并保证性能
analysis.experiments: 在多种软件和数据工程智能体任务上评估，平均功耗降低27%（最高39.8%），同时满足性能目标。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的智能体工作负载
未讨论跨GPU集群的扩展性
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.reason: 针对新兴智能体推理负载的功耗优化，方法新颖且实验效果显著，与LLM推理系统方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: KAIROS利用智能体上下文信号联合管理GPU频率、并发度和实例放置，在保证性能前提下平均降低27%功耗。

papers.title: C-GenReg: Training-Free 3D Point Cloud Registration by Multi-View-Consistent Geometry-to-Image Generation with Probabilistic Modalities Fusion
papers.abstract: We introduce C-GenReg, a training-free framework for 3D point cloud registration that leverages the complementary strengths of world-scale generative priors and registration-oriented Vision Foundation Models (VFMs). Current learning-based 3D point cloud registration methods struggle to generalize across sensing modalities, sampling differences, and environments. Hence, C-GenReg augments the geometric point cloud registration branch by transferring the matching problem into an auxiliary image domain, where VFMs excel, using a World Foundation Model to synthesize multi-view-consistent RGB representations from the input geometry. This generative transfer, preserves spatial coherence across source and target views without any fine-tuning. From these generated views, a VFM pretrained for finding dense correspondences extracts matches. The resulting pixel correspondences are lifted back to 3D via the original depth maps. To further enhance robustness, we introduce a "Match-then-Fuse" probabilistic cold-fusion scheme that combines two independent correspondence posteriors, that of the generated-RGB branch with that of the raw geometric branch. This principled fusion preserves each modality inductive bias and provides calibrated confidence without any additional learning. C-GenReg is zero-shot and plug-and-play: all modules are pretrained and operate without fine-tuning. Extensive experiments on indoor (3DMatch, ScanNet) and outdoor (Waymo) benchmarks demonstrate strong zero-shot performance and superior cross-domain generalization. For the first time, we demonstrate a generative registration framework that operates successfully on real outdoor LiDAR data, where no imagery data is available.

analysis.tldr: C-GenReg 是一种无需训练的三维点云配准框架，通过多视角一致的几何到图像生成和概率模态融合，实现了零样本跨域泛化。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于学习的3D点云配准方法难以泛化到不同传感模态、采样差异和环境，而视觉基础模型在图像域表现优异，因此探索利用生成模型将点云匹配问题转移到图像域，以提升泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 如何在不进行微调的情况下，利用生成先验和视觉基础模型实现鲁棒的零样本3D点云配准，并有效融合几何与图像模态的匹配结果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: C-GenReg 包含三个关键组件：1) 使用世界基础模型从输入几何生成多视角一致的RGB图像；2) 利用预训练的视觉基础模型（VFM）在生成图像上提取密集对应关系，并通过深度图映射回3D；3) 提出“Match-then-Fuse”概率冷融合方案，将生成RGB分支和原始几何分支的对应后验概率进行融合，无需额外学习。
contributions: 提出首个无需训练的生成式点云配准框架，利用世界基础模型和视觉基础模型实现零样本跨域泛化。
引入概率冷融合方案，有效结合几何和图像模态的匹配后验，提升鲁棒性。
在室内（3DMatch, ScanNet）和室外（Waymo）基准上展示了强大的零样本性能和跨域泛化能力，首次在无图像数据的真实LiDAR数据上成功应用生成式配准。
analysis.experiments: 在室内数据集3DMatch、ScanNet和室外数据集Waymo上进行实验，展示了零样本性能和跨域泛化能力。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 依赖生成图像的质量，若生成图像与真实场景差异较大可能影响匹配精度。
概率融合方案可能在高噪声或极端视角下失效。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，无需训练且跨域泛化强，实验覆盖室内外场景，但摘要未提供具体数值，保守评分。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: C-GenReg 是一种无需训练的三维点云配准框架，通过多视角一致的几何到图像生成和概率模态融合，实现了零样本跨域泛化。

papers.title: ReconVLA: An Uncertainty-Guided and Failure-Aware Vision-Language-Action Framework for Robotic Control
papers.abstract: Vision-language-action (VLA) models have emerged as generalist robotic controllers capable of mapping visual observations and natural language instructions to continuous action sequences. However, VLAs provide no calibrated measure of confidence in their action predictions, thus limiting their reliability in real-world settings where uncertainty and failures must be anticipated. To address this problem we introduce ReconVLA, a reliable conformal model that produces uncertainty-guided and failure-aware control signals. Concretely, our approach applies conformal prediction directly to the action token outputs of pretrained VLA policies, yielding calibrated uncertainty estimates that correlate with execution quality and task success. Furthermore, we extend conformal prediction to the robot state space to detect outliers or unsafe states before failures occur, providing a simple yet effective failure detection mechanism that complements the action-level uncertainty. We evaluate ReconVLA in both simulation and real robot experiments across diverse manipulation tasks. Our results show that conformalized action predictions consistently improve failure anticipation, reduce catastrophic errors, and provide a calibrated measure of confidence without retraining or modifying the underlying VLA.

analysis.tldr: ReconVLA通过共形预测为VLA模型提供校准的不确定性估计和故障检测，提升机器人控制的可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: VLA模型在机器人控制中缺乏校准的置信度度量，限制了其在需要预测不确定性和故障的真实场景中的可靠性。
analysis.problem: 如何为预训练的VLA策略提供校准的不确定性估计和故障检测机制，而无需重新训练或修改模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将共形预测应用于VLA的动作token输出，获得校准的不确定性估计；并扩展共形预测到机器人状态空间，用于检测异常或危险状态。
contributions: 提出ReconVLA框架，通过共形预测为VLA模型提供不确定性引导和故障感知的控制信号。
在仿真和真实机器人实验中验证了该方法能改善故障预测、减少灾难性错误，并提供校准的置信度度量。
analysis.experiments: 在仿真和真实机器人实验中评估，涵盖多种操作任务，结果表明共形化动作预测持续改善故障预测并减少灾难性错误。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练VLA模型的质量，共形预测的校准效果可能受模型影响。
状态空间异常检测的有效性可能受限于状态表示的完整性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实用，实验验证充分，与VLA和机器人控制方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ReconVLA通过共形预测为VLA模型提供校准的不确定性估计和故障检测，提升机器人控制的可靠性。

papers.title: Appearance-free Action Recognition: Zero-shot Generalization in Humans and a Two-Pathway Model
papers.abstract: Action recognition is a fundamental ability for social species. Yet, its underlying computations are not well understood. Classical psychophysical studies using simplified stimuli have shown that humans can perceive body motion even under degradation of relevant shape cues. Recent work using real-world action videos and their appearance-free counterparts (that preserve motion but lack static shape cues) included explicit training of humans and models on the appearance-free videos. Whether humans and vision models generalize in a zero-shot manner to appearance-free transformations of real-world action videos is not yet known. To measure this generalization in humans, we conducted a laboratory-based psychophysics experiment. 22 participants were trained to recognize five action categories using naturalistic videos (UCF5 dataset), and tested zero-shot on two types of appearance-free transformations: (i) dense-noise motion videos from an existing dataset (AFD5) and (ii) random-dot appearance-free videos. We find that participants recognize actions in both types of appearance-free videos well above chance, albeit with reduced accuracy compared to naturalistic videos. To model this behavior, we developed a two-pathway 3D CNN-based model combining an RGB (form) stream and an optical flow (motion) stream, including a coherence-gating mechanism inspired by Gestalt common-fate grouping. Our model generalizes to both appearance-free datasets and outperforms contemporary video classification models, narrowing the gap to human performance. We find that the motion pathway is critical for generalization to appearance-free videos, while the form pathway improves performance on naturalistic videos. Our findings highlight the importance of motion-based representations for generalization to appearance-free videos, and support the use of multi-stream architectures to model video-based action recognition.

analysis.tldr: 人类和双通路模型能在零样本下泛化到无外观动作识别，运动通路是关键。
analysis.research_motivation: 动作识别是社交物种的基本能力，但其计算机制尚不明确；现有研究多使用简化刺激或显式训练，缺乏对零样本泛化到无外观视频的探索。
analysis.problem: 人类和视觉模型能否零样本泛化到真实世界动作视频的无外观变换（保留运动但去除静态形状线索）？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 人类在两种无外观视频（密集噪声和随机点）上的识别准确率显著高于随机水平，但低于自然视频；运动通路对泛化至关重要，形式通路提升自然视频性能。
analysis.method: 提出双通路3D CNN模型，包含RGB（形式）流和光流（运动）流，并引入基于格式塔共同命运分组的相干门控机制。
contributions: 首次通过心理物理实验证明人类能零样本泛化到无外观动作视频。
提出双通路模型，在无外观数据集上超越现有视频分类模型，缩小与人类性能差距。
analysis.experiments: 22名参与者使用UCF5数据集训练，在AFD5和随机点无外观视频上测试；模型在相同数据集上评估并与当代模型比较。
limitations: 仅使用5个动作类别，泛化性有限。
模型仍低于人类性能，且未探索其他无外观变换类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有创新性（双通路+相干门控），实验包括人类和模型，但动作类别少，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 人类和双通路模型能在零样本下泛化到无外观动作识别，运动通路是关键。

papers.title: From Subsumption to Satisfiability: LLM-Assisted Active Learning for OWL Ontologies
papers.abstract: In active learning, membership queries (MQs) allow a learner to pose questions to a teacher, such as ''Is every apple a fruit?'', to which the teacher responds correctly with yes or no. These MQs can be viewed as subsumption tests with respect to the target ontology. Inspired by the standard reduction of subsumption to satisfiability in description logics, we reformulate each candidate axiom into its corresponding counter-concept and verbalise it in controlled natural language before presenting it to Large Language Models (LLMs). We introduce LLMs as a third component that provides real-world examples approximating an instance of the counter-concept. This design property ensures that only Type II errors may occur in ontology modelling; in the worst case, these errors merely delay the construction process without introducing inconsistencies. Experimental results on 13 commercial LLMs show that recall, corresponding to Type II errors in our framework, remains stable across several well-established ontologies.

papers.title: A Benchmark Study of Segmentation Models and Adaptation Strategies for Landslide Detection from Satellite Imagery
papers.abstract: Landslide detection from high resolution satellite imagery is a critical task for disaster response and risk assessment, yet the relative effectiveness of modern segmentation architectures and finetuning strategies for this problem remains insufficiently understood. In this work, we present a systematic benchmarking study of convolutional neural networks, transformer based segmentation models, and large pre-trained foundation models for landslide detection. Using the Globally Distributed Coseismic Landslide Dataset (GDCLD) dataset, we evaluate representative CNN- and transformer-based segmentation models alongside large pretrained foundation models under consistent training and evaluation protocols. In addition, we compare full fine-tuning with parameter-efficient fine-tuning methods, including LoRA and AdaLoRA, to assess their performance efficiency tradeoffs. Experimental results show that transformer-based models achieve strong segmentation performance, while parameter efficient finetuning reduces trainable parameters by up to 95% with comparable accuracy to full finetuning. We further analyze generalization under distribution shift by comparing validation and held-out test performance.

analysis.tldr: 系统比较CNN、Transformer和预训练基础模型在滑坡检测中的分割性能与微调策略。

papers.title: MidSteer: Optimal Affine Framework for Steering Generative Models
papers.abstract: Steering intermediate representations has emerged as a powerful strategy for controlling generative models, particularly in post-deployment alignment and safety settings. However, despite its empirical success, it currently lacks a comprehensive theoretical framework. In this paper, we bridge this gap by formalizing the theory of concept steering. First, we establish a link between steering and affine concept erasure, proving that the standard approach for removing unwanted behaviors is a special case of LEACE (a closed-form method for affine erasure). Next, we formulate a principled theoretical framework for concept switching, LEACE-Switch, and characterize the assumptions under which it provides an optimal affine solution. Building on this analysis, we then introduce MidSteer (Minimal Disturbance concept Steering), a more general affine framework for concept manipulation that relaxes these assumptions and enables directed, minimal-disturbance transformations. We demonstrate that MidSteer performs favorably across a range of tasks, modalities, and architectures, including vision diffusion models and large language models.

papers.title: Cross-Modal Bayesian Low-Rank Adaptation for Uncertainty-Aware Multimodal Learning
papers.abstract: Large pre-trained language models are increasingly adapted to downstream tasks using parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT), but existing PEFT methods are typically deterministic and unimodal, making them poorly suited for low-resource multimodal settings where predictive uncertainty and cross-modal reliability both matter. We introduce CALIBER (Context-Aware Low-rank Inference with Bayesian Embedding Regularization), a multimodal uncertainty-aware PEFT framework for audio-text learning. CALIBER extends Bayesian low-rank adaptation by conditioning the variational posterior in the adapter space on per-layer, token-level text-audio cross-attention. Specifically, text-derived low-rank features attend to frame-level audio embeddings to produce localized acoustic context, which then modulates the mean and variance of a compact stochastic latent matrix within the rank-$r$ adapter space. This design treats audio not only as an additional feature source, but as a contextual reliability signal that shapes both adaptation and confidence. By confining stochasticity to a low-dimensional latent component, CALIBER retains the computational efficiency and scalability of PEFT while enabling heteroscedastic multimodal uncertainty estimation. Experimental results across diverse text and audio backbones show that CALIBER consistently matches or improves upon text-only Bayesian PEFT and conventional multimodal transfer-learning baselines, with token-level cross-attention yielding the most consistent gains. Our findings demonstrate that localized cross-modal conditioning is an effective and lightweight mechanism for uncertainty-aware multimodal adaptation.

papers.title: A Two-Stage Multi-Modal MRI Framework for Lifespan Brain Age Prediction
papers.abstract: The accurate quantification of brain age from MRI has emerged as an important biomarker of brain health. However, existing approaches are often restricted to narrow age ranges and single-modality MRI data, limiting their capacity to capture the coordinated macro- and microstructural changes that unfold across the human lifespan. To address these limitations, we developed a multi-modal brain age framework to characterize the integrated evolution of brain morphology and white matter organization. Our model adopts a two-stage architecture, where modalities are processed independently and integrated via late fusion in both stages: first to classify each subject into one of six developmental stages, and then to estimate age within the predicted stage. This design enables a unified and lifespan-spanning assessment of brain maturity across diverse developmental periods.

papers.title: Agentic Frameworks for Reasoning Tasks: An Empirical Study
papers.abstract: Recent advances in agentic frameworks have enabled AI agents to perform complex reasoning and decision-making. However, evidence comparing their reasoning performance, efficiency, and practical suitability remains limited. To address this gap, we empirically evaluate 22 widely used agentic frameworks across three reasoning benchmarks: BBH, GSM8K, and ARC. The frameworks were selected from 1,200 GitHub repositories collected between January 2023 and July 2025 and organized into a taxonomy based on architectural design. We evaluated them under a unified setting, measuring reasoning accuracy, execution time, computational cost, and cross-benchmark consistency. Our results show that 19 of the 22 frameworks completed all three benchmarks. Among these, 12 showed stable performance, with mean accuracy of 74.6-75.9%, execution time of 4-6 seconds per task, and cost of 0.14-0.18 cents per task. Poorer results were mainly caused by orchestration problems rather than reasoning limits. For example, Camel failed to complete BBH after 11 days because of uncontrolled context growth, while Upsonic consumed USD 1,434 in one day because repeated extraction failures triggered costly retries. AutoGen and Mastra also exhausted API quotas through iterative interactions that increased prompt length without improving results. We also found a sharp drop in mathematical reasoning. Mean accuracy on GSM8K was 44.35%, compared with 89.80% on BBH and 89.56% on ARC. Overall, this study provides the first large-scale empirical comparison of agentic frameworks for reasoning-intensive software engineering tasks and shows that framework selection should prioritize orchestration quality, especially memory control, failure handling, and cost management.

papers.title: Tri-Modal Fusion Transformers for UAV-based Object Detection
papers.abstract: Reliable UAV object detection requires robustness to illumination changes, motion blur, and scene dynamics that suppress RGB cues. Thermal long-wave infrared (LWIR) sensing preserves contrast in low light, and event cameras retain microsecond-level temporal edges, but integrating all three modalities in a unified detector has not been systematically studied. We present a tri-modal framework that processes RGB, thermal, and event data with a dual-stream hierarchical vision transformer. At selected encoder depths, a Modality-Aware Gated Exchange (MAGE) applies inter-sensor channel and spatial gating, and a Bidirectional Token Exchange (BiTE) module performs bidirectional token-level attention with depthwise-pointwise refinement, producing resolution-preserving fused maps for a standard feature pyramid and two-stage detector. We introduce a 10,489-frame UAV dataset with synchronized and pre-aligned RGB-thermal-event streams and 24,223 annotated vehicles across day and night flights. Through 61 controlled ablations, we evaluate fusion placement, mechanism (baseline MAGE+BiTE, CSSA, GAFF), modality subsets, and backbone capacity. Tri-modal fusion improves over all dual-modal baselines, with fusion depth having a significant effect and a lightweight CSSA variant recovering most of the benefit at minimal cost. This work provides the first systematic benchmark and modular backbone for tri-modal UAV-based object detection.

analysis.tldr: 提出三模态融合Transformer用于无人机目标检测，结合RGB、热红外和事件相机数据，通过门控交换和双向令牌注意力实现有效融合。
