papers.title: EviDep: Trustworthy Multimodal Depression Estimation via Disentangled Evidential Learning
papers.abstract: Automated multimodal depression estimation in unconstrained environments is inherently challenged by naturalistic noise and complex behavioral variability. Prevailing deterministic methods, however, produce uncalibrated point estimates without quantifying predictive uncertainty, exposing decision-making to the risk of overconfident, untrustworthy estimates. To establish a reliable and trustworthy estimation paradigm, we propose EviDep, an evidential learning framework that jointly quantifies depression severity alongside aleatoric and epistemic uncertainties via a Normal-Inverse-Gamma distribution. To ensure the integrity of the extracted behavioral evidence and prevent artificial confidence inflation during multimodal fusion, EviDep introduces two tailored mechanisms. First, addressing the temporal-frequency heterogeneity of behavioral cues, a Frequency-aware Feature Extraction module leverages a wavelet-based Mixture-of-Experts to dynamically decouple stable macro-level affective baselines from transient micro-level behavioral bursts, effectively filtering out task-irrelevant artifacts. Second, a Disentangled Evidential Learning strategy enforces explicit decorrelation of features in these purified representations. By separating the cross-modal shared consensus from modality-specific behavioral nuances before Bayesian fusion, this rigorous disentanglement strictly prevents the model from double-counting overlapping information. Extensive experiments on the AVEC 2013, AVEC 2014, DAIC-WOZ, and E-DAIC datasets confirm that EviDep achieves state-of-the-art predictive accuracy and superior uncertainty calibration, thereby delivering a trustworthy, risk-aware decision-support tool for depression estimation.

analysis.tldr: 提出EviDep框架，通过解耦证据学习实现可信的多模态抑郁估计，同时量化不确定性和抑郁严重程度。
analysis.research_motivation: 非受控环境下的多模态抑郁估计受自然噪声和行为变异性影响，现有确定性方法仅输出点估计，无法量化预测不确定性，易导致过度自信的不可信估计。
analysis.problem: 如何建立可靠且可信的多模态抑郁估计框架，同时量化抑郁严重程度和不确定性，并防止多模态融合中的虚假置信度膨胀。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多模态行为线索存在时间-频率异质性，且跨模态融合时易出现信息重叠导致的置信度膨胀。
analysis.method: 提出EviDep框架，基于Normal-Inverse-Gamma分布进行证据学习，联合量化抑郁严重程度、偶然不确定性和认知不确定性。包含两个机制：1) 频率感知特征提取模块，利用小波混合专家动态解耦稳定宏观情感基线和瞬时微观行为爆发；2) 解耦证据学习策略，在贝叶斯融合前显式分离跨模态共享共识和模态特定行为细微差别，防止信息重复计数。
contributions: 提出EviDep，首个将证据学习用于多模态抑郁估计的框架，同时量化抑郁严重程度和不确定性。
设计频率感知特征提取模块和解耦证据学习策略，有效处理行为异质性和防止置信度膨胀。
在四个基准数据集上取得最先进预测精度和优越的不确定性校准。
analysis.experiments: 在AVEC 2013、AVEC 2014、DAIC-WOZ和E-DAIC数据集上进行实验，结果表明EviDep在预测精度和不确定性校准上达到最先进水平。
limitations: 可能对计算资源要求较高，因为涉及小波混合专家和解耦学习。
未在真实临床环境中验证，实际部署效果有待进一步评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分，与多模态学习方向相关，但属于特定应用领域。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出EviDep框架，通过解耦证据学习实现可信的多模态抑郁估计，同时量化不确定性和抑郁严重程度。

papers.title: Elucidating the SNR-t Bias of Diffusion Probabilistic Models
papers.abstract: Diffusion Probabilistic Models have demonstrated remarkable performance across a wide range of generative tasks. However, we have observed that these models often suffer from a Signal-to-Noise Ratio-timestep (SNR-t) bias. This bias refers to the misalignment between the SNR of the denoising sample and its corresponding timestep during the inference phase. Specifically, during training, the SNR of a sample is strictly coupled with its timestep. However, this correspondence is disrupted during inference, leading to error accumulation and impairing the generation quality. We provide comprehensive empirical evidence and theoretical analysis to substantiate this phenomenon and propose a simple yet effective differential correction method to mitigate the SNR-t bias. Recognizing that diffusion models typically reconstruct low-frequency components before focusing on high-frequency details during the reverse denoising process, we decompose samples into various frequency components and apply differential correction to each component individually. Extensive experiments show that our approach significantly improves the generation quality of various diffusion models (IDDPM, ADM, DDIM, A-DPM, EA-DPM, EDM, PFGM++, and FLUX) on datasets of various resolutions with negligible computational overhead. The code is at https://github.com/AMAP-ML/DCW.

analysis.tldr: 发现扩散模型存在信噪比-时间步偏差，并提出差分校正方法提升生成质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散模型在生成任务中表现优异，但存在SNR-t偏差导致误差累积，影响生成质量，现有方法未充分解决此问题。
analysis.problem: 扩散模型推理阶段中，去噪样本的信噪比与时间步之间的对应关系被破坏，导致误差累积和生成质量下降。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 训练时样本SNR与时间步严格耦合，但推理时这种对应关系被破坏，导致偏差；模型在反向去噪过程中先重建低频分量再关注高频细节。
analysis.method: 提出差分校正方法，将样本分解为不同频率分量，并对每个分量单独应用差分校正，以缓解SNR-t偏差。
contributions: 首次系统性地识别并分析了扩散模型中的SNR-t偏差现象，提供了理论和实验证据。
提出一种简单有效的差分校正方法，显著提升多种扩散模型在多个数据集上的生成质量，且计算开销可忽略。
analysis.experiments: 在IDDPM、ADM、DDIM、A-DPM、EA-DPM、EDM、PFGM++和FLUX等多种扩散模型上，对不同分辨率数据集进行实验，生成质量显著提升。
limitations: 方法可能对特定频率分解策略敏感，需要进一步探索最优分解方式。
未在极大规模或实时生成场景下验证计算开销的稳定性。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法简单有效，实验充分，对扩散模型领域有实际改进价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 发现扩散模型存在信噪比-时间步偏差，并提出差分校正方法提升生成质量。

papers.title: Towards Intrinsic Interpretability of Large Language Models:A Survey of Design Principles and Architectures
papers.abstract: While Large Language Models (LLMs) have achieved strong performance across many NLP tasks, their opaque internal mechanisms hinder trustworthiness and safe deployment. Existing surveys in explainable AI largely focus on post-hoc explanation methods that interpret trained models through external approximations. In contrast, intrinsic interpretability, which builds transparency directly into model architectures and computations, has recently emerged as a promising alternative. This paper presents a systematic review of the recent advances in intrinsic interpretability for LLMs, categorizing existing approaches into five design paradigms: functional transparency, concept alignment, representational decomposability, explicit modularization, and latent sparsity induction. We further discuss open challenges and outline future research directions in this emerging field. The paper list is available at: https://github.com/PKU-PILLAR-Group/Survey-Intrinsic-Interpretability-of-LLMs.

papers.title: Multilevel neural networks with dual-stage feature fusion for human activity recognition
papers.abstract: Human activity recognition (HAR) refers to the process of identifying human actions and activities using data collected from sensors. Neural networks, such as convolutional neural networks (CNNs), long short-term memory (LSTM) networks, convolutional LSTM, and their hybrid combinations, have demonstrated exceptional performance in various research domains. Developing a multilevel individual or hybrid model for HAR involves strategically integrating multiple networks to capitalize on their complementary strengths. The structural arrangement of these components is a critical factor influencing the overall performance. This study explores a novel framework of a two-level network architecture with dual-stage feature fusion: late fusion, which combines the outputs from the first network level, and intermediate fusion, which integrates the features from both the first and second levels. We evaluated $15$ different network architectures of CNNs, LSTMs, and convolutional LSTMs, incorporating late fusion with and without intermediate fusion, to identify the optimal configuration. Experimental evaluation on two public benchmark datasets demonstrates that architectures incorporating both late and intermediate fusion achieve higher accuracy than those relying on late fusion alone. Moreover, the optimal configuration outperforms baseline models, thereby validating its effectiveness for HAR.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种双阶段特征融合的两级神经网络架构，在人类活动识别中优于单阶段融合方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 人类活动识别（HAR）中，多级或混合神经网络的结构安排对性能影响很大，但如何最优地融合不同网络层的特征仍是一个关键挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种多级神经网络架构，通过双阶段特征融合（晚期融合与中间融合）来提升HAR的识别准确率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出两级网络架构：第一级网络输出通过晚期融合结合，第二级网络与第一级特征通过中间融合整合，形成双阶段融合策略。
contributions: 提出一种双阶段特征融合（晚期+中间）的两级神经网络框架。
在15种不同架构（CNN、LSTM、卷积LSTM）上系统评估，证明双阶段融合优于单阶段晚期融合。
analysis.experiments: 在两个公开基准数据集上评估，双阶段融合架构准确率更高，最优配置优于基线模型。
limitations: 仅针对HAR任务，泛化性未验证。

papers.title: Ranking XAI Methods for Head and Neck Cancer Outcome Prediction
papers.abstract: For head and neck cancer (HNC) patients, prognostic outcome prediction can support personalized treatment strategy selection. Improving prediction performance of HNC outcomes has been extensively explored by using advanced artificial intelligence (AI) techniques on PET/CT data. However, the interpretability of AI remains a critical obstacle for its clinical adoption. Unlike previous HNC studies that empirically selected explainable AI (XAI) techniques, we are the first to comprehensively evaluate and rank 13 XAI methods across 24 metrics, covering faithfulness, robustness, complexity and plausibility. Experimental results on the multi-center HECKTOR challenge dataset show large variations across evaluation aspects among different XAI methods, with Integrated Gradients (IG) and DeepLIFT (DL) consistently obtained high rankings for faithfulness, complexity and plausibility. This work highlights the importance of comprehensive XAI method evaluation and can be extended to other medical imaging tasks.

analysis.tldr: 首次系统评估13种XAI方法在头颈癌预后预测中的表现，发现IG和DL在忠实性、复杂性和合理性上排名最高。
analysis.research_motivation: AI在头颈癌预后预测中性能优异，但可解释性不足阻碍临床采纳；现有研究仅凭经验选择XAI方法，缺乏系统性评估。
analysis.problem: 如何全面评估并排序不同XAI方法在头颈癌预后预测任务中的表现，以指导临床选择。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同XAI方法在忠实性、鲁棒性、复杂性和合理性等24个指标上表现差异显著，IG和DL在多个维度上表现一致。
analysis.method: 在HECKTOR挑战数据集上，对13种XAI方法从忠实性、鲁棒性、复杂性和合理性四个维度共24个指标进行综合评估和排名。
contributions: 首次对13种XAI方法在头颈癌预后预测中进行全面评估和排名。
揭示了不同XAI方法在多个评估维度上的显著差异，并指出IG和DL的优越性。
analysis.experiments: 基于多中心HECKTOR挑战数据集，评估了13种XAI方法在24个指标上的表现。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅针对头颈癌预后预测任务，泛化性需在其他医学影像任务中验证。
未涉及XAI方法对临床决策的实际影响评估。

papers.title: Safe Deep Reinforcement Learning for Building Heating Control and Demand-side Flexibility
papers.abstract: Buildings account for approximately 40% of global energy consumption, and with the growing share of intermittent renewable energy sources, enabling demand-side flexibility, particularly in heating, ventilation and air conditioning systems, is essential for grid stability and energy efficiency. This paper presents a safe deep reinforcement learning-based control framework to optimize building space heating while enabling demand-side flexibility provision for power system operators. A deep deterministic policy gradient algorithm is used as the core deep reinforcement learning method, enabling the controller to learn an optimal heating strategy through interaction with the building thermal model while maintaining occupant comfort, minimizing energy cost, and providing flexibility. To address safety concerns with reinforcement learning, particularly regarding compliance with flexibility requests, we propose a real-time adaptive safety-filter to ensure that the system operates within predefined constraints during demand-side flexibility provision. The proposed real-time adaptive safety filter guarantees full compliance with flexibility requests from system operators and improves energy and cost efficiency -- achieving up to 50% savings compared to a rule-based controller -- while outperforming a standalone deep reinforcement learning-based controller in energy and cost metrics, with only a slight increase in comfort temperature violations.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种带实时自适应安全滤波器的深度强化学习框架，用于建筑供暖控制与需求侧灵活性，在满足约束的同时实现高达50%的节能。
analysis.research_motivation: 建筑能耗占全球约40%，随着间歇性可再生能源占比增加，需求侧灵活性对电网稳定和能效至关重要，现有方法在安全约束和灵活性请求合规方面存在不足。
analysis.problem: 如何在建筑供暖控制中利用深度强化学习同时优化能耗、保持舒适度并提供需求侧灵活性，且确保严格遵守灵活性请求的安全约束。

contributions: 提出一种带实时自适应安全滤波器的安全深度强化学习框架，用于建筑供暖控制与需求侧灵活性。
实验表明该方法相比基于规则的控制器节能高达50%，且在能耗和成本指标上优于纯深度强化学习控制器，仅轻微增加舒适温度违规。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到与基于规则的控制器和纯深度强化学习控制器对比，节能高达50%，但未提供具体数据集或实验设置细节。
limitations: 可能仅在特定建筑热模型和气候条件下验证，泛化性未知。

papers.title: Evaluating Temporal and Structural Anomaly Detection Paradigms for DDoS Traffic
authors: Tereza Cristina M. de B. Carvalho
papers.abstract: Unsupervised anomaly detection is widely used to detect Distributed Denial-of-Service (DDoS) attacks in cloud-native 5G networks, yet most studies assume a fixed traffic representation, either temporal or structural, without validating which feature space best matches the data. We propose a lightweight decision framework that prioritizes temporal or structural features before training, using two diagnostics: lag-1 autocorrelation of an aggregated flow signal and PCA cumulative explained variance. When the probes are inconclusive, the framework reserves a hybrid option as a future fallback rather than an empirically validated branch. Experiments on two statistically distinct datasets with Isolation Forest, One-Class SVM, and KMeans show that structural features consistently match or outperform temporal ones, with the performance gap widening as temporal dependence weakens.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个轻量级决策框架，在训练前通过两个诊断指标优先选择时序或结构特征，实验表明结构特征在DDoS检测中更优。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有无监督异常检测方法大多假设固定的流量表示（时序或结构），未验证哪种特征空间更适合数据，导致检测性能不稳定。
analysis.problem: 如何自动选择最优的流量特征表示（时序或结构）以提升DDoS攻击检测性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现结构特征一致优于或持平时序特征，且当时序依赖性减弱时性能差距扩大。
analysis.method: 提出轻量级决策框架，使用滞后1自相关和PCA累积解释方差两个诊断指标，在训练前优先选择时序或结构特征，当指标不明确时保留混合选项作为未来备用。
contributions: 提出一个基于诊断指标的轻量级特征选择框架，无需训练即可决定使用时序或结构特征。
在两个统计不同的数据集上验证了结构特征在DDoS检测中的优势。
analysis.experiments: 在两个统计不同的数据集上使用Isolation Forest、One-Class SVM和KMeans进行实验。
limitations: 混合选项仅作为未来备用，未经验证。
框架可能对诊断指标的阈值敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 方法简单，实验规模有限，贡献增量，适合快速浏览。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个轻量级决策框架，在训练前通过两个诊断指标优先选择时序或结构特征，实验表明结构特征在DDoS检测中更优。

papers.title: Where does output diversity collapse in post-training?
papers.abstract: Post-trained language models produce less varied outputs than their base counterparts. This output diversity collapse undermines inference-time scaling methods that rely on varied samples, and risks homogenizing model outputs on creative and value-laden tasks. Prior work attributes collapse to specific post-training methods, without separating the role of training data composition from the method, or the generation format from the model weights. We trace output diversity through three parallel post-training lineages of Olmo 3, Think (chain-of-thought distillation), Instruct (broad multi-source data), and RL-Zero, across 15 tasks and four text diversity metrics. We find that the location of collapse co-varies with data composition: the Think lineage loses most semantic diversity at supervised fine-tuning, and the effect of DPO is larger in Instruct than in Think. Suppressing chain-of-thought reasoning at inference in Think models drops accuracy on hard tasks, yet leaves answer-level diversity unchanged, showing that the collapse is embedded in the model weights by training data, not imposed by the generation format. Decomposing diversity loss on six verifiable tasks into a quality-control component (removal of incorrect outputs) and a residual component (genuine narrowing among correct outputs) reveals that the split is task-dependent, and Think models retain more correct-answer diversity than Instruct despite collapsing more in aggregate. Our results indicate that diversity collapse is determined during training by data composition and cannot be addressed at inference time alone.

analysis.tldr: 后训练中输出多样性的崩溃主要由训练数据组成决定，而非生成格式或推理策略。
analysis.research_motivation: 后训练语言模型输出多样性下降，影响推理时扩展方法和创意任务，但先前工作未分离数据组成、方法和格式的影响。
analysis.problem: 定位后训练中输出多样性崩溃的具体阶段和根本原因。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多样性崩溃的位置与数据组成共变：Think 系列在监督微调时语义多样性损失最大，DPO 在 Instruct 中影响更大；抑制思维链推理不影响答案多样性，表明崩溃嵌入模型权重而非生成格式；质量控制和残差成分的分解显示任务依赖性。
analysis.method: 通过三个并行后训练谱系（Think、Instruct、RL-Zero）在15个任务和4个多样性指标上追踪输出多样性，并分解多样性损失为质量控制和残差成分。
contributions: 系统性地追踪了后训练中输出多样性崩溃的位置，发现其与数据组成共变。
通过分解多样性损失揭示了任务依赖的质量控制和残差成分，表明Think模型在正确答案多样性上优于Instruct。
analysis.experiments: 在Olmo 3的三个后训练谱系（Think、Instruct、RL-Zero）上，使用15个任务和4个文本多样性指标进行实验，并在6个可验证任务上分解多样性损失。
limitations: 仅基于Olmo 3模型，可能不适用于其他架构或规模。
多样性指标可能无法完全捕捉语义多样性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法系统、实验充分，揭示了多样性崩溃的关键因素，对后训练实践有指导意义。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 后训练中输出多样性的崩溃主要由训练数据组成决定，而非生成格式或推理策略。

papers.title: AstroVLM: Expert Multi-agent Collaborative Reasoning for Astronomical Imaging Quality Diagnosis
papers.abstract: Vision Language Models (VLMs) have been applied to several specific domains and have shown strong problem-solving capabilities. However, astronomical imaging, a quite complex problem involving multidisciplinary knowledge and several subtasks, has not been adequately studied. Due to the complexity of the astronomical imaging process, both world-class astronomical organizations, such as NASA, and expert enthusiasts devote a great deal of time and effort. This is because the processes in astronomical imaging have complex underlying correlations that significantly influence one another, making the quality diagnosis and error localization of astronomical images challenging. To address this problem, we propose AstroVLM, a collaborative multi-agent system for diagnosing the quality of astronomical images. Experiment results show that AstroVLM outperforms all baselines on real-world astronomical imaging quality diagnosis tasks, providing a reference for language models to handle complicated multi-process tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出AstroVLM多智能体协作系统，用于天文图像质量诊断，在真实任务上超越基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 天文成像涉及多学科知识和多个子任务，过程复杂且子过程相互影响，导致质量诊断和错误定位困难，现有VLM研究不足。
analysis.problem: 天文图像质量诊断与错误定位的复杂多过程推理问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建协作多智能体系统AstroVLM，利用多个VLM智能体协同推理完成天文图像质量诊断。
contributions: 提出AstroVLM多智能体协作框架用于天文图像质量诊断
在真实天文成像质量诊断任务上取得优于所有基线的性能
analysis.experiments: 在真实世界天文成像质量诊断任务上评估，AstroVLM优于所有基线。
limitations: 摘要未提及泛化性到其他天文任务或数据集
未讨论多智能体协作的计算开销
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有应用价值但创新性中等，实验信息有限，适合保存后续关注。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AstroVLM多智能体协作系统，用于天文图像质量诊断，在真实任务上超越基线。

papers.title: SocialGrid: A Benchmark for Planning and Social Reasoning in Embodied Multi-Agent Systems
papers.abstract: As Large Language Models (LLMs) transition from text processors to autonomous agents, evaluating their social reasoning in embodied multi-agent settings becomes critical. We introduce SocialGrid, an embodied multi-agent environment inspired by Among Us that evaluates LLM agents on planning, task execution, and social reasoning. Our evaluations reveal that even the strongest open model (GPT-OSS-120B) achieves below 60% accuracy in task completion and planning, with agents getting stuck in repetitive behaviors or failing to navigate basic obstacles. Since poor navigation confounds evaluation of social intelligence, SocialGrid offers an optional Planning Oracle to isolate social reasoning from planning deficits. While planning assistance improves task completion, social reasoning remains a bottleneck: agents fail to detect deception at near-random chance regardless of scale, relying on shallow heuristics rather than accumulating behavioral evidence. SocialGrid provides automatic failure analysis and fine-grained metrics, enabling developers to diagnose and improve their agents. We also establish a competitive leaderboard using Elo ratings from adversarial league play.

analysis.tldr: SocialGrid 是一个评估 LLM 智能体在多智能体环境中社交推理与规划能力的基准，发现即使最强模型在社交推理上仍接近随机水平。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM 从文本处理器转向自主智能体，但缺乏在具身多智能体环境中评估其社交推理能力的标准化基准。
analysis.problem: 现有评估无法分离规划缺陷与社交推理瓶颈，导致难以诊断智能体在社交任务中的真实能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 强模型任务完成准确率低于60%，智能体易陷入重复行为或无法绕过基本障碍；社交推理是主要瓶颈，智能体检测欺骗接近随机，依赖浅层启发式而非累积行为证据。
analysis.method: 构建基于 Among Us 的具身多智能体环境 SocialGrid，提供可选规划神谕（Planning Oracle）隔离社交推理，并采用 Elo 评级进行对抗联赛。
contributions: 提出 SocialGrid 基准，用于评估 LLM 智能体的规划、任务执行和社交推理。
揭示社交推理是当前 LLM 智能体的主要瓶颈，即使规划辅助下仍表现不佳。
提供自动失败分析和细粒度指标，并建立基于 Elo 评级的排行榜。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及评估了包括 GPT-OSS-120B 在内的模型，并报告了准确率低于60%等观察。
limitations: 环境基于 Among Us，可能无法完全泛化到其他社交场景。
规划神谕的引入可能掩盖真实多任务交互中的规划挑战。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 该基准针对 LLM 智能体社交推理这一新兴方向，设计巧妙，实验揭示关键瓶颈，具有较高实用价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SocialGrid 是一个评估 LLM 智能体在多智能体环境中社交推理与规划能力的基准，发现即使最强模型在社交推理上仍接近随机水平。

papers.title: Neurosymbolic Repo-level Code Localization
papers.abstract: Code localization is a cornerstone of autonomous software engineering. Recent advancements have achieved impressive performance on real-world issue benchmarks. However, we identify a critical yet overlooked bias: these benchmarks are saturated with keyword references (e.g. file paths, function names), encouraging models to rely on superficial lexical matching rather than genuine structural reasoning. We term this phenomenon the Keyword Shortcut. To address this, we formalize the challenge of Keyword-Agnostic Logical Code Localization (KA-LCL) and introduce KA-LogicQuery, a diagnostic benchmark requiring structural reasoning without any naming hints. Our evaluation reveals a catastrophic performance drop of state-of-the-art approaches on KA-LogicQuery, exposing their lack of deterministic reasoning capabilities. We propose LogicLoc, a novel agentic framework that combines large language models with the rigorous logical reasoning of Datalog for precise localization. LogicLoc extracts program facts from the codebase and leverages an LLM to synthesize Datalog programs, with parser-gated validation and mutation-based intermediate-rule diagnostic feedback to ensure correctness and efficiency. The validated programs are executed by a high-performance inference engine, enabling accurate and verifiable localization in a fully automated, closed-loop workflow. Experimental results demonstrate that LogicLoc significantly outperforms SOTA methods on KA-LogicQuery while maintaining competitive performance on popular issue-driven benchmarks. Notably, LogicLoc attains superior performance with significantly lower token consumption and faster execution by offloading structural traversal to a deterministic engine, reducing the overhead of iterative LLM inference.

analysis.tldr: 提出神经符号框架LogicLoc，通过Datalog逻辑推理解决代码定位中的关键词捷径偏差。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有代码定位基准存在关键词引用偏差，鼓励模型依赖表面词汇匹配而非结构推理，导致真实推理能力被高估。
analysis.problem: 解决关键词无关的逻辑代码定位（KA-LCL）问题，消除命名提示对模型性能的干扰。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现基准测试中关键词引用（如文件路径、函数名）导致模型依赖词汇匹配，而非结构推理，称为关键词捷径。
analysis.method: LogicLoc框架：结合LLM与Datalog逻辑推理，提取程序事实，由LLM合成Datalog程序，经解析器门控验证和基于变异的中间规则诊断反馈，最后由高性能推理引擎执行。
contributions: 识别并形式化关键词捷径偏差，提出KA-LCL任务和KA-LogicQuery基准。
提出LogicLoc框架，融合LLM与Datalog实现精确、可验证的代码定位。
analysis.experiments: 在KA-LogicQuery和流行问题驱动基准上评估，LogicLoc在KA-LogicQuery上显著优于SOTA，在流行基准上保持竞争力，且token消耗更低、执行更快。
limitations: 依赖Datalog引擎，可能对非结构化代码库适应性有限。
LLM合成Datalog程序的质量可能受限于复杂逻辑规则。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分，对代码定位领域有重要价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出神经符号框架LogicLoc，通过Datalog逻辑推理解决代码定位中的关键词捷径偏差。

papers.title: Breakout-picker: Reducing false positives in deep learning-based borehole breakout characterization from acoustic image logs
papers.abstract: Borehole breakouts are stress-induced spalling on the borehole wall, which are identifiable in acoustic image logs as paired zones with near-symmetry azimuths, low acoustic amplitudes, and increased borehole radius. Accurate breakout characterization is crucial for in-situ stress analysis. In recent years, deep learning has been introduced to automate the time-consuming and labor-intensive breakout picking process. However, existing approaches often suffer from misclassification of non-breakout features, leading to high false positive rates. To address this limitation, this study develops a deep learning framework, termed Breakout-picker, with a specific focus on reducing false positives in automatic breakout characterization. Breakout-picker reduces false positives through two strategies. First, the training of Breakout-picker incorporates negative samples of non-breakout features, including natural fractures, keyseats, and logging artifacts. They share similar characteristics with breakouts, such as low acoustic amplitude or locally enlarged borehole radius. These negative training samples enables Breakout-picker to better discriminate true breakouts and similar non-breakout features. Second, candidate breakouts identified by Breakout-picker are further validated by azimuthal symmetry criteria, whereby detections that do not exhibit the near-symmetry characteristics of breakout azimuth are excluded. The performance of Breakout-picker is evaluated using three acoustic image log datasets from different regions. The results demonstrate that Breakout-picker outperforms other automatic methods with higher accuracy and substantially lower false positive rates. By reducing false positives, Breakout-picker enhances the reliability of automatic breakout characterization from acoustic image logs, which in turn benefits in-situ stress analysis based on borehole breakouts.

analysis.tldr: 提出Breakout-picker，通过负样本训练和方位对称性验证，降低声波图像测井中钻孔崩落自动识别的误报率。
analysis.research_motivation: 钻孔崩落识别对地应力分析至关重要，但传统深度学习自动识别方法常将非崩落特征误判为崩落，导致高误报率，影响可靠性。
analysis.problem: 如何降低深度学习在声波图像测井中自动识别钻孔崩落时的误报率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 非崩落特征（如天然裂缝、键槽、测井伪影）与崩落具有相似的低声波振幅或局部扩径特性，导致现有方法误分类。
analysis.method: 提出Breakout-picker框架，包含两个策略：1）在训练中引入非崩落特征的负样本，增强判别能力；2）对候选崩落施加方位对称性验证，排除不满足近对称方位特性的检测。
contributions: 提出一种专门降低误报率的深度学习框架Breakout-picker，用于声波图像测井中的钻孔崩落自动表征。
通过负样本训练和方位对称性验证两种策略，显著提升崩落识别准确率并降低误报率。
analysis.experiments: 使用来自不同地区的三个声波图像测井数据集进行评估，结果显示Breakout-picker在准确率和误报率上优于其他自动方法。
limitations: 可能依赖特定测井数据特征，泛化性需进一步验证。
方位对称性阈值可能需针对不同地质条件调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法针对特定地质应用，创新性和技术深度中等，但实验验证充分，对相关领域有参考价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Breakout-picker，通过负样本训练和方位对称性验证，降低声波图像测井中钻孔崩落自动识别的误报率。

papers.title: IA-CLAHE: Image-Adaptive Clip Limit Estimation for CLAHE
papers.abstract: This paper proposes image-adaptive contrast limited adaptive histogram equalization (IA-CLAHE). Conventional CLAHE is widely used to boost the performance of various computer vision tasks and to improve visual quality for human perception in practical industrial applications. CLAHE applies contrast limited histogram equalization to each local region to enhance local contrast. However, CLAHE often leads to over-enhancement, because the contrast-limiting parameter clip limit is fixed regardless of the histogram distribution of each local region. Our IA-CLAHE addresses this limitation by adaptively estimating tile-wise clip limits from the input image. To achieve this, we train a lightweight clip limits estimator with a differentiable extension of CLAHE, enabling end-to-end optimization. Unlike prior learning-based CLAHE methods, IA-CLAHE does not require pre-searched ground-truth clip limits or task-specific datasets, because it learns to map input image histograms toward a domain-invariant uniform distribution, enabling zero-shot generalization across diverse conditions. Experimental results show that IA-CLAHE consistently improves recognition performance, while simultaneously enhancing visual quality for human perception, without requiring any task-specific training data.

analysis.tldr: 提出图像自适应CLAHE，通过可微扩展训练轻量级clip限值估计器，实现零样本泛化，提升视觉质量与识别性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统CLAHE因固定clip限值导致局部过增强，影响视觉质量与下游任务性能，且现有学习方法依赖预搜索真值或任务特定数据，缺乏泛化性。
analysis.problem: 解决CLAHE中clip限值固定导致的过增强问题，实现无需任务特定数据的自适应clip限值估计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: CLAHE因固定clip限值，在直方图分布不同的局部区域易产生过增强。
analysis.method: 提出IA-CLAHE，通过可微扩展的CLAHE训练轻量级clip限值估计器，学习将输入图像直方图映射到域不变均匀分布，实现零样本泛化。
contributions: 提出图像自适应clip限值估计方法IA-CLAHE，解决CLAHE过增强问题。
设计可微CLAHE扩展，实现端到端优化，无需预搜索真值或任务特定数据集。
实验证明IA-CLAHE在提升识别性能的同时增强视觉质量，且零样本泛化。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能对极端光照或噪声图像效果有限。
轻量级估计器可能在高分辨率图像上存在性能瓶颈。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有一定创新性，但摘要缺乏实验细节，且属于图像预处理增强，非当前核心方向。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出图像自适应CLAHE，通过可微扩展训练轻量级clip限值估计器，实现零样本泛化，提升视觉质量与识别性能。

papers.title: MEDLEY-BENCH: Scale Buys Evaluation but Not Control in AI Metacognition
papers.abstract: Metacognition, the ability to monitor and regulate one's own reasoning, remains under-evaluated in AI benchmarking. We introduce MEDLEY-BENCH, a benchmark of behavioural metacognition that separates independent reasoning, private self-revision, and socially influenced revision under genuine inter-model disagreement. The benchmark evaluates 35 models from 12 families on 130 ambiguous instances across five domains and reports two complementary scores: the Medley Metacognition Score (MMS), a tier-based aggregate of reflective updating, social robustness, and epistemic articulation, and the Medley Ability Score (MAS), derived from four metacognitive sub-abilities. Results show a robust evaluation/control dissociation: evaluation ability increases with model size within families, whereas control does not. In a follow-up progressive adversarial analysis of 11 models, we observed two behavioural profiles, i.e., models that revise primarily in response to argument quality and models that track consensus statistics. Under within-model relative profiling (ipsative scoring), evaluation was the weakest relative ability in all 35 models, indicating a systematic knowing/doing gap. Smaller and cheaper models often matched or outperformed larger counterparts, suggesting that metacognitive competence is not simply a function of scale. These findings position MEDLEY-BENCH as a tool for measuring belief revision under social pressure and suggest that future training should reward calibrated, proportional updating rather than output quality alone.

analysis.tldr: MEDLEY-BENCH 基准揭示 AI 元认知中评估能力随模型规模提升，但控制能力不提升，且小模型常优于大模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 元认知（监控和调节自身推理的能力）在 AI 基准测试中尚未得到充分评估，现有方法难以分离独立推理、私下自我修正和受社会影响的修正。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个能够衡量 AI 模型在真实模型间分歧下进行行为元认知（包括独立推理、私下自我修正和受社会影响的修正）的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到评估/控制分离：评估能力随模型规模提升，但控制能力不提升；所有模型中评估是最弱的相对能力，表明存在系统的知/行差距；小模型常优于大模型。
analysis.method: 提出 MEDLEY-BENCH 基准，包含 130 个跨五个领域的模糊实例，评估 35 个模型（12 个系列），使用 Medley 元认知分数（MMS）和 Medley 能力分数（MAS）两个互补指标，并采用渐进对抗分析。
contributions: 提出 MEDLEY-BENCH，一个行为元认知基准，分离独立推理、私下自我修正和受社会影响的修正。
发现评估/控制分离现象：评估能力随规模提升，控制能力不提升，且小模型常优于大模型。
analysis.experiments: 在 35 个模型（12 个系列）上评估，包含 130 个模糊实例，跨五个领域，并进行渐进对抗分析。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 基准实例数量有限（130 个），可能不足以覆盖所有元认知场景。
主要关注行为元认知，未深入探讨内部机制。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 提出新颖的元认知基准，发现重要现象（评估/控制分离），但实验细节有限，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MEDLEY-BENCH 基准揭示 AI 元认知中评估能力随模型规模提升，但控制能力不提升，且小模型常优于大模型。

papers.title: FedOBP: Federated Optimal Brain Personalization through Cloud-Edge Element-wise Decoupling
papers.abstract: Federated Learning (FL) faces challenges from client data heterogeneity and resource-constrained mobile devices, which can degrade model accuracy. Personalized Federated Learning (PFL) addresses this issue by adapting shared global knowledge to local data distributions. A promising approach in PFL is model decoupling, which separates the model into global and personalized parameters, raising the key question of which parameters should be personalized to balance global knowledge sharing and local adaptation. In this paper, we propose a Federated Optimal Brain Personalization (FedOBP) algorithm with a quantile-based thresholding mechanism and introduce an element-wise importance score. This score extends Optimal Brain Damage (OBD) pruning theory by incorporating a federated approximation of the first-order derivative in the Taylor expansion to evaluate the importance of each parameter for personalization. Moreover, we move the metric computation originally performed on clients to the server side, to alleviate the burden on resource-constrained mobile devices. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to bridge classical saliency-based pruning theory with federated parameter decoupling, providing a rigorous theoretical justification for selecting personalized parameters based on their sensitivity to local loss landscapes. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FedOBP outperforms state-of-the-art methods across diverse datasets and heterogeneity scenarios, while requiring personalization of only a very small number of personalized parameters.

analysis.tldr: FedOBP通过量化阈值和元素级重要性评分，将最优脑损伤剪枝理论引入联邦学习参数解耦，实现高效个性化。
analysis.research_motivation: 联邦学习面临客户端数据异质性和资源受限设备挑战，现有个性化方法在全局知识共享与局部适应间平衡不足，且缺乏理论指导的参数选择机制。
analysis.problem: 如何从理论上指导并高效选择模型参数进行个性化，以在资源受限的移动设备上实现全局与局部知识的最优平衡。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出FedOBP算法，包含基于分位数的阈值机制和元素级重要性评分，该评分借鉴最优脑损伤剪枝理论，通过泰勒展开的一阶导数联邦近似评估参数重要性，并将计算从客户端迁移至服务器。
contributions: 首次将经典显著性剪枝理论与联邦参数解耦结合，为基于局部损失敏感性的个性化参数选择提供严格理论依据。
提出元素级重要性评分和分位数阈值机制，实现仅需极少量个性化参数即可超越现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 在多种数据集和异质性场景下，FedOBP优于现有方法，且仅需极少量个性化参数。
limitations: 可能依赖泰勒展开一阶近似的准确性，高阶项忽略可能影响极端异质性场景。
分位数阈值需手动设定，可能影响泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，理论结合巧妙，但实验细节有限，推荐阅读摘要。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FedOBP通过量化阈值和元素级重要性评分，将最优脑损伤剪枝理论引入联邦学习参数解耦，实现高效个性化。

papers.title: AgentV-RL: Scaling Reward Modeling with Agentic Verifier
papers.abstract: Verifiers have been demonstrated to enhance LLM reasoning via test-time scaling (TTS). Yet, they face significant challenges in complex domains. Error propagation from incorrect intermediate reasoning can lead to false positives for seemingly plausible solutions, while lacking external grounding makes verifiers unreliable on computation or knowledge-intensive tasks. To address these challenges, we propose Agentic Verifier, a framework that transforms reward modeling into a multi-turn, tool-augmented deliberative process. We introduce complementary forward and backward agents: one traces solutions from premises to conclusions, while the other re-checks conclusions against their underlying premises. This bidirectional process enables a comprehensive, reliable, and interpretable assessment of solutions. To facilitate practical deployment, we propose AgentV-RL. Through proactive exploration and reinforcement learning, the verifier autonomously interleaves tool-use with internal reasoning. Extensive experiments show that Agentic Verifier yields consistent performance gains under both parallel and sequential TTS. Notably, our 4B variant surpasses state-of-the-art ORMs by 25.2%, positioning it as a promising paradigm for agentic reward modeling.

analysis.tldr: 提出Agentic Verifier框架，将奖励建模转化为多轮工具增强的审慎过程，通过双向代理和强化学习提升LLM推理验证的可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有验证器在复杂领域面临错误传播和缺乏外部依据的问题，导致对看似合理的解决方案产生误判，尤其在计算或知识密集型任务中不可靠。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个可靠、可解释且能利用外部工具的奖励模型，以提升LLM在复杂推理任务中的测试时扩展性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 错误传播：不正确中间推理导致假阳性；缺乏外部依据：验证器在计算或知识密集型任务中不可靠。
analysis.method: 提出Agentic Verifier框架，包含前向代理（从前提追踪到结论）和后向代理（对照前提重新检查结论），形成双向审慎过程；并通过AgentV-RL方法，利用主动探索和强化学习使验证器自主结合工具使用与内部推理。
contributions: 提出Agentic Verifier框架，将奖励建模转化为多轮工具增强的审慎过程，实现全面、可靠、可解释的评估。
提出AgentV-RL方法，通过主动探索和强化学习使验证器自主结合工具使用与内部推理。
实验表明4B变体在并行和顺序TTS下均优于现有ORM，性能提升25.2%。
analysis.experiments: 在多种测试时扩展场景下进行实验，包括并行和顺序TTS，4B变体超越现有ORM 25.2%。
limitations: 可能依赖外部工具的质量和可用性。
多轮交互可能增加推理延迟。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验效果显著，与LLM推理和奖励建模方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Agentic Verifier框架，将奖励建模转化为多轮工具增强的审慎过程，通过双向代理和强化学习提升LLM推理验证的可靠性。

papers.title: Planar Gaussian Splatting with Bilinear Spatial Transformer for Wireless Radiance Field Reconstruction
papers.abstract: Wireless radiance field (WRF) reconstruction aims to learn a continuous, queryable representation of radio frequency characteristics over 3D space and direction, from which specific quantities, such as the spatial power spectrum (SPS) at a receiver given a transmitter position, can be predicted. While Gaussian splatting (GS)-based method has surpassed Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF)-based method for this task, existing adaptations largely transplant vision pipelines, limiting physical interpretability and accuracy. We introduce BiSplat-WRF, a planar GS framework that retains the expressiveness of 3D GS while removing unnecessary projections and incorporating global EM coupling and mutual scattering among primitives. Each primitive is a 2D planar Gaussian with 3D coordinates, rendered directly on the angular domain of the SPS. A bilinear spatial transformer (BST) aggregates inter-primitive relations on an angular grid and, via attention, captures long-range electromagnetic dependencies, thereby enforcing globally aware EM interactions that reflect the complex physics of the wireless environment. On spatial spectrum synthesis task, BiSplat-WRF surpasses NeRF-based and prior GS-based baselines with respect to the Structural Similarity Index (SSIM); comprehensive ablation studies validate the contribution of BST. We also provide a larger BiSplat-WRF+ variant that further increases SSIM at a higher computation cost, serving as a strong reference for future studies.

analysis.tldr: 提出平面高斯泼溅框架BiSplat-WRF，通过双线性空间变压器捕获全局电磁耦合，提升无线辐射场重建精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于高斯泼溅的无线辐射场重建方法直接移植视觉管线，缺乏物理可解释性和准确性，无法有效建模电磁波传播中的全局耦合与散射。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个兼具物理可解释性和高精度的无线辐射场重建方法，以准确预测空间功率谱。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出BiSplat-WRF框架，使用2D平面高斯作为基元，直接在角度域渲染空间功率谱；引入双线性空间变压器（BST）在角度网格上聚合基元间关系，通过注意力机制捕获长程电磁依赖。
contributions: 提出平面高斯泼溅框架BiSplat-WRF，去除不必要的投影操作并融入全局电磁耦合与互散射。
设计双线性空间变压器（BST）实现基元间长程电磁依赖建模。
在空间频谱合成任务上超越NeRF和现有GS基线，并提供更大变体BiSplat-WRF+作为强参考。
analysis.experiments: 在空间频谱合成任务上，BiSplat-WRF在SSIM指标上超越NeRF和先前GS基线，消融实验验证了BST的贡献。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: BiSplat-WRF+变体计算成本较高，可能限制实际部署。
方法仅在空间频谱合成任务上验证，未涉及其他无线辐射场应用场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较高，但属于无线通信领域，与核心关注方向（VLM/视频生成等）相关性较低，适合保存后读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出平面高斯泼溅框架BiSplat-WRF，通过双线性空间变压器捕获全局电磁耦合，提升无线辐射场重建精度。

papers.title: ReactBench: A Benchmark for Topological Reasoning in MLLMs on Chemical Reaction Diagrams
papers.abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) excel at recognizing individual visual elements and reasoning over simple linear diagrams. However, when faced with complex topological structures involving branching paths, converging flows, and cyclic dependencies, their reasoning capabilities degrade sharply, even on tasks as basic as counting endpoints. Existing benchmarks fail to probe this gap, focusing on semantic comprehension rather than structural reasoning. We introduce ReactBench, a benchmark that reveals fundamental limitations in structural reasoning through chemical reaction diagrams. These real-world scientific diagrams offer an ideal testbed because they naturally span diverse structures from linear chains to cyclic graphs, while requiring both precise local recognition and coherent global reasoning. Our benchmark comprises 1,618 expert-annotated QA pairs across four hierarchical task dimensions. Extensive evaluation across 17 MLLMs reveals a significant performance gap exceeding 30% between anchor-based tasks and holistic structural reasoning tasks. Controlled ablations confirm this bottleneck lies in reasoning, not perception. These findings expose a fundamental deficit in structural understanding and establish directions for advancing visual reasoning.

analysis.tldr: ReactBench 通过化学反应图揭示 MLLM 在拓扑结构推理上的严重缺陷，性能差距超 30%。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 MLLM 在简单线性图上表现良好，但在分支、汇聚、循环等复杂拓扑结构上推理能力急剧下降，而现有基准只关注语义理解，缺乏对结构推理的评估。
analysis.problem: MLLM 在复杂拓扑结构（如化学反应图）上的结构推理能力不足，缺乏专门的基准来量化这一缺陷。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: MLLM 在基于锚点的任务与整体结构推理任务之间存在超过 30% 的性能差距，且消融实验证实瓶颈在于推理而非感知。
analysis.method: 构建包含 1,618 个专家标注 QA 对的 ReactBench 基准，涵盖四个层次的任务维度，并评估 17 个 MLLM。
contributions: 提出 ReactBench，首个针对化学反应图拓扑结构推理的基准。
系统评估揭示 MLLM 在结构推理上的显著缺陷，并定位瓶颈为推理而非感知。
analysis.experiments: 在 17 个 MLLM 上评估，发现锚点任务与整体结构推理任务性能差距超 30%，消融实验确认推理瓶颈。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖化学反应图，可能不直接推广到其他拓扑结构领域。
未提供具体模型改进方案。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 基准设计新颖，揭示重要缺陷，但未提供解决方案，适合精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ReactBench 通过化学反应图揭示 MLLM 在拓扑结构推理上的严重缺陷，性能差距超 30%。

papers.title: From Vulnerable Data Subjects to Vulnerabilizing Data Practices: Navigating the Protection Paradox in AI-Based Analyses of Platformized Lives
papers.abstract: This paper traces a conceptual shift from understanding vulnerability as a static, essentialized property of data subjects to examining how it is actively enacted through data practices. Unlike reflexive ethical frameworks focused on missing or counter-data, we address the condition of abundance inherent to platformized life-a context where a near inexhaustible mass of data points already exists, shifting the ethical challenge to the researcher's choices in operating upon this existing mass. We argue that the ethical integrity of data science depends not just on who is studied, but on how technical pipelines transform "vulnerable" individuals into data subjects whose vulnerability can be further precarized. We develop this argument through an AI for Social Good (AI4SG) case: a journalist's request to use computer vision to quantify child presence in monetized YouTube 'family vlogs' for regulatory advocacy. This case reveals a "protection paradox": how data-driven efforts to protect vulnerable subjects can inadvertently impose new forms of computational exposure, reductionism, and extraction. Using this request as a point of departure, we perform a methodological deconstruction of the AI pipeline to show how granular technical decisions are ethically constitutive. We contribute a reflexive ethics protocol that translates these insights into a reflexive roadmap for research ethics surrounding platformized data subjects. Organized around four critical junctures-dataset design, operationalization, inference, and dissemination-the protocol identifies technical questions and ethical tensions where well-intentioned work can slide into renewed extraction or exposure. For every decision point, the protocol offers specific prompts to navigate four cross-cutting vulnerabilizing factors: exposure, monetization, narrative fixing, and algorithmic optimization. Rather than uncritically...

analysis.tldr: 论文从脆弱数据主体转向脆弱化数据实践，提出保护悖论并开发反思性伦理协议。

papers.title: In Search of Lost DNA Sequence Pretraining
papers.abstract: DNA sequence encoding is fundamental to gene function prediction, protein synthesis, and diverse downstream biological tasks. Despite the substantial progress achieved by large-scale DNA sequence pretraining, existing studies have overwhelmingly emphasized pretraining scale and custom downstream evaluation datasets, while neglecting some essential components of the pretraining paradigm. In this paper, we reveal three critical yet heretofore overlooked problems in DNA pretraining: inappropriate downstream datasets, inherent flaws in the neighbor-masking strategy, and the lack of detailed discussion on vocabulary. Therefore, we undertake comprehensive investigations and propose principled guidelines, including selection criteria for evaluation datasets, guiding task design, and in-depth vocabulary analysis. Extensive experiments validate the significance of our identified problems and support the rationale behind our recommendations. Finally, we introduce a standardized testbed that enables reproducible and rigorous benchmarking of DNA pretraining methods to advance the development of genomic foundation models.

analysis.tldr: 揭示DNA序列预训练中被忽视的三个关键问题，并提出改进指南与标准化测试平台。
analysis.research_motivation: DNA序列编码对基因功能预测等任务至关重要，但现有预训练研究过度关注规模和自定义评测，忽视了预训练范式的关键组件，导致方法评估不严谨。
analysis.problem: DNA序列预训练中存在三个被忽视的问题：不合适的下游数据集、邻域掩码策略的固有缺陷、以及词汇表设计的缺乏讨论。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有研究在预训练中忽略了数据集选择、掩码策略和词汇表设计等关键因素，导致评估结果不可靠。
analysis.method: 通过系统性实验分析问题，提出选择评估数据集的标准、指导任务设计的准则以及深入的词汇表分析，并构建标准化测试平台。
contributions: 识别并验证了DNA预训练中三个被忽视的关键问题
提出了针对数据集选择、任务设计和词汇表分析的原则性指南

papers.title: MMGait: Towards Multi-Modal Gait Recognition
papers.abstract: Gait recognition has emerged as a powerful biometric technique for identifying individuals at a distance without requiring user cooperation. Most existing methods focus primarily on RGB-derived modalities, which fall short in real-world scenarios requiring multi-modal collaboration and cross-modal retrieval. To overcome these challenges, we present MMGait, a comprehensive multi-modal gait benchmark integrating data from five heterogeneous sensors, including an RGB camera, a depth camera, an infrared camera, a LiDAR scanner, and a 4D Radar system. MMGait contains twelve modalities and 334,060 sequences from 725 subjects, enabling systematic exploration across geometric, photometric, and motion domains. Based on MMGait, we conduct extensive evaluations on single-modal, cross-modal, and multi-modal paradigms to analyze modality robustness and complementarity. Furthermore, we introduce a new task, Omni Multi-Modal Gait Recognition, which aims to unify the above three gait recognition paradigms within a single model. We also propose a simple yet powerful baseline, OmniGait, which learns a shared embedding space across diverse modalities and achieves promising recognition performance. The MMGait benchmark, codebase, and pretrained checkpoints are publicly available at https://github.com/BNU-IVC/MMGait.

analysis.tldr: 提出多模态步态识别基准MMGait和统一模型OmniGait，支持五种传感器十二种模态。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有步态识别主要依赖RGB模态，在需要多模态协作和跨模态检索的真实场景中表现不足。
analysis.problem: 缺乏涵盖多种异构传感器的多模态步态识别基准，以及统一处理单模态、跨模态和多模态识别的模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含五种传感器（RGB、深度、红外、LiDAR、4D雷达）和十二种模态的基准MMGait，并提出OmniGait基线模型，学习跨模态共享嵌入空间。
contributions: 构建了大规模多模态步态识别基准MMGait，包含334,060序列和725个主体。
提出Omni Multi-Modal Gait Recognition新任务和OmniGait基线模型，统一三种识别范式。
analysis.experiments: 在MMGait基准上对单模态、跨模态和多模态范式进行了广泛评估，分析了模态鲁棒性和互补性。
limitations: 可能未充分探索模态融合策略的优化。
OmniGait作为基线，性能可能不如更复杂的融合方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 多模态步态识别基准具有实用价值，方法简洁但贡献明确，推荐精读。

papers.title: Weak-Link Optimization for Multi-Agent Reasoning and Collaboration
papers.abstract: LLM-driven multi-agent frameworks address complex reasoning tasks through multi-role collaboration. However, existing approaches often suffer from reasoning instability, where individual agent errors are amplified through collaboration, undermining overall performance. Current research mainly focuses on enhancing high-capability agents or suppressing unreliable outputs to improve framework effectiveness, while systematic identification and reinforcement of performance-limiting agents receive less attention. To address this gap, we propose WORC, a \underline{w}eak-link \underline{o}ptimization framework for multi-agent \underline{r}easoning and \underline{c}ollaboration, grounded in the weak-link principle. WORC follows a two-stage workflow. In the weak agent localization stage, task features are constructed, and a meta-learning-based weight predictor trained on optimal configurations identified by swarm intelligence algorithms (SIAs) enables zero-shot mapping from these features to agent performance weights, where the agent with the lowest predicted weight is identified as the weak agent. In the weak-link optimization stage, an uncertainty-driven allocation strategy assigns additional reasoning budgets to weak agents, with lower predicted weights leading to larger repeated-sampling quotas to compensate for reliability deficiencies. Experimental results show that WORC achieves an average accuracy of 82.2\% on reasoning benchmarks while improving framework stability and cross-architecture generalization, suggesting that compensating for weak links, rather than reinforcing strengths alone, enhances the robustness of multi-agent systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出弱链优化框架WORC，通过定位并补偿多智能体系统中的性能瓶颈智能体来提升整体推理稳定性与准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM驱动的多智能体框架在复杂推理任务中常因个体错误通过协作被放大而导致推理不稳定，且研究多集中于增强高能力智能体或抑制不可靠输出，缺乏对性能限制性智能体的系统识别与强化。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地识别多智能体推理与协作中的弱链（性能瓶颈智能体）并对其进行针对性优化，以提升整体框架的稳定性与准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出多智能体协作中个体错误会通过协作被放大，且当前方法忽视了对限制整体性能的弱智能体的识别与补偿。
analysis.method: 提出WORC框架，包含两阶段：1) 弱智能体定位阶段：构建任务特征，用基于元学习的权重预测器（由群体智能算法找到的最优配置训练）实现零样本映射，预测各智能体性能权重，权重最低者即为弱智能体；2) 弱链优化阶段：采用不确定性驱动的分配策略，为弱智能体分配额外推理预算（重复采样配额），预测权重越低配额越大。
contributions: 提出基于弱链原理的多智能体推理与协作优化框架WORC，首次系统性地关注性能瓶颈智能体的识别与补偿。
设计元学习权重预测器实现零样本弱智能体定位，以及不确定性驱动的推理预算分配策略。
在推理基准上平均准确率达82.2%，同时提升框架稳定性和跨架构泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在推理基准上评估，平均准确率82.2%，并验证了框架稳定性和跨架构泛化能力。
limitations: 可能依赖群体智能算法生成的最优配置质量，元学习预测器在未见过的任务分布上可能泛化不足。
重复采样配额策略可能增加推理计算开销，未在摘要中讨论效率权衡。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，针对多智能体协作中的弱链问题提出系统性解决方案，实验显示有效，但摘要未提供详细对比与消融，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出弱链优化框架WORC，通过定位并补偿多智能体系统中的性能瓶颈智能体来提升整体推理稳定性与准确率。

papers.title: TwoHamsters: Benchmarking Multi-Concept Compositional Unsafety in Text-to-Image Models
papers.abstract: Despite the remarkable synthesis capabilities of text-to-image (T2I) models, safeguarding them against content violations remains a persistent challenge. Existing safety alignments primarily focus on explicit malicious concepts, often overlooking the subtle yet critical risks of compositional semantics. To address this oversight, we identify and formalize a novel vulnerability: Multi-Concept Compositional Unsafety (MCCU), where unsafe semantics stem from the implicit associations of individually benign concepts. Based on this formulation, we introduce TwoHamsters, a comprehensive benchmark comprising 17.5k prompts curated to probe MCCU vulnerabilities. Through a rigorous evaluation of 10 state-of-the-art models and 16 defense mechanisms, our analysis yields 8 pivotal insights. In particular, we demonstrate that current T2I models and defense mechanisms face severe MCCU risks: on TwoHamsters, FLUX achieves an MCCU generation success rate of 99.52%, while LLaVA-Guard only attains a recall of 41.06%, highlighting a critical limitation of the current paradigm for managing hazardous compositional generation.

analysis.tldr: 提出多概念组合不安全（MCCU）漏洞，构建17.5k提示的基准TwoHamsters，揭示当前T2I模型和防御机制在此类风险上的严重不足。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有T2I模型安全对齐主要关注显式恶意概念，忽略了组合语义中隐含的细微风险，导致安全防护存在盲区。
analysis.problem: 解决T2I模型中多概念组合不安全（MCCU）漏洞的识别与评估问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 形式化定义MCCU漏洞，并构建包含17.5k提示的基准TwoHamsters，用于系统探测该漏洞。
contributions: 首次形式化并定义多概念组合不安全（MCCU）漏洞。
构建TwoHamsters基准，包含17.5k精心设计的提示，用于评估MCCU风险。
对10个SOTA模型和16种防御机制进行系统评估，揭示严重风险。
analysis.experiments: 对10个SOTA模型和16种防御机制进行评估，FLUX的MCCU生成成功率达99.52%，LLaVA-Guard召回率仅41.06%。
limitations: 基准可能未覆盖所有组合不安全场景。
防御机制的评估可能受限于特定模型配置。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 提出新漏洞类型并构建系统基准，实验揭示严重风险，对T2I安全领域有重要价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多概念组合不安全（MCCU）漏洞，构建17.5k提示的基准TwoHamsters，揭示当前T2I模型和防御机制在此类风险上的严重不足。

papers.title: Topology-Driven Fusion of nnU-Net and MedNeXt for Accurate Brain Tumor Segmentation on Sub-Saharan Africa Dataset
papers.abstract: Accurate automatic brain tumor segmentation in Low and Middle-Income (LMIC) countries is challenging due to the lack of defined national imaging protocols, diverse imaging data, extensive use of low-field Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) scanners and limited health-care resources. As part of the Brain Tumor Segmentation (BraTS) Africa 2025 Challenge, we applied topology refinement to the state-of-the-art segmentation models like nnU-Net, MedNeXt, and a combination of both. Since the BraTS-Africa dataset has low MRI image quality, we incorporated the BraTS 2025 challenge data of pre-treatment adult glioma (Task 1) to pre-train the segmentation model and use it to fine-tune on the BraTS-Africa dataset. We added an extra topology refinement module to address the issue of deformation in prediction that arose due to topological error. With the introduction of this module, we achieved a better Normalized Surface Distance (NSD) of 0.810, 0.829, and 0.895 on Surrounding Non-Enhancing FLAIR Hyperintensity (SNFH) , Non-Enhancing Tumor Core (NETC) and Enhancing tumor (ET).

analysis.tldr: 融合nnU-Net和MedNeXt并加入拓扑细化模块，在低质量MRI数据上提升脑肿瘤分割精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 中低收入国家因缺乏标准化成像协议、多样化的成像数据、低场MRI扫描仪和有限的医疗资源，自动脑肿瘤分割面临挑战。
analysis.problem: 在低质量MRI图像上实现准确的脑肿瘤分割，特别是解决预测中的拓扑错误导致的变形问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 低场MRI图像质量差，直接分割易产生拓扑错误导致预测变形。
analysis.method: 使用BraTS 2025挑战数据预训练nnU-Net和MedNeXt模型，然后在BraTS-Africa数据集上微调，并加入拓扑细化模块修正预测中的拓扑错误。
contributions: 提出拓扑驱动的融合方法，结合nnU-Net和MedNeXt进行脑肿瘤分割。
引入拓扑细化模块有效改善低质量MRI图像上的分割拓扑错误。
analysis.experiments: 在BraTS-Africa数据集上评估，NSD指标在SNFH、NETC和ET上分别达到0.810、0.829和0.895。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练数据与目标域的相似性。
拓扑细化模块的计算开销未提及。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法融合现有模型并加入拓扑细化，在特定挑战数据集上有效，但创新性中等，实验规模有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 融合nnU-Net和MedNeXt并加入拓扑细化模块，在低质量MRI数据上提升脑肿瘤分割精度。

papers.title: Integrating Graphs, Large Language Models, and Agents: Reasoning and Retrieval
papers.abstract: Generative AI, particularly Large Language Models, increasingly integrates graph-based representations to enhance reasoning, retrieval, and structured decision-making. Despite rapid advances, there remains limited clarity regarding when, why, where, and what types of graph-LLM integrations are most appropriate across applications. This survey provides a concise, structured overview of the design choices underlying the integration of graphs with LLMs. We categorize existing methods based on their purpose (reasoning, retrieval, generation, recommendation), graph modality (knowledge graphs, scene graphs, interaction graphs, causal graphs, dependency graphs), and integration strategies (prompting, augmentation, training, or agent-based use). By mapping representative works across domains such as cybersecurity, healthcare, materials science, finance, robotics, and multimodal environments, we highlight the strengths, limitations, and best-fit scenarios for each technique. This survey aims to offer researchers a practical guide for selecting the most suitable graph-LLM approach depending on task requirements, data characteristics, and reasoning complexity.

analysis.tldr: 综述图与LLM的集成方法，按目的、图模态和集成策略分类，提供应用场景选择指南。
analysis.research_motivation: 尽管图与LLM集成发展迅速，但缺乏系统性的设计选择指南，研究者难以根据任务需求选择最合适的集成方式。
analysis.problem: 如何系统分类和评估图与LLM的集成方法，并明确不同方法的适用场景。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 对现有方法进行结构化分类，基于目的（推理、检索、生成、推荐）、图模态（知识图谱、场景图、交互图、因果图、依赖图）和集成策略（提示、增强、训练、基于Agent）进行映射，并跨领域分析优缺点。
contributions: 提出了一个统一的分类框架，涵盖目的、图模态和集成策略三个维度。
跨多个应用领域（网络安全、医疗、材料科学等）总结了不同方法的适用场景和局限性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 作为综述，未提出新的方法或实验验证。
分类可能无法覆盖所有新兴的集成方式。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 综述性工作，分类系统但缺乏实验，对LLM与图集成方向有参考价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 综述图与LLM的集成方法，按目的、图模态和集成策略分类，提供应用场景选择指南。

papers.title: From Competition to Coopetition: Coopetitive Training-Free Image Editing Based on Text Guidance
papers.abstract: Text-guided image editing, a pivotal task in modern multimedia content creation, has seen remarkable progress with training-free methods that eliminate the need for additional optimization. Despite recent progress, existing methods are typically constrained by a competitive paradigm in which the editing and reconstruction branches are independently driven by their respective objectives to maximize alignment with target and source prompts. The adversarial strategy causes semantic conflicts and unpredictable outcomes due to the lack of coordination between branches. To overcome these issues, we propose Coopetitive Training-Free Image Editing (CoEdit), a novel zero-shot framework that transforms attention control from competition to coopetitive negotiation, achieving editing harmony across spatial and temporal dimensions. Spatially, CoEdit introduces Dual-Entropy Attention Manipulation, which quantifies directional entropic interactions between branches to reformulate attention control as a harmony-maximization problem, eventually improving the localization of editable and preservable regions. Temporally, we present Entropic Latent Refinement mechanism to dynamically adjust latent representations over time, minimizing accumulated editing errors and ensuring consistent semantic transitions throughout the denoising trajectory. Additionally, we propose the Fidelity-Constrained Editing Score, a composite metric that jointly evaluates semantic editing and background fidelity. Extensive experiments on standard benchmarks demonstrate that CoEdit achieves superior performance in both editing quality and structural preservation, enhancing multimedia information utilization by enabling more effective interaction between visual and textual modalities. The code will be available at https://github.com/JinhaoShen/CoEdit.

analysis.tldr: 提出CoEdit框架，将文本引导图像编辑中的注意力控制从竞争范式转变为合作竞争范式，提升编辑质量与结构保持。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有免训练文本引导图像编辑方法采用竞争范式，编辑分支与重建分支独立优化各自目标，导致语义冲突和不可预测结果，缺乏协调性。
analysis.problem: 解决免训练图像编辑中编辑与重建分支之间的语义冲突和协调不足问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 竞争范式下编辑和重建分支缺乏协调，导致语义冲突和不可预测结果。
analysis.method: 提出CoEdit框架，包含双熵注意力操作（将注意力控制转化为和谐最大化问题）和熵潜在精炼机制（动态调整潜在表示以减少累积误差），并引入保真度约束编辑评分。
contributions: 提出合作竞争免训练图像编辑框架CoEdit，将注意力控制从竞争转变为合作竞争。
提出双熵注意力操作和熵潜在精炼机制，分别优化空间和时间维度的编辑和谐性。
提出保真度约束编辑评分，联合评估语义编辑和背景保真度。
analysis.experiments: 在标准基准上进行了大量实验，表明CoEdit在编辑质量和结构保持方面均取得优越性能。
limitations: 可能依赖特定注意力机制，泛化性需进一步验证。
未讨论计算开销或实时性。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分，与图像编辑方向高度相关，但未提供具体数值结果。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CoEdit框架，将文本引导图像编辑中的注意力控制从竞争范式转变为合作竞争范式，提升编辑质量与结构保持。

papers.title: SENSE: Stereo OpEN Vocabulary SEmantic Segmentation
papers.abstract: Open-vocabulary semantic segmentation enables models to segment objects or image regions beyond fixed class sets, offering flexibility in dynamic environments. However, existing methods often rely on single-view images and struggle with spatial precision, especially under occlusions and near object boundaries. We propose SENSE, the first work on Stereo OpEN Vocabulary SEmantic Segmentation, which leverages stereo vision and vision-language models to enhance open-vocabulary semantic segmentation. By incorporating stereo image pairs, we introduce geometric cues that improve spatial reasoning and segmentation accuracy. Trained on the PhraseStereo dataset, our approach achieves strong performance in phrase-grounded tasks and demonstrates generalization in zero-shot settings. On PhraseStereo, we show a +2.9% improvement in Average Precision over the baseline method and +0.76% over the best competing method. SENSE also provides a relative improvement of +3.5% mIoU on Cityscapes and +18% on KITTI compared to the baseline work. By jointly reasoning over semantics and geometry, SENSE supports accurate scene understanding from natural language, essential for autonomous robots and Intelligent Transportation Systems.

analysis.tldr: 首个利用立体视觉增强开放词汇语义分割的方法，在多个数据集上取得提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有开放词汇语义分割方法多依赖单视图图像，在遮挡和物体边界附近空间精度不足，限制了在动态环境中的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何利用立体视觉中的几何线索提升开放词汇语义分割的空间推理能力和精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SENSE框架，结合立体图像对和视觉-语言模型，引入几何线索以增强空间推理和分割准确性。
contributions: 首次将立体视觉引入开放词汇语义分割任务。
在PhraseStereo数据集上训练，并在零样本设置下展现泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在PhraseStereo上平均精度比基线提升2.9%，比最佳对比方法提升0.76%；在Cityscapes上mIoU相对提升3.5%，在KITTI上相对提升18%。
limitations: 可能依赖立体图像对的可用性。
在极端遮挡或纹理缺失场景下性能可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，结合立体视觉与开放词汇分割，实验提升明显，但技术细节和局限性摘要未充分说明。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个利用立体视觉增强开放词汇语义分割的方法，在多个数据集上取得提升。

papers.title: Neural Gabor Splatting: Enhanced Gaussian Splatting with Neural Gabor for High-frequency Surface Reconstruction
papers.abstract: Recent years have witnessed the rapid emergence of 3D Gaussian splatting (3DGS) as a powerful approach for 3D reconstruction and novel view synthesis. Its explicit representation with Gaussian primitives enables fast training, real-time rendering, and convenient post-processing such as editing and surface reconstruction. However, 3DGS suffers from a critical drawback: the number of primitives grows drastically for scenes with high-frequency appearance details, since each primitive can represent only a single color, requiring multiple primitives for every sharp color transition. To overcome this limitation, we propose neural Gabor splatting, which augments each Gaussian primitive with a lightweight multi-layer perceptron that models a wide range of color variations within a single primitive. To further control primitive numbers, we introduce a frequency-aware densification strategy that selects mismatch primitives for pruning and cloning based on frequency energy. Our method achieves accurate reconstruction of challenging high-frequency surfaces. We demonstrate its effectiveness through extensive experiments on both standard benchmarks, such as Mip-NeRF360 and High-Frequency datasets (e.g., checkered patterns), supported by comprehensive ablation studies.

analysis.tldr: 用轻量MLP增强高斯原胞以建模高频颜色变化，实现高效高保真表面重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）在重建高频细节场景时原胞数量急剧增长，因为每个原胞只能表示单一颜色，导致内存和计算开销大。
analysis.problem: 解决3DGS在高频表面重建中因原胞表达能力不足而需要大量原胞的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 3DGS中每个高斯原胞只能表示单一颜色，因此对于高频颜色变化（如棋盘格）需要多个原胞叠加，导致原胞数量爆炸。
analysis.method: 为每个高斯原胞附加一个轻量MLP，使其能建模原胞内的宽范围颜色变化；同时提出频率感知的稠密化策略，根据频率能量选择不匹配的原胞进行剪枝或克隆。
contributions: 提出神经Gabor泼溅，用轻量MLP增强高斯原胞以表示高频颜色变化，减少原胞数量。
提出频率感知的稠密化策略，基于频率能量控制原胞数量。
在标准和高频数据集上验证了方法对高频表面重建的准确性。
analysis.experiments: 在Mip-NeRF360和High-Frequency数据集（如棋盘格图案）上进行实验，并进行了全面的消融研究。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: MLP可能增加每个原胞的计算开销，影响实时渲染速度。
频率感知策略可能对噪声敏感，需要调参。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，针对3DGS的明显缺陷提出有效改进，实验覆盖标准和高频场景，值得精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用轻量MLP增强高斯原胞以建模高频颜色变化，实现高效高保真表面重建。

papers.title: Polarization by Default: Auditing Recommendation Bias in LLM-Based Content Curation
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed to curate and rank human-created content, yet the nature and structure of their biases in these tasks remains poorly understood: which biases are robust across providers and platforms, and which can be mitigated through prompt design. We present a controlled simulation study mapping content selection biases across three major LLM providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google) on real social media datasets from Twitter/X, Bluesky, and Reddit, using six prompting strategies (\textit{general}, \textit{popular}, \textit{engaging}, \textit{informative}, \textit{controversial}, \textit{neutral}). Through 540,000 simulated top-10 selections from pools of 100 posts across 54 experimental conditions, we find that biases differ substantially in how structural and how prompt-sensitive they are. Polarization is amplified across all configurations, toxicity handling shows a strong inversion between engagement- and information-focused prompts, and sentiment biases are predominantly negative. Provider comparisons reveal distinct trade-offs: GPT-4o Mini shows the most consistent behavior across prompts; Claude and Gemini exhibit high adaptivity in toxicity handling; Gemini shows the strongest negative sentiment preference. On Twitter/X, where author demographics can be inferred from profile bios, political leaning bias is the clearest demographic signal: left-leaning authors are systematically over-represented despite right-leaning authors forming the pool plurality in the dataset, and this pattern largely persists across prompts.

analysis.tldr: LLM在内容策展中系统性放大政治极化与负面情绪偏见，且不同模型对提示词的敏感度差异显著。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM被广泛用于内容排序，但其偏见的结构性和可缓解性尚不明确，缺乏跨平台、跨模型的系统审计。
analysis.problem: 量化LLM在内容策展中的选择偏见，区分结构性偏见与提示敏感偏见，并评估不同模型和提示策略的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 极化偏见在所有配置下被放大；毒性处理在关注参与度和信息性的提示间呈现反转；情感偏见以负面为主；政治倾向偏见中左倾作者被系统性高估。
analysis.method: 基于Twitter/X、Bluesky、Reddit的真实社交媒体数据，使用六种提示策略（通用、流行、吸引、信息、争议、中立），对三个LLM提供商（OpenAI、Anthropic、Google）进行54种实验条件下的540,000次模拟top-10选择。
contributions: 首次跨提供商、跨平台系统审计LLM在内容策展中的选择偏见
揭示偏见的结构性与提示敏感性差异，以及模型间的权衡

papers.title: Hierarchical Codec Diffusion for Video-to-Speech Generation
papers.abstract: Video-to-Speech (VTS) generation aims to synthesize speech from a silent video without auditory signals. However, existing VTS methods disregard the hierarchical nature of speech, which spans coarse speaker-aware semantics to fine-grained prosodic details. This oversight hinders direct alignment between visual and speech features at specific hierarchical levels during property matching. In this paper, leveraging the hierarchical structure of Residual Vector Quantization (RVQ)-based codec, we propose HiCoDiT, a novel Hierarchical Codec Diffusion Transformer that exploits the inherent hierarchy of discrete speech tokens to achieve strong audio-visual alignment. Specifically, since lower-level tokens encode coarse speaker-aware semantics and higher-level tokens capture fine-grained prosody, HiCoDiT employs low-level and high-level blocks to generate tokens at different levels. The low-level blocks condition on lip-synchronized motion and facial identity to capture speaker-aware content, while the high-level blocks use facial expression to modulate prosodic dynamics. Finally, to enable more effective coarse-to-fine conditioning, we propose a dual-scale adaptive instance layer normalization that jointly captures global vocal style through channel-wise normalization and local prosody dynamics through temporal-wise normalization. Extensive experiments demonstrate that HiCoDiT outperforms baselines in fidelity and expressiveness, highlighting the potential of discrete modelling for VTS. The code and speech demo are both available at https://github.com/Jiaxin-Ye/HiCoDiT.

analysis.tldr: 利用RVQ编解码器的层次结构，提出分层扩散Transformer（HiCoDiT）实现视频到语音生成，在保真度和表现力上超越基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频到语音（VTS）方法忽略了语音的层次性（从粗粒度的说话人语义到细粒度的韵律细节），导致视觉与语音特征在特定层次上难以直接对齐。

实验证明HiCoDiT在保真度和表现力上优于现有基线，并开源代码和演示。

papers.title: Making Image Editing Easier via Adaptive Task Reformulation with Agentic Executions
papers.abstract: Instruction guided image editing has advanced substantially with recent generative models, yet it still fails to produce reliable results across many seemingly simple cases. We observe that a large portion of these failures stem not from insufficient model capacity, but from poorly formulated editing tasks, such as those involving small targets, implicit spatial relations, or under-specified instructions. In this work, we frame image editing failures as a task formulation problem and propose an adaptive task reformulation framework that improves editing performance without modifying the underlying model. Our key idea is to transform the original image-instruction pair into a sequence of operations that are dynamically determined and executed by a MLLM agent through analysis, routing, reformulation, and feedback-driven refinement. Experiments on multiple benchmarks, including ImgEdit, PICA, and RePlan, across diverse editing backbones such as Qwen Image Edit and Nano Banana, show consistent improvements, with especially large gains on challenging cases. These results suggest that task reformulation is a critical but underexplored factor, and that substantial gains can be achieved by better matching editing tasks to the effective operating regime of existing models.

analysis.tldr: 通过自适应任务重公式化与MLLM智能体执行，在不修改底层模型的情况下显著提升指令引导图像编辑的可靠性。

papers.title: Reasoning on the Manifold: Bidirectional Consistency for Self-Verification in Diffusion Language Models
papers.abstract: While Diffusion Large Language Models (dLLMs) offer structural advantages for global planning, efficiently verifying that they arrive at correct answers via valid reasoning traces remains a critical challenge. In this work, we propose a geometric perspective: Reasoning on the Manifold. We hypothesize that valid generation trajectories reside as stable attractors on the high-density manifold of the learned distribution, whereas invalid paths exhibit off-manifold drift. To operationalize this, we introduce Bidirectional Manifold Consistency (BMC), a training-free, unsupervised metric that quantifies the stability of the generated sequence through a forward-masking and backward-reconstruction cycle. Empirically, we demonstrate BMC's versatility across the full reasoning lifecycle: (1) in Diagnosis, it serves as a robust discriminator of solution validity without ground truth answer; (2) in Inference, it enables rejection resampling to effectively concentrate computational resources on complex reasoning tasks; and (3) in Alignment, it functions as a dense geometric reward that transforms sparse outcome supervision into fine-grained guidance, empowering models to self-evolve beyond standard baselines. Our results establish intrinsic geometric stability as a robust indicator of correctness for dLLMs.

analysis.tldr: 提出双向流形一致性（BMC）作为扩散语言模型的无训练、无监督自验证指标，利用几何稳定性判断生成轨迹的正确性。

papers.title: Efficient Video Diffusion Models: Advancements and Challenges
papers.abstract: Video diffusion models have rapidly become the dominant paradigm for high-fidelity generative video synthesis, but their practical deployment remains constrained by severe inference costs. Compared with image generation, video synthesis compounds computation across spatial-temporal token growth and iterative denoising, making attention and memory traffic major bottlenecks in real-world settings. This survey provides a systematic and deployment-oriented review of efficient video diffusion models. We propose a unified categorization that organizes existing methods into four classes of main paradigms, including step distillation, efficient attention, model compression, and cache/trajectory optimization. Building on this categorization, we respectively analyze algorithmic trends of these four paradigms and examine how different design choices target two core objectives: reducing the number of function evaluations and minimizing per-step overhead. Finally, we discuss open challenges and future directions, including quality preservation under composite acceleration, hardware-software co-design, robust real-time long-horizon generation, and open infrastructure for standardized evaluation. To the best of our knowledge, our work is the first comprehensive survey on efficient video diffusion models, offering researchers and engineers a structured overview of the field and its emerging research directions.

papers.title: AeroDeshadow: Physics-Guided Shadow Synthesis and Penumbra-Aware Deshadowing for Aerospace Imagery
papers.abstract: Shadows are prevalent in high-resolution aerospace imagery (ASI). They often cause spectral distortion and information loss, which degrade downstream interpretation tasks. While deep learning methods have advanced natural-image shadow removal, their direct application to ASI faces two primary challenges. First, strictly paired training data are severely lacking. Second, homogeneous shadow assumptions fail to handle the broad penumbra transition zones inherent in aerospace scenes. To address these issues, we propose AeroDeshadow, a unified two-stage framework integrating physics-guided shadow synthesis and penumbra-aware restoration. In the first stage, a Physics-aware Degradation Shadow Synthesis Network (PDSS-Net) explicitly models illumination decay and spatial attenuation. This process constructs AeroDS-Syn, a large-scale paired dataset featuring soft boundary transitions. Constrained by this physical formulation, a Penumbra-aware Cascaded DeShadowing Network (PCDS-Net) then decouples the input into umbra and penumbra components. By restoring these regions progressively, PCDS-Net alleviates boundary artifacts and over-correction. Trained solely on the synthetic AeroDS-Syn, the network generalizes to real-world ASI without requiring paired real annotations. Experimental results indicate that AeroDeshadow achieves state-of-the-art quantitative accuracy and visual fidelity across synthetic and real-world datasets. The datasets and code will be made publicly available at: https://github.com/AeroVILab-AHU/AeroDeshadow.

papers.title: Towards Rigorous Explainability by Feature Attribution
papers.abstract: For around a decade, non-symbolic methods have been the option of choice when explaining complex machine learning (ML) models. Unfortunately, such methods lack rigor and can mislead human decision-makers. In high-stakes uses of ML, the lack of rigor is especially problematic. One prime example of provable lack of rigor is the adoption of Shapley values in explainable artificial intelligence (XAI), with the tool SHAP being a ubiquitous example. This paper overviews the ongoing efforts towards using rigorous symbolic methods of XAI as an alternative to non-rigorous non-symbolic approaches, concretely for assigning relative feature importance.

papers.title: Classification of systolic murmurs in heart sounds using multiresolution complex Gabor dictionary and vision transformer
papers.abstract: Systolic murmurs are extra heart sounds that occur during the contraction phase of the cardiac cycle, often indicating heart abnormalities caused by turbulent blood flow. Their intensity, pitch, and quality vary, requiring precise identification for the accurate diagnosis of cardiac disorders. This study presents an automatic classification system for systolic murmurs using a feature extraction module, followed by a classification model. The feature extraction module employs complex orthogonal matching pursuit to project single or multiple murmur segments onto a redundant dictionary composed of multiresolution complex Gabor basis functions (GBFs). The resulting projection weights are split and reshaped into variable-resolution time--frequency feature matrices. Processing multiple segments of a single recording using a shared dictionary mitigates murmur variability. This is achieved by learning the weights for each segment while enforcing that they correspond to the same set of basis functions in the dictionary, promoting consistent time--frequency feature matrices. The classification model is built based on a vision transformer to process multiple input matrices of different resolutions by passing each through a convolutional neural network for patch tokenization. All embedding tokens are then concatenated to form a matrix and forwarded to an encoder layer that includes multihead attention, residual connections, and a convolutional network with a kernel size of one. This integration of multiresolution feature extraction with transformer-based feature classification enhances the accuracy and reliability of heart murmur identification. An experimental analysis of four types of systolic murmurs from the CirCor DigiScope dataset demonstrates the effectiveness of the system, achieving a classification accuracy of $95.96\%$.
