analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出全GPU加速的配置交互选择框架，突破NNQS-SCI方法的CPU-GPU混合架构瓶颈，实现更大规模系统的高效求解。

papers.title: When Do Early-Exit Networks Generalize? A PAC-Bayesian Theory of Adaptive Depth
papers.abstract: Early-exit neural networks enable adaptive computation by allowing confident predictions to exit at intermediate layers, achieving 2-8$\times$ inference speedup. Despite widespread deployment, their generalization properties lack theoretical understanding -- a gap explicitly identified in recent surveys. This paper establishes a unified PAC-Bayesian framework for adaptive-depth networks. (1) Novel Entropy-Based Bounds: We prove the first generalization bounds depending on exit-depth entropy $H(D)$ and expected depth $\mathbb{E}[D]$ rather than maximum depth $K$, with sample complexity $\mathcal{O}((\mathbb{E}[D] \cdot d + H(D))/ε^2)$. (2) Explicit Constructive Constants: Our analysis yields the leading coefficient $\sqrt{2\ln 2} \approx 1.177$ with complete derivation. (3) Provable Early-Exit Advantages: We establish sufficient conditions under which adaptive-depth networks strictly outperform fixed-depth counterparts. (4) Extension to Approximate Label Independence: We relax the label-independence assumption to $ε$-approximate policies, broadening applicability to learned routing. (5) Comprehensive Validation: Experiments across 6 architectures on 7 benchmarks demonstrate tightness ratios of 1.52-3.87$\times$ (all $p < 0.001$) versus $>$100$\times$ for classical bounds. Bound-guided threshold selection matches validation-tuned performance within 0.1-0.3%.

analysis.tldr: 首次为自适应深度网络建立PAC-Bayesian泛化界，证明基于熵和期望深度的样本复杂度优于最大深度。
analysis.research_motivation: 早期退出网络虽广泛部署，但其泛化性质缺乏理论理解，近期综述明确指出了这一空白。
analysis.problem: 缺乏自适应深度网络的泛化理论，现有界依赖最大深度，无法解释早期退出带来的优势。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 建立统一的PAC-Bayesian框架，推导基于退出深度熵和期望深度的泛化界，并放宽标签独立性假设。
contributions: 首次证明依赖退出深度熵和期望深度的泛化界，样本复杂度为O((E[D]·d + H(D))/ε²)。
给出显式构造常数√(2ln2)≈1.177及完整推导。
建立自适应深度网络严格优于固定深度网络的充分条件。
将理论扩展至ε-近似标签独立策略，适用于学习路由。
analysis.experiments: 在7个基准上使用6种架构验证，紧致比1.52-3.87倍（p<0.001），经典界>100倍；界引导的阈值选择与验证调优性能差距0.1-0.3%。
limitations: 理论假设可能不完全适用于所有实际路由策略。
实验仅覆盖部分架构和基准，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning theory
analysis.reason: 理论创新强，实验验证充分，但主题与当前重点方向（VLM/生成等）相关性中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首次为自适应深度网络建立PAC-Bayesian泛化界，证明基于熵和期望深度的样本复杂度优于最大深度。

papers.title: KWBench: Measuring Unprompted Problem Recognition in Knowledge Work
papers.abstract: We introduce the first version of KWBench (Knowledge Work Bench), a benchmark for unprompted problem recognition in large language models: can an LLM identify a professional scenario before attempting to solve it. Existing frontier benchmarks have saturated, and most knowledge-work evaluations to date reduce to extraction or task completion against a specification. KWBench targets the step before that: recognizing the governing structure of the situation from raw inputs alone. The benchmark contains 223 tasks sourced from practitioners across acquisitions, contract negotiations, clinical pharmacy, organizational politics, fraud analysis, and incentive design. Each task encodes a formal game-theoretic pattern (principal-agent conflict, signaling, mechanism design failure, strategic omission, coalitional dynamics, strategic interdependence) and carries structured ground truth recording the expert reading of the situation and the anticipated failure modes. Models receive raw data and a task prompt with no indication of problem type. Scoring is a three-tier rubric gated by a mandatory conjunctive check. Mandatory criteria encode the predicted wrong paths. We evaluate 16 models. The best model passes on 27.9% of tasks. The top two models agree on only 31.7% of their passes. Among the top 8, 44 tasks are solved by exactly one model; routing across the top 8 covers 50.7% of the benchmark, nearly double the best single model. Conditional on passing, quality scores converge (approx 83% across models); unconditional scores do not. Same models articulate the relevant game-theoretic concept correctly when asked, then fail to apply it unprompted. We release KWBench to shift how frontier models are evaluated on knowledge work, scoring them on whether they recognize the right problem from the situation alone, not only on how well they execute once the problem has been framed for them.

analysis.tldr: 提出KWBench基准，测试大模型在无提示下识别知识工作场景问题的能力，发现当前模型表现有限且存在识别与执行脱节。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有前沿基准已饱和，多数知识工作评估仅关注信息提取或按规范完成任务，忽略了问题识别这一关键前置步骤。
analysis.problem: 大语言模型能否在无提示条件下，仅从原始输入中识别出专业场景的底层结构（如博弈论模式）并预测失败模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 最佳模型仅通过27.9%的任务；前两名模型通过任务的重合率仅31.7%；前8名中44个任务仅被单一模型解决；模型在明确询问时能正确阐述相关博弈概念，但在无提示时无法应用。
analysis.method: 构建包含223个任务的基准，每个任务编码一个形式化博弈模式（如委托-代理冲突、信号传递等），提供原始数据和任务提示（不指明问题类型），采用三级评分体系（含强制性合取检查）。
contributions: 首次提出针对无提示问题识别能力的知识工作基准KWBench
揭示当前模型在问题识别与执行能力之间的显著脱节
analysis.experiments: 评估16个模型，最佳模型通过27.9%的任务；前两名模型通过任务重合率31.7%；前8名中44个任务仅被单一模型解决；路由策略覆盖50.7%的基准。
limitations: 基准规模有限（223个任务），可能无法覆盖所有知识工作场景
评分体系依赖专家标注，可能存在主观偏差
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 基准设计新颖，聚焦问题识别这一被忽视的能力，实验揭示模型关键缺陷，对评估前沿模型有重要价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出KWBench基准，测试大模型在无提示下识别知识工作场景问题的能力，发现当前模型表现有限且存在识别与执行脱节。

papers.title: TTL: Test-time Textual Learning for OOD Detection with Pretrained Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) such as CLIP exhibit strong Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection capabilities by aligning visual and textual representations. Recent CLIP-based test-time adaptation methods further improve detection performance by incorporating external OOD labels. However, such labels are finite and fixed, while the real OOD semantic space is inherently open-ended. Consequently, fixed labels fail to represent the diverse and evolving OOD semantics encountered in test streams. To address this limitation, we introduce Test-time Textual Learning (TTL), a framework that dynamically learns OOD textual semantics from unlabeled test streams, without relying on external OOD labels. TTL updates learnable prompts using pseudo-labeled test samples to capture emerging OOD knowledge. To suppress noise introduced by pseudo-labels, we introduce an OOD knowledge purification strategy that selects reliable OOD samples for adaptation while suppressing noise. In addition, TTL maintains an OOD Textual Knowledge Bank that stores high-quality textual features, providing stable score calibration across batches. Extensive experiments on two standard benchmarks with nine OOD datasets demonstrate that TTL consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance, highlighting the value of textual adaptation for robust test-time OOD detection. Our code is available at https://github.com/figec/TTL.

analysis.tldr: TTL通过测试时文本学习动态捕获OOD语义，无需外部标签，显著提升CLIP的OOD检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有CLIP测试时自适应方法依赖固定外部OOD标签，无法覆盖开放且动态变化的真实OOD语义空间，限制了检测性能。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖外部OOD标签的情况下，从无标签测试流中动态学习OOD文本语义以提升检测鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 固定OOD标签无法表示开放世界中多样且演变的OOD语义，导致检测性能受限。
analysis.method: 提出TTL框架，利用伪标签测试样本更新可学习提示以捕获新兴OOD知识；引入OOD知识净化策略抑制伪标签噪声；维护OOD文本知识库以提供稳定的分数校准。
contributions: 提出无需外部OOD标签的测试时文本学习方法TTL，动态学习OOD语义。
设计OOD知识净化策略和文本知识库，有效抑制伪标签噪声并实现跨批次稳定校准。
analysis.experiments: 在两个标准基准上使用九个OOD数据集进行实验，TTL持续达到最先进性能。
limitations: 伪标签质量可能影响学习效果，尤其在OOD样本分布复杂时。
知识库的维护可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验充分，与VLM和OOD检测方向高度相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TTL通过测试时文本学习动态捕获OOD语义，无需外部标签，显著提升CLIP的OOD检测性能。

papers.title: An Interpretable Framework Applying Protein Words to Predict Protein-Small Molecule Complementary Pairing Rules
papers.abstract: Despite the high accuracy of 'black box' deep learning models, drug discovery still relies on protein-ligand interaction principles and heuristics. To improve interpretability of protein-small molecule binding predictions, we developed the PWRules framework, which applies binding affinity data to identify privileged small molecule fragments and subsequently defines complementary pairing rules between these fragments and protein words (semantic sequence units) through an interpretability module. The resulting word-fragment rules are then ranked by the PWScore function to prioritize active compounds. Evaluations on benchmark datasets show that PWScore achieves competitive performance comparable to the physics-based model (Glide) and the deep learning model (PSICHIC) and shows broad applicability for protein targets outside the training dataset, e.g., SARS-CoV-2 main protease. Notably, PWScore captures complementary interaction information, yielding superior enrichment performance when integrated with these established methods. Structural analysis of protein-ligand complexes indicates that learned word-fragment rules are significantly enriched near ligand-binding pockets, despite training without explicit structural guidance. By extracting and applying complementary pairing rules, PWRules provides an interpretable framework for drug discovery.

analysis.tldr: 提出PWRules框架，通过可解释的蛋白词-片段互补配对规则实现药物发现，性能与物理模型和深度学习模型相当。
analysis.research_motivation: 黑盒深度学习模型虽准确率高，但缺乏可解释性，药物发现仍依赖蛋白-配体相互作用原理和启发式规则，亟需可解释的预测框架。
analysis.problem: 如何构建可解释的蛋白-小分子结合预测模型，并提取互补配对规则。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: PWRules框架：利用结合亲和力数据识别优势小分子片段，通过可解释性模块定义片段与蛋白词（语义序列单元）的互补配对规则，并用PWScore函数排序规则以优先筛选活性化合物。
contributions: 提出PWRules框架，从数据中提取可解释的蛋白词-片段互补配对规则。
PWScore在基准数据集上达到与物理模型Glide和深度学习模型PSICHIC相当的竞争性能，并具有广泛适用性。
规则显著富集于配体结合口袋附近，无需结构先验知识。
analysis.experiments: 在基准数据集上评估PWScore，与Glide和PSICHIC比较，并在SARS-CoV-2主蛋白酶等外部靶点上验证泛化能力；通过结构分析验证规则富集于结合口袋。
limitations: 可能依赖训练数据的覆盖范围，对新靶点规则发现能力有限。
PWScore性能虽好，但未提及与最先进方法的全面对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，可解释性强，实验较充分，但应用领域非核心方向。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PWRules框架，通过可解释的蛋白词-片段互补配对规则实现药物发现，性能与物理模型和深度学习模型相当。

papers.title: DepCap: Adaptive Block-Wise Parallel Decoding for Efficient Diffusion LM Inference
papers.abstract: Diffusion language models (DLMs) have emerged as a promising alternative to autoregressive language generation due to their potential for parallel decoding and global refinement of the entire sequence. To unlock this potential, DLM inference must carefully balance generation quality and decoding speed. Recent block-wise DLM decoding methods improve this trade-off by performing diffusion-based decoding sequentially in blocks. However, existing methods typically rely on fixed block schedules or current-step local signals to determine block boundaries, and use conservative confidence-based parallel decoding to avoid conflicts, limiting the quality-speed trade-off. In this paper, we argue that block-wise DLM inference requires more suitable signals for its two core decisions: cross-step signals for determining block boundaries, and token-level conflict signals for parallel decoding. Based on this view, we propose DepCap, a training-free framework for efficient block-wise DLM inference. Specifically, DepCap instantiates the cross-step signal as the influence of the last decoded block and uses it to adaptively determine how far the next block should extend, while identifying a conflict-free subset of tokens for safe parallel decoding within each block, enabling substantial inference acceleration with negligible quality degradation. DepCap is a plug-and-play method applicable to various DLMs, and compatible with existing KV-cache strategies for block-wise DLM. An information-theoretic analysis further suggests that the cumulative last-block influence on a candidate block is approximately additive across tokens, supporting the proposed block-partitioning criterion. Experimental results show that DepCap achieves favorable speed-quality trade-offs across multiple DLM backbones and reasoning and coding benchmarks, with up to 5.63$\times$ speedup without significant performance degradation.

analysis.tldr: DepCap通过自适应块划分和冲突感知并行解码，在不牺牲质量的前提下显著加速扩散语言模型推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散语言模型（DLM）具有并行解码和全局优化的潜力，但现有块式解码方法依赖固定调度或局部信号，限制了速度与质量的平衡。
analysis.problem: 如何为块式DLM推理设计更合适的跨步信号和令牌级冲突信号，以实现自适应块划分和安全并行解码。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出DepCap框架，利用上一解码块的影响作为跨步信号自适应确定下一块边界，并识别无冲突令牌子集进行安全并行解码。
contributions: 提出训练无关的DepCap框架，实现自适应块划分和冲突感知并行解码。
信息论分析表明累积上一块影响近似可加，支持块划分准则。
在多个DLM骨干和推理/编码基准上实现高达5.63倍加速且性能无明显下降。
analysis.experiments: 在多个DLM骨干和推理/编码基准上测试，实现高达5.63倍加速且性能无明显下降。
limitations: 可能依赖特定DLM架构的兼容性。
自适应块划分的额外计算开销未详细讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验充分，加速效果显著，与LLM推理效率方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DepCap通过自适应块划分和冲突感知并行解码，在不牺牲质量的前提下显著加速扩散语言模型推理。

papers.title: A Randomized PDE Energy driven Iterative Framework for Efficient and Stable PDE Solutions
papers.abstract: Efficient and stable solution of partial differential equations (PDEs) is central to scientific and engineering applications, yet existing numerical solvers rely heavily on matrix based discretizations, while learning based methods require costly training and often suffer from limited generalization. In this work, we proposes a PDE energy driven framework that solves PDEs through physically constrained diffusion iterations, without relying on classical matrix based finite element assembly or data driven neural network training. The proposed method evolves arbitrary random initial fields through PDE energy driven implicit iterations combined with Gaussian smoothing, while strictly enforcing boundary conditions at each iteration. The proposed formulation is applied to representative one dimensional Poisson, Heat, and viscous Burgers equations, covering both steady state and transient problems. Numerical results demonstrate stable convergence to the unique physical solution from random initializations, with accurate resolution of sharp gradients and controlled Mean Squared Error (MSE) across a wide range of discretization parameters. Detailed comparisons with analytical solutions indicate that the framework achieves competitive accuracy and stability. Overall, the proposed framework provides a fast, flexible, and physically consistent alternative to traditional numerical solvers, offering a potential pathway for scalable PDE solutions in both research and engineering applications.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于PDE能量的迭代框架，通过物理约束扩散迭代求解PDE，无需矩阵离散或神经网络训练。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统数值求解器依赖矩阵离散化，学习型方法需要昂贵训练且泛化有限，亟需一种高效、稳定且物理一致的替代方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖矩阵离散或数据驱动训练的情况下，高效稳定地求解偏微分方程。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出PDE能量驱动的隐式迭代框架，结合高斯平滑和严格边界条件，从随机初始场演化至物理解。
contributions: 提出一种无需矩阵离散或神经网络训练的PDE求解框架。
在多种一维PDE上验证了稳定收敛和竞争精度。
analysis.experiments: 在一维Poisson、Heat和粘性Burgers方程上测试，涵盖稳态和瞬态问题，与解析解对比，展示了稳定收敛和可控MSE。
limitations: 仅在一维问题上验证，高维和复杂几何的适用性未知。
与最先进数值求解器的效率对比未详细说明。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.reason: 方法有一定新意，但实验仅限一维，影响和相关性中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于PDE能量的迭代框架，通过物理约束扩散迭代求解PDE，无需矩阵离散或神经网络训练。

papers.title: Concept-wise Attention for Fine-grained Concept Bottleneck Models
papers.abstract: Recently impressive performance has been achieved in Concept Bottleneck Models (CBM) by utilizing the image-text alignment learned by a large pre-trained vision-language model (i.e. CLIP). However, there exist two key limitations in concept modeling. Existing methods often suffer from pre-training biases, manifested as granularity misalignment or reliance on structural priors. Moreover, fine-tuning with Binary Cross-Entropy (BCE) loss treats each concept independently, which ignores mutual exclusivity among concepts, leading to suboptimal alignment. To address these limitations, we propose Concept-wise Attention for Fine-grained Concept Bottleneck Models (CoAt-CBM), a novel framework that achieves adaptive fine-grained image-concept alignment and high interpretability. Specifically, CoAt-CBM employs learnable concept-wise visual queries to adaptively obtain fine-grained concept-wise visual embeddings, which are then used to produce a concept score vector. Then, a novel concept contrastive optimization guides the model to handle the relative importance of the concept scores, enabling concept predictions to faithfully reflect the image content and improved alignment. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CoAt-CBM consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods. The codes will be available upon acceptance.

analysis.tldr: 提出概念级注意力机制，实现细粒度概念瓶颈模型的自适应对齐与互斥性优化。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有概念瓶颈模型（CBM）依赖预训练视觉-语言模型（如CLIP）存在粒度错配和结构先验偏差，且独立优化每个概念忽略了概念间的互斥性，导致对齐次优。
analysis.problem: 解决CBM中概念建模的粒度错配、预训练偏差以及概念间互斥性被忽略的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出：1）预训练模型存在粒度错配或结构先验依赖；2）BCE损失独立处理每个概念，忽视概念间的互斥性，导致对齐不理想。
analysis.method: 提出CoAt-CBM框架，使用可学习的概念级视觉查询自适应获取细粒度概念视觉嵌入，并设计概念对比优化损失以处理概念分数的相对重要性。
contributions: 提出概念级注意力机制实现自适应细粒度图像-概念对齐
设计概念对比优化损失，显式建模概念间的互斥性，提升对齐质量
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练CLIP的表示能力，在领域偏移下泛化性未知
概念对比优化的计算开销可能较大
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较高（概念级注意力+对比优化），但摘要未提供实验细节，影响评分保守。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出概念级注意力机制，实现细粒度概念瓶颈模型的自适应对齐与互斥性优化。

papers.title: Learning Uncertainty from Sequential Internal Dispersion in Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Uncertainty estimation is a promising approach to detect hallucinations in large language models (LLMs). Recent approaches commonly depend on model internal states to estimate uncertainty. However, they suffer from strict assumptions on how hidden states should evolve across layers, and from information loss by solely focusing on last or mean tokens. To address these issues, we present Sequential Internal Variance Representation (SIVR), a supervised hallucination detection framework that leverages token-wise, layer-wise features derived from hidden states. SIVR adopts a more basic assumption that uncertainty manifests in the degree of dispersion or variance of internal representations across layers, rather than relying on specific assumptions, which makes the method model and task agnostic. It additionally aggregates the full sequence of per-token variance features, learning temporal patterns indicative of factual errors and thereby preventing information loss. Experimental results demonstrate SIVR consistently outperforms strong baselines. Most importantly, SIVR enjoys stronger generalisation and avoids relying on large training sets, highlighting the potential for practical deployment. Our code repository is available online at https://github.com/ponhvoan/internal-variance.

analysis.tldr: 提出SIVR框架，利用LLM内部表示的逐层方差和序列聚合来检测幻觉，无需严格假设且泛化性强。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于模型内部状态的不确定性估计方法对隐藏状态在层间的演化有严格假设，且仅关注最后或平均token导致信息损失，限制了幻觉检测的通用性和效果。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种模型无关、任务无关的幻觉检测方法，避免严格假设和信息损失，同时具备强泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出不确定性体现在内部表示在层间的离散程度（方差），而非特定演化模式；且序列中每个token的方差特征包含时间模式，可指示事实错误。
analysis.method: SIVR（Sequential Internal Variance Representation）：从隐藏状态中提取逐token、逐层的方差特征，并聚合整个序列的方差特征，学习指示事实错误的时间模式，用于监督式幻觉检测。
contributions: 提出一种基于内部表示方差的无严格假设的幻觉检测方法，模型和任务无关。
通过聚合全序列的逐token方差特征，避免信息损失，提升检测性能。
实验表明SIVR持续优于强基线，且泛化性强，无需大量训练数据。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及SIVR持续优于强基线，且泛化性强。
limitations: 可能依赖特定层或token的方差特征选择，需进一步验证鲁棒性。
监督学习框架需要标注数据，尽管所需数据量小。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实用，针对LLM幻觉检测痛点，实验显示强泛化性，与安全对齐方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SIVR框架，利用LLM内部表示的逐层方差和序列聚合来检测幻觉，无需严格假设且泛化性强。

papers.title: A Survey on the Security of Long-Term Memory in LLM Agents: Toward Mnemonic Sovereignty
papers.abstract: Research on large language model (LLM) security is shifting from "will the model leak training data" to a more consequential question: can an agent with persistent, long-term memory be continuously shaped, cross-session poisoned, accessed without authorization, and propagated across shared organizational state? Recent surveys cover memory architectures and agent mechanisms, but fewer center the epistemic and governance properties of persistent, writable memory as the reason memory is an independent security problem. This survey addresses that gap. Drawing on cognitive neuroscience and the philosophy of memory, we characterize agent memory as malleable, rewritable, and socially propagating, and develop a memory-lifecycle framework organized around six phases -- Write, Store, Retrieve, Execute, Share, Forget/Rollback -- cross-tabulated against four security objectives: integrity, confidentiality, availability, governance. We organize the literature on memory poisoning, extraction, retrieval corruption, control-flow hijacking, cross-agent propagation, rollback, and governance, and situate representative architectures as determinants of which phases are explicitly governable. Three findings stand out: the literature concentrates on write- and retrieve-time integrity attacks, while confidentiality, availability, store/forget, and benign-persistence failures remain sparsely studied; no published architecture covers all nine governance primitives we identify; and using LLMs themselves for memory security remains sparse yet essential. We unify these under mnemonic sovereignty -- verifiable, recoverable governance over what may be written, who may read, when updates are authorized, and which states may be forgotten -- arguing future secure agents will be differentiated not only by recall capacity, but by memory governance quality.

analysis.tldr: 综述LLM智能体长期记忆的安全问题，提出记忆主权概念和生命周期框架。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究多关注记忆架构和机制，但忽视了持久、可写记忆作为独立安全问题的认知和治理属性。
analysis.problem: LLM智能体长期记忆面临跨会话投毒、未授权访问、跨智能体传播等安全威胁，缺乏系统性的安全分析框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 文献集中在写入和检索时的完整性攻击，而机密性、可用性、存储/遗忘及良性持久性失败研究不足；没有已发表的架构覆盖所有九种治理原语；利用LLM自身进行记忆安全的研究稀疏但必要。
analysis.method: 基于认知神经科学和记忆哲学，提出记忆生命周期框架（写、存、取、执行、共享、遗忘/回滚）与四个安全目标（完整性、机密性、可用性、治理）的交叉表，并以此组织文献。
contributions: 提出记忆生命周期框架，系统分类LLM智能体长期记忆的安全威胁与防御。
引入“记忆主权”概念，强调可验证、可恢复的治理能力。
识别出三个关键研究空白：机密性/可用性/存储遗忘攻击、完整治理原语覆盖、LLM自身用于记忆安全。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 综述性质，未提出新方法或进行实验验证。
框架可能无法覆盖所有新兴攻击类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 系统综述填补了LLM智能体长期记忆安全的研究空白，框架清晰，但无实验验证。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 综述LLM智能体长期记忆的安全问题，提出记忆主权概念和生命周期框架。

papers.title: RefereeBench: Are Video MLLMs Ready to be Multi-Sport Referees
papers.abstract: While Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) excel at generic video understanding, their ability to support specialized, rule-grounded decision-making remains insufficiently explored. In this paper, we introduce RefereeBench, the first large-scale benchmark for evaluating MLLMs as automatic sports referees. Spanning 11 sports with 925 curated videos and 6,475 QA pairs, RefereeBench evaluates five core officiating abilities: foul existence, foul and penalty classification, foul and penalty reasoning, entity perception, and temporal grounding. The benchmark is fully human-annotated to ensure high-quality annotations grounded in authentic officiating logic and multimodal evidence. Extensive evaluations of state-of-the-art MLLMs show that even the strongest models, such as Doubao-Seed-1.8 and Gemini-3-Pro, achieve only around 60% accuracy, while the strongest open-source model, Qwen3-VL, reaches only 47%. These results indicate that current models remain far from being reliable sports referees. Further analysis shows that while models can often identify incidents and involved entities, they struggle with rule application and temporal grounding, and frequently over-call fouls on normal clips. Our benchmark highlights the need for future MLLMs that better integrate domain knowledge and multimodal understanding, advancing trustworthy AI-assisted officiating and broader multimodal decision-making.

analysis.tldr: 首个多运动裁判基准测试RefereeBench显示，最强视频MLLM裁判准确率仅约60%，远未达到可靠水平。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频MLLM在通用视频理解上表现优异，但缺乏对规则驱动、专业决策能力的系统性评估，阻碍了AI辅助裁判等可信应用的发展。
analysis.problem: 评估视频MLLM在体育裁判场景中基于规则的多模态决策能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型能识别事件和实体，但在规则应用、时间定位上表现差，且频繁对正常片段误判犯规。
analysis.method: 构建包含11个运动项目、925个视频和6475个QA对的基准，覆盖犯规存在性、分类、推理、实体感知和时间定位五种裁判能力，全部人工标注。
contributions: 首个大规模多运动裁判基准RefereeBench
系统评估揭示当前MLLM在规则应用和时间定位上的不足
analysis.experiments: 评估多个SOTA MLLM，最强模型Doubao-Seed-1.8和Gemini-3-Pro准确率约60%，开源最强Qwen3-VL仅47%。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖11种运动，可能不全面
未提供模型在特定运动上的细粒度分析

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个多运动裁判基准测试RefereeBench显示，最强视频MLLM裁判准确率仅约60%，远未达到可靠水平。

papers.title: Sketch and Text Synergy: Fusing Structural Contours and Descriptive Attributes for Fine-Grained Image Retrieval
papers.abstract: Fine-grained image retrieval via hand-drawn sketches or textual descriptions remains a critical challenge due to inherent modality gaps. While hand-drawn sketches capture complex structural contours, they lack color and texture, which text effectively provides despite omitting spatial contours. Motivated by the complementary nature of these modalities, we propose the Sketch and Text Based Image Retrieval (STBIR) framework. By synergizing the rich color and texture cues from text with the structural outlines provided by sketches, STBIR achieves superior fine-grained retrieval performance. First, a curriculum learning driven robustness enhancement module is proposed to enhance the model's robustness when handling queries of varying quality. Second, we introduce a category-knowledge-based feature space optimization module, thereby significantly boosting the model's representational power. Finally, we design a multi-stage cross-modal feature alignment mechanism to effectively mitigate the challenges of cross modal feature alignment. Furthermore, we curate the fine-grained STBIR benchmark dataset to rigorously validate the efficacy of our proposed framework and to provide data support as a reference for subsequent related research. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed STBIR framework significantly outperforms state of the art methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出STBIR框架，融合手绘草图的结构轮廓与文本的颜色纹理描述，实现细粒度图像检索。
analysis.research_motivation: 手绘草图缺乏颜色纹理，文本缺少空间轮廓，两者互补但现有方法未有效融合，导致细粒度检索性能受限。
analysis.problem: 如何有效融合草图的结构轮廓和文本的语义属性，实现跨模态细粒度图像检索。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出STBIR框架，包含课程学习驱动的鲁棒性增强模块、基于类别知识的特征空间优化模块和多阶段跨模态特征对齐机制。
contributions: 提出STBIR框架，融合草图和文本进行细粒度图像检索。
设计课程学习鲁棒性增强、类别知识特征优化和多阶段跨模态对齐三个模块。
构建细粒度STBIR基准数据集。
analysis.experiments: 在自建基准数据集上实验，STBIR显著优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量草图输入。

papers.title: A B-Spline Function Based 3D Point Cloud Unwrapping Scheme for 3D Fingerprint Recognition and Identification
papers.abstract: Three-dimensional (3D) fingerprint recognition and identification offer several advantages over traditional two-dimensional (2D) recognition systems. The contactless nature of 3D fingerprints enhances hygiene and security, reducing the risk of contamination and spoofing. In addition to surface ridge and valley patterns, 3D fingerprints capture depth, curvature, and shape information, enabling the development of more precise and robust authentication systems. Despite recent advancements, significant challenges remain. The topological height of fingerprint pixels complicates the extraction of ridge and valley patterns. Furthermore, registration issues limit the acquisition process, requiring consistent direction and orientation across all samples. To address these challenges, this paper introduces a method that unwraps 3D fingerprints, represented as 3D point clouds, using B-spline curve fitting to mitigate height variation and reduce registration limitations. The unwrapped point cloud is then converted into a grayscale image by mapping the relative heights of the points. This grayscale image is subsequently used for recognition through conventional 2D fingerprint identification methods. The proposed approach demonstrated superior performance in 3D fingerprint recognition, achieving Equal Error Rates (EERs) of 0.2072%, 0.26%, and 0.22% across three experiments, outperforming existing methods. Additionally, the method surpassed 3D fingerprint flattening technique in both recognition and identification during cross-session experiments, achieving an EER of 1.50% when fingerprints with varying registrations were included.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于B样条的3D指纹点云展开方法，将3D指纹转换为灰度图像，利用传统2D识别方法实现高精度识别。
analysis.research_motivation: 3D指纹识别相比2D具有卫生、安全等优势，但存在指纹像素高度变化导致脊谷模式提取困难、注册方向一致性问题等挑战，现有方法性能不足。
analysis.problem: 如何有效展开3D指纹点云以消除高度变化和注册限制，从而兼容传统2D指纹识别方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用B样条曲线拟合对3D指纹点云进行展开，减少高度变化和注册限制；将展开后的点云通过相对高度映射为灰度图像，再采用传统2D指纹识别方法进行识别。
contributions: 提出一种基于B样条函数的3D指纹点云展开方案，有效缓解高度变化和注册问题。
在三个实验中获得0.2072%、0.26%、0.22%的等错误率，优于现有方法；跨会话实验中EER为1.50%，超越3D指纹展平技术。
analysis.experiments: 在三个实验中进行3D指纹识别，获得EER分别为0.2072%、0.26%、0.22%；跨会话实验中包含不同注册指纹时EER为1.50%。
limitations: 可能依赖B样条参数选择，泛化性需进一步验证。

papers.title: MambaBack: Bridging Local Features and Global Contexts in Whole Slide Image Analysis
papers.abstract: Whole Slide Image (WSI) analysis is pivotal in computational pathology, enabling cancer diagnosis by integrating morphological and architectural cues across magnifications. Multiple Instance Learning (MIL) serves as the standard framework for WSI analysis. Recently, Mamba has become a promising backbone for MIL, overtaking Transformers due to its efficiency and global context modeling capabilities originating from Natural Language Processing (NLP). However, existing Mamba-based MIL approaches face three critical challenges: (1) disruption of 2D spatial locality during 1D sequence flattening; (2) sub-optimal modeling of fine-grained local cellular structures; and (3) high memory peaks during inference on resource-constrained edge devices. Studies like MambaOut reveal that Mamba's SSM component is redundant for local feature extraction, where Gated CNNs suffice. Recognizing that WSI analysis demands both fine-grained local feature extraction akin to natural images, and global context modeling akin to NLP, we propose MambaBack, a novel hybrid architecture that harmonizes the strengths of Mamba and MambaOut. First, we propose the Hilbert sampling strategy to preserve the 2D spatial locality of tiles within 1D sequences, enhancing the model's spatial perception. Second, we design a hierarchical structure comprising a 1D Gated CNN block based on MambaOut to capture local cellular features, and a BiMamba2 block to aggregate global context, jointly enhancing multi-scale representation. Finally, we implement an asymmetric chunking design, allowing parallel processing during training and chunking-streaming accumulation during inference, minimizing peak memory usage for deployment. Experimental results on five datasets demonstrate that MambaBack outperforms seven state-of-the-art methods. Source code and datasets are publicly available.

analysis.tldr: 提出MambaBack混合架构，通过Hilbert采样保持空间局部性、门控CNN与BiMamba2分层建模局部与全局特征，并采用非对称分块设计降低推理内存，在WSI分析中超越SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 全切片图像分析在计算病理学中至关重要，但现有Mamba-based MIL方法存在破坏2D空间局部性、细粒度局部结构建模不足、边缘设备推理内存峰值高等问题。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种既能高效提取细粒度局部特征又能建模全局上下文的WSI分析架构，同时降低推理内存占用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: MambaOut研究表明Mamba的SSM组件对局部特征提取冗余，门控CNN即可胜任；WSI分析既需要类似自然图像的细粒度局部特征提取，也需要类似NLP的全局上下文建模。
analysis.method: 提出MambaBack混合架构：1) Hilbert采样策略保持1D序列中tile的2D空间局部性；2) 分层结构：基于MambaOut的1D门控CNN块捕获局部细胞特征，BiMamba2块聚合全局上下文；3) 非对称分块设计：训练时并行处理，推理时分块流式累积以降低峰值内存。
contributions: 提出Hilbert采样策略，在将2D tile展平为1D序列时保留空间局部性。
设计混合分层架构，结合门控CNN和BiMamba2分别建模局部和全局特征。
实现非对称分块设计，显著降低推理时的峰值内存占用。
analysis.experiments: 在五个数据集上对比七种SOTA方法，MambaBack表现最优。
limitations: 可能仅在WSI领域验证，泛化性未知。
Hilbert采样策略的计算开销未详细分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，混合架构设计合理，实验充分且开源，与医学图像方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MambaBack混合架构，通过Hilbert采样保持空间局部性、门控CNN与BiMamba2分层建模局部与全局特征，并采用非对称分块设计降低推理内存，在WSI分析中超越SOTA。

papers.title: Privacy-Preserving LLMs Routing
papers.abstract: Large language model (LLM) routing has emerged as a critical strategy to balance model performance and cost-efficiency by dynamically selecting services from various model providers. However, LLM routing adds an intermediate layer between users and LLMs, creating new privacy risks to user data. These privacy risks have not been systematically studied. Although cryptographic techniques such as Secure Multi-Party Computation (MPC) enable privacy-preserving computation, their protocol design and implementation remain under-explored, and naïve implementations typically incur prohibitive computational overhead. To address this, we propose a privacy-preserving LLM routing framework (PPRoute). PPRoute includes multiple strategies to speed up encoder inference and nearest neighbor search under the MPC and maintain the quality of LLM routing. First, PPRoute uses MPC-friendly operations to boost the encoder inference. Second, PPRoute uses a multiple-step model training algorithm to maintain routing quality despite the constraints of the encrypted domain. Third, PPRoute proposes an unsorted Top-k algorithm with $O(1)$ communication complexity for secure sorting in model search, significantly reducing communication latency. Across different datasets, PPRoute achieves the performance of plaintext counterparts, while achieving approximately a 20$\times$ speedup over naïve MPC implementations.

analysis.tldr: 提出PPRoute框架，通过MPC友好操作和高效Top-k算法实现隐私保护的LLM路由，速度提升约20倍。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM路由在平衡性能与成本时引入了中间层，导致用户数据隐私风险未被系统研究；现有加密技术（如MPC）实现开销过高。
analysis.problem: 如何在保护用户数据隐私的前提下，实现高效且保持路由质量的LLM路由。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出PPRoute框架，包含MPC友好操作加速编码器推理、多步模型训练算法维持路由质量、以及通信复杂度O(1)的无序Top-k算法。
contributions: 首次系统研究LLM路由中的隐私风险并提出保护方案。
设计MPC友好操作和高效Top-k算法，实现约20倍速度提升且保持明文性能。
analysis.experiments: 在不同数据集上，PPRoute达到明文路由的性能，且比朴素MPC实现快约20倍。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定MPC协议或模型架构。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PPRoute框架，通过MPC友好操作和高效Top-k算法实现隐私保护的LLM路由，速度提升约20倍。

papers.title: Structured Abductive-Deductive-Inductive Reasoning for LLMs via Algebraic Invariants
papers.abstract: Large language models exhibit systematic limitations in structured logical reasoning: they conflate hypothesis generation with verification, cannot distinguish conjecture from validated knowledge, and allow weak reasoning steps to propagate unchecked through inference chains. We present a symbolic reasoning scaffold that operationalizes Peirce's tripartite inference -- abduction, deduction, and induction -- as an explicit protocol for LLM-assisted reasoning. The framework enforces logical consistency through five algebraic invariants (the Gamma Quintet), the strongest of which -- the Weakest Link bound -- ensures that no conclusion in a reasoning chain can exceed the reliability of its least-supported premise. This principle, independently grounded as weakest link resolution in possibilistic logic and empirically validated for chain-of-thought reasoning, prevents logical inconsistencies from accumulating across multi-step inference. We verify all invariants through a property-based testing suite of 100 properties and 16 fuzz tests over 10^5+ generated cases, providing a verified reference implementation of the invariants suitable as a foundation for future reasoning benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于代数不变量的结构化推理框架，将皮尔士三分推理（溯因-演绎-归纳）形式化为LLM推理协议，并通过最弱链接约束保证推理链的逻辑一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 大语言模型在结构化逻辑推理中存在系统性缺陷：混淆假设生成与验证、无法区分猜想与验证知识、弱推理步骤在推理链中无检查传播，亟需一种形式化框架来约束和规范推理过程。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种符号推理框架，使LLM能够遵循溯因、演绎、归纳的严格逻辑协议，并确保推理链中每一步的结论可靠性不超过其最弱前提。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出LLM在逻辑推理中会混淆假设生成与验证，无法区分猜想与已验证知识，且弱推理步骤会无检查地传播，导致推理链不一致。
analysis.method: 提出Gamma Quintet五个代数不变量，其中最弱链接约束确保推理链结论可靠性不超过最弱前提；将皮尔士三分推理（溯因、演绎、归纳）作为显式协议，通过属性测试套件（100个属性、16个模糊测试、10^5+生成案例）验证所有不变量。
contributions: 提出Gamma Quintet代数不变量，用于约束LLM推理链的逻辑一致性
将皮尔士三分推理形式化为LLM可执行的显式推理协议
提供经过属性测试验证的参考实现，可作为未来推理基准的基础
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及通过属性测试套件（100个属性、16个模糊测试、10^5+生成案例）验证了所有不变量。
limitations: 可能仅适用于符号推理场景，对纯自然语言推理的泛化性未验证
属性测试虽覆盖大量案例，但未在真实LLM推理任务上评估性能提升
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，将哲学推理理论形式化为代数不变量，但缺乏真实LLM任务实验验证，适合关注推理形式化的读者精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于代数不变量的结构化推理框架，将皮尔士三分推理（溯因-演绎-归纳）形式化为LLM推理协议，并通过最弱链接约束保证推理链的逻辑一致性。

papers.title: LLM Reasoning Is Latent, Not the Chain of Thought
papers.abstract: This position paper argues that large language model (LLM) reasoning should be studied as latent-state trajectory formation rather than as faithful surface chain-of-thought (CoT). This matters because claims about faithfulness, interpretability, reasoning benchmarks, and inference-time intervention all depend on what the field takes the primary object of reasoning to be. We ask what that object should be once three often-confounded factors are separated and formalize three competing hypotheses: H1, reasoning is primarily mediated by latent-state trajectories; H2, reasoning is primarily mediated by explicit surface CoT; and H0, most apparent reasoning gains are better explained by generic serial compute than by any privileged representational object. Reorganizing recent empirical, mechanistic, and survey work under this framework, and adding compute-audited worked exemplars that factorize surface traces, latent interventions, and matched budget expansions, we find that current evidence most strongly supports H1 as a default working hypothesis rather than as a task-independent verdict. We therefore make two recommendations: the field should treat latent-state dynamics as the default object of study for LLM reasoning, and it should evaluate reasoning with designs that explicitly disentangle surface traces, latent states, and serial compute.

analysis.tldr: 本文论证LLM推理本质是隐状态轨迹而非显式思维链，并提出三个竞争性假设。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前研究对LLM推理的忠实性、可解释性、基准测试和推理时干预的讨论依赖于对推理对象的定义，但该定义尚未被清晰分离和形式化。
analysis.problem: 确定LLM推理的主要媒介是隐状态轨迹、显式思维链还是通用串行计算。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象，但指出当前证据最支持H1（隐状态轨迹）作为默认工作假设。
analysis.method: 通过分离三个常被混淆的因素（表面痕迹、隐状态、串行计算），形式化三个竞争性假设，并重新组织实证、机制和综述工作，结合计算审计的示例进行分析。
contributions: 形式化并区分了LLM推理的三个竞争性假设（H1、H2、H0）。
基于现有证据推荐将隐状态动力学作为LLM推理的默认研究对象，并建议采用明确分离表面痕迹、隐状态和串行计算的实验设计。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 作为立场论文，缺乏大规模实验验证。
H1作为默认假设可能不适用于所有任务或模型。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 观点新颖，对LLM推理研究方向有指导意义，但缺乏实验数据，适合精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 本文论证LLM推理本质是隐状态轨迹而非显式思维链，并提出三个竞争性假设。

papers.title: Reasoning-targeted Jailbreak Attacks on Large Reasoning Models via Semantic Triggers and Psychological Framing
papers.abstract: Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) have demonstrated strong capabilities in generating step-by-step reasoning chains alongside final answers, enabling their deployment in high-stakes domains such as healthcare and education. While prior jailbreak attack studies have focused on the safety of final answers, little attention has been given to the safety of the reasoning process. In this work, we identify a novel problem that injects harmful content into the reasoning steps while preserving unchanged answers. This type of attack presents two key challenges: 1) manipulating the input instructions may inadvertently alter the LRM's final answer, and 2) the diversity of input questions makes it difficult to consistently bypass the LRM's safety alignment mechanisms and embed harmful content into its reasoning process. To address these challenges, we propose the Psychology-based Reasoning-targeted Jailbreak Attack (PRJA) Framework, which integrates a Semantic-based Trigger Selection module and a Psychology-based Instruction Generation module. Specifically, the proposed PRJA automatically selects manipulative reasoning triggers via semantic analysis and leverages psychological theories of obedience to authority and moral disengagement to generate adaptive instructions for enhancing the LRM's compliance with harmful content generation. Extensive experiments on five question-answering datasets demonstrate that PRJA achieves an average attack success rate of 83.6\% against several commercial LRMs, including DeepSeek R1, Qwen2.5-Max, and OpenAI o4-mini.

analysis.tldr: 提出针对大型推理模型推理过程安全的心理学框架攻击，成功注入有害推理步骤而不改变最终答案。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有越狱攻击仅关注最终答案安全，忽略了推理过程的安全隐患，而LRM在医疗、教育等高风险领域部署时，推理步骤中的有害内容可能造成严重误导。
analysis.problem: 如何在不改变LRM最终答案的前提下，将有害内容注入其推理步骤，并克服输入指令变化导致答案偏移及安全对齐机制难以一致绕过的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出PRJA框架，包含基于语义的触发选择模块（自动选择操纵性推理触发词）和基于心理学的指令生成模块（利用权威服从和道德推脱理论生成自适应指令，增强LRM对有害内容生成的顺从性）。
contributions: 首次定义并研究针对LRM推理过程安全的越狱攻击问题。
提出PRJA框架，结合语义触发与心理学框架实现高效攻击。
在多个商用LRM上达到83.6%平均攻击成功率。
analysis.experiments: 在五个问答数据集上对DeepSeek R1、Qwen2.5-Max、OpenAI o4-mini等商用LRM进行实验，平均攻击成功率83.6%。
limitations: 攻击可能依赖特定心理学理论的有效性，不同文化背景下的适用性待验证。
未讨论防御机制或对模型安全对齐的改进建议。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 问题新颖，方法结合心理学与语义分析，实验验证有效，但技术细节未充分展开。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出针对大型推理模型推理过程安全的心理学框架攻击，成功注入有害推理步骤而不改变最终答案。

papers.title: Diffusion Autoencoder for Unsupervised Artifact Restoration in Handheld Fundus Images
papers.abstract: The advent of handheld fundus imaging devices has made ophthalmologic diagnosis and disease screening more accessible, efficient, and cost-effective. However, images captured from these setups often suffer from artifacts such as flash reflections, exposure variations, and motion-induced blur, which degrade image quality and hinder downstream analysis. While generative models have been effective in image restoration, most depend on paired supervision or predefined artifact structures, making them less adaptable to unstructured degradations commonly observed in handheld fundus images. To address this, we propose an unsupervised diffusion autoencoder that integrates a context encoder with the denoising process to learn semantically meaningful representations for artifact restoration. The model is trained only on high-quality table-top fundus images and infers to restore artifact-affected handheld acquisitions. We validate the restorations through quantitative and qualitative evaluations, and have shown that diagnostic accuracy increases to 81.17% on an unseen dataset and multiple artifact conditions

analysis.tldr: 提出无监督扩散自编码器，无需配对数据即可恢复手持眼底图像中的非结构化伪影。
analysis.research_motivation: 手持眼底成像设备普及但图像常受伪影（闪光、曝光、运动模糊）影响，现有生成模型依赖配对监督或预定义伪影结构，难以适应非结构化退化。

contributions: 提出首个无监督扩散自编码器用于手持眼底图像伪影恢复，无需配对数据。
在未见数据集上诊断准确率提升至81.17%，验证了方法的有效性。

limitations: 可能对极端伪影或罕见伪影类型恢复效果有限。

papers.title: Harnessing Pre-Resolution Signals for Future Prediction Agents
papers.abstract: Many high-stakes decisions depend on forecasts made before outcomes are known. In this future prediction setting, the central challenge is that public evidence evolves over time, while the main supervision signal arrives only after resolution: the realized outcome mainly assesses final correctness, offering only coarse guidance on what to track, what to verify, and which judgments to leave uncertain along the way. Our key observation is that revisiting the same unresolved question over time creates informative temporal contrasts across evolving evidence and repeated forecasts, exposing what earlier attempts missed before resolution and yielding a diagnostic signal we call the pre-resolution signal. We instantiate this idea in Milkyway, a future prediction agent with a persistent future prediction harness, an editable external state that stores reusable procedural guidance across revisits to the same unresolved question. As the same unresolved question is revisited, Milkyway extracts pre-resolution signals from evolving evidence and repeated forecasts, uses them to update the harness, and improves later forecasts on that question before resolution. After resolution, the realized outcome serves as a post-resolution check of provisional updates. On the FutureX and FutureWorld benchmarks, Milkyway achieves strong performance against competitive baselines, and a mechanism study suggests that the gains stem from harness evolution driven by pre-resolution signals rather than repeated prediction alone.

analysis.tldr: 提出利用预解析信号改进未来预测智能体，通过重复访问未解析问题提取时间对比信号。
analysis.research_motivation: 许多高风险决策依赖结果未知前的预测，但主要监督信号仅在解析后出现，对中间过程指导粗糙。
analysis.problem: 如何利用未解析问题随时间演变的证据和重复预测来提升预测准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 重复访问同一未解析问题会产生信息性时间对比，暴露早期遗漏，形成预解析信号。
analysis.method: Milkyway智能体，包含可编辑外部状态（harness），存储可重用程序性指导，在重复访问时提取预解析信号并更新harness，解析后结果作为后验检查。
contributions: 提出预解析信号概念，利用时间对比改进预测。
设计Milkyway智能体，实现预解析信号的提取与利用。
analysis.experiments: 在FutureX和FutureWorld基准上，Milkyway优于竞争基线，机制研究表明收益来自预解析信号驱动的harness演化。
limitations: 可能依赖问题可重复访问的场景。
预解析信号提取的通用性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖但实验规模有限，与重点方向中等相关。

papers.title: NeuroLip: An Event-driven Spatiotemporal Learning Framework for Cross-Scene Lip-Motion-based Visual Speaker Recognition
papers.abstract: Visual speaker recognition based on lip motion offers a silent, hands-free, and behavior-driven biometric solution that remains effective even when acoustic cues are unavailable. Compared to traditional methods that rely heavily on appearance-dependent representations, lip motion encodes subject-specific behavioral dynamics driven by consistent articulation patterns and muscle coordination, offering inherent stability across environmental changes. However, capturing these robust, fine-grained dynamics is challenging for conventional frame-based cameras due to motion blur and low dynamic range. To exploit the intrinsic stability of lip motion and address these sensing limitations, we propose NeuroLip, an event-based framework that captures fine-grained lip dynamics under a strict yet practical cross-scene protocol: training is performed under a single controlled condition, while recognition must generalize to unseen viewing and lighting conditions. NeuroLip features a 1) Temporal-aware Voxel Encoding module with adaptive event weighting, 2) Structure-aware Spatial Enhancer that amplifies discriminative behavioral patterns by suppressing noise while preserving vertically structured motion information, and 3) Polarity Consistency Regularization mechanism to retain motion-direction cues encoded in event polarities. To facilitate systematic evaluation, we introduce DVSpeaker, a comprehensive event-based lip-motion dataset comprising 50 subjects recorded under four distinct viewpoint and illumination scenarios. Extensive experiments demonstrate that NeuroLip achieves near-perfect matched-scene accuracy and robust cross-scene generalization, attaining over 71% accuracy on unseen viewpoints and nearly 76% under low-light conditions, outperforming representative existing methods by at least 8.54%. The dataset and code are publicly available at https://github.com/JiuZeongit/NeuroLip.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于事件相机的唇动视觉说话人识别框架NeuroLip，在跨场景协议下实现鲁棒识别。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统基于唇动的视觉说话人识别依赖帧基相机，存在运动模糊和低动态范围问题，难以捕捉细粒度唇动动态；且现有方法在跨场景（视角、光照变化）下泛化能力不足。
analysis.problem: 如何利用事件相机的高时间分辨率优势，设计一个在严格跨场景协议下（单一条件训练，未知视角和光照测试）鲁棒的唇动视觉说话人识别框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出NeuroLip框架，包含三个核心模块：1）时间感知体素编码模块（自适应事件加权）；2）结构感知空间增强器（抑制噪声、保留垂直结构运动信息）；3）极性一致性正则化机制（保留事件极性中的运动方向线索）。同时构建了包含50名受试者、4种视角和光照场景的事件基唇动数据集DVSpeaker。
contributions: 提出NeuroLip，首个基于事件相机的跨场景唇动视觉说话人识别框架，利用事件数据的高时间分辨率捕捉细粒度唇动动态。
引入时间感知体素编码、结构感知空间增强和极性一致性正则化三个创新模块，提升跨场景泛化能力。
构建并公开DVSpeaker数据集，包含50名受试者在4种视角和光照条件下的事件基唇动数据，促进该方向研究。
analysis.experiments: 在DVSpeaker数据集上进行实验，NeuroLip在匹配场景下达到近完美准确率，跨场景泛化：未知视角下超过71%，低光照下近76%，优于现有方法至少8.54%。
limitations: 数据集规模有限（50名受试者），可能限制模型在更大规模人群上的泛化性。
仅针对唇动模态，未融合其他生物特征（如面部外观）以进一步提升鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性高（事件相机+跨场景协议），实验充分且性能提升显著，但属于特定应用方向，与VLM/MLLM核心方向关联中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于事件相机的唇动视觉说话人识别框架NeuroLip，在跨场景协议下实现鲁棒识别。

papers.title: GTA-2: Benchmarking General Tool Agents from Atomic Tool-Use to Open-Ended Workflows
papers.abstract: The development of general-purpose agents requires a shift from executing simple instructions to completing complex, real-world productivity workflows. However, current tool-use benchmarks remain misaligned with real-world requirements, relying on AI-generated queries, dummy tools, and limited system-level coordination. To address this, we propose GTA-2, a hierarchical benchmark for General Tool Agents (GTA) spanning atomic tool use and open-ended workflows. Built on real-world authenticity, it leverages real user queries, deployed tools, and multimodal contexts. (i) GTA-Atomic, inherited from our prior GTA benchmark, evaluates short-horizon, closed-ended tool-use precision. (ii) GTA-Workflow introduces long-horizon, open-ended tasks for realistic end-to-end completion. To evaluate open-ended deliverables, we propose a recursive checkpoint-based evaluation mechanism that decomposes objectives into verifiable sub-goals, enabling unified evaluation of both model capabilities and agent execution frameworks (i.e., execution harnesses). Experiments reveal a pronounced capability cliff: while frontier models already struggle on atomic tasks (below 50%), they largely fail on workflows, with top models achieving only 14.39% success. Further analysis shows that checkpoint-guided feedback improves performance, while advanced frameworks such as Manus and OpenClaw substantially enhance workflow completion, highlighting the importance of execution harness design beyond the underlying model capacity. These findings provide guidance for developing reliable personal and professional assistants. Dataset and code will be available at https://github.com/open-compass/GTA.

analysis.tldr: GTA-2 是一个从原子工具使用到开放式工作流的通用工具智能体分层基准，揭示了前沿模型在复杂工作流上的能力悬崖。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前工具使用基准与真实需求脱节，依赖AI生成查询、虚拟工具和有限的系统级协调，无法评估通用智能体在复杂工作流中的表现。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个基于真实场景、覆盖从原子工具使用到开放式工作流的层次化基准，以统一评估模型能力和执行框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现前沿模型在原子任务上已表现不佳（低于50%），在开放式工作流上成功率仅14.39%，存在显著能力悬崖；检查点引导反馈可提升性能，高级执行框架（如Manus、OpenClaw）能大幅改善工作流完成度。
analysis.method: 提出GTA-2分层基准，包含GTA-Atomic（短时域封闭式工具使用）和GTA-Workflow（长时域开放式工作流），并设计递归检查点评估机制，将目标分解为可验证子目标。
contributions: 构建了基于真实用户查询、部署工具和多模态上下文的层次化工具智能体基准GTA-2。
提出递归检查点评估机制，统一评估模型能力和执行框架。
通过实验揭示能力悬崖，并分析检查点反馈和执行框架对性能的影响。
analysis.experiments: 在GTA-Atomic和GTA-Workflow上评估了多个前沿模型和框架，报告了成功率等指标。
limitations: 基准可能未覆盖所有真实世界工作流类型。
递归检查点评估机制可能引入额外人工成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 该基准针对当前热门工具智能体方向，设计层次化且基于真实场景，实验揭示了重要现象，但方法创新性中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GTA-2 是一个从原子工具使用到开放式工作流的通用工具智能体分层基准，揭示了前沿模型在复杂工作流上的能力悬崖。

papers.title: Just Type It in Isabelle! AI Agents Drafting, Mechanizing, and Generalizing from Human Hints
papers.abstract: Type annotations are essential when printing terms in a way that preserves their meaning under reparsing and type inference. We study the problem of complete and minimal type annotations for rank-one polymorphic $λ$-calculus terms, as used in Isabelle. Building on prior work by Smolka, Blanchette et al., we give a metatheoretical account of the problem, with a full formal specification and proofs, and formalize it in Isabelle/HOL. Our development is a series of experiments featuring human-driven and AI-driven formalization workflows: a human and an LLM-powered AI agent independently produce pen-and-paper proofs, and the AI agent autoformalizes both in Isabelle, with further human-hinted AI interventions refining and generalizing the development.

analysis.tldr: 研究Isabelle中类型标注的完备性与最小性，并探索AI智能体辅助形式化证明的工作流。
analysis.research_motivation: 类型标注在保持项含义的同时确保可重解析和类型推断，但现有方法缺乏完整的形式化规范，且AI辅助形式化证明的潜力尚未充分挖掘。
analysis.problem: 为Isabelle中使用的秩一多态λ演算项提供完备且最小的类型标注，并实现其形式化证明。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 给出问题的元理论描述、完整形式化规范及证明，并在Isabelle/HOL中形式化；通过人类和LLM驱动的AI智能体独立生成纸笔证明，AI智能体自动形式化两者，并引入人类提示的AI干预来改进和泛化。
contributions: 对秩一多态λ演算项的类型标注问题给出元理论描述和完整形式化规范及证明。
在Isabelle/HOL中形式化该规范。
探索了人类与AI智能体协作的形式化工作流，包括自动形式化和人类提示的AI干预。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅针对Isabelle中的特定类型系统，泛化性有限。
AI智能体的形式化质量可能依赖人类提示的精细程度。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法有一定创新性，但应用场景较窄，实验信息不足。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 研究Isabelle中类型标注的完备性与最小性，并探索AI智能体辅助形式化证明的工作流。

papers.title: SSMamba: A Self-Supervised Hybrid State Space Model for Pathological Image Classification
papers.abstract: Pathological diagnosis is highly reliant on image analysis, where Regions of Interest (ROIs) serve as the primary basis for diagnostic evidence, while whole-slide image (WSI)-level tasks primarily capture aggregated patterns. To extract these critical morphological features, ROI-level Foundation Models (FMs) based on Vision Transformers (ViTs) and large-scale self-supervised learning (SSL) have been widely adopted. However, three core limitations remain in their application to ROI analysis: (1) cross-magnification domain shift, as fixed-scale pretraining hinders adaptation to diverse clinical settings; (2) inadequate local-global relationship modeling, wherein the ViT backbone of FMs suffers from high computational overhead and imprecise local characterization; (3) insufficient fine-grained sensitivity, as traditional self-attention mechanisms tend to overlook subtle diagnostic cues. To address these challenges, we propose SSMamba, a hybrid SSL framework that enables effective fine-grained feature learning without relying on large external datasets. This framework incorporates three domain-adaptive components: Mamba Masked Image Modeling (MAMIM) for mitigating domain shift, a Directional Multi-scale (DMS) module for balanced local-global modeling, and a Local Perception Residual (LPR) module for enhanced fine-grained sensitivity. Employing a two-stage pipeline, SSL pretraining on target ROI datasets followed by supervised fine-tuning (SFT), SSMamba outperforms 11 state-of-the-art (SOTA) pathological FMs on 10 public ROI datasets and surpasses 8 SOTA methods on 6 public WSI datasets. These results validate the superiority of task-specific architectural designs for pathological image analysis.

analysis.tldr: 提出SSMamba混合自监督框架，通过Mamba状态空间模型和三个域自适应模块提升病理图像分类性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 病理诊断依赖图像分析，现有基于ViT的Foundation Models在ROI分析中存在跨放大倍数域偏移、局部-全局关系建模不足和细粒度敏感性不够的问题。
analysis.problem: 解决病理图像ROI分析中跨放大倍数域偏移、局部-全局关系建模不充分以及细粒度特征学习不足的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出ViT骨干网络计算开销大且局部表征不精确，传统自注意力机制容易忽略细微诊断线索。
analysis.method: 提出SSMamba混合自监督框架，包含Mamba掩码图像建模（MAMIM）缓解域偏移、方向多尺度模块（DMS）平衡局部-全局建模、局部感知残差模块（LPR）增强细粒度敏感性，采用两阶段流程：目标ROI数据集上的自监督预训练+监督微调。
contributions: 提出SSMamba框架，结合Mamba状态空间模型与自监督学习，实现有效的细粒度特征学习。
设计三个域自适应模块（MAMIM、DMS、LPR）分别解决域偏移、局部-全局建模和细粒度敏感性。
在10个ROI数据集和6个WSI数据集上超越多个SOTA病理Foundation Models。
analysis.experiments: 在10个公开ROI数据集上超越11个SOTA病理FM，在6个公开WSI数据集上超越8个SOTA方法。
limitations: 可能依赖特定病理数据集，泛化性需进一步验证。
两阶段训练流程可能增加计算成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，结合Mamba与自监督学习，实验充分且性能显著，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SSMamba混合自监督框架，通过Mamba状态空间模型和三个域自适应模块提升病理图像分类性能。

papers.title: Bilevel Optimization of Agent Skills via Monte Carlo Tree Search
papers.abstract: Agent \texttt{skills} are structured collections of instructions, tools, and supporting resources that help large language model (LLM) agents perform particular classes of tasks. Empirical evidence shows that the design of \texttt{skills} can materially affect agent task performance, yet systematically optimizing \texttt{skills} remains challenging. Since a \texttt{skill} comprises instructions, tools, and supporting resources in a structured way, optimizing it requires jointly determining both the structure of these components and the content each component contains. This gives rise to a complex decision space with strong interdependence across structure and components. We therefore represent these two coupled decisions as \texttt{skill} structure and component content, and formulate \texttt{skill} optimization as a bilevel optimization problem. We propose a bilevel optimization framework in which an outer loop employs Monte Carlo Tree Search to determine the \texttt{skill} structure, while an inner loop refines the component content within the structure selected by the outer loop. In both loops, we employ LLMs to assist the optimization procedure. We evaluate the proposed framework on an open-source Operations Research Question Answering dataset, and the experimental results suggest that the bilevel optimization framework improves the performance of the agents with the optimized \texttt{skill}.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于蒙特卡洛树搜索的双层优化框架，用于自动优化LLM Agent的技能结构及内容。
analysis.research_motivation: Agent技能（指令、工具、资源）的设计对任务性能影响显著，但手动优化技能结构复杂且困难，现有方法缺乏系统性优化手段。
analysis.problem: 如何联合优化技能的结构和内容，以提升LLM Agent的任务表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 技能的结构与内容之间存在强耦合，导致决策空间复杂，需要双层优化方法。
analysis.method: 双层优化框架：外层使用蒙特卡洛树搜索确定技能结构，内层优化该结构下的组件内容，两层均借助LLM辅助优化。
contributions: 将Agent技能优化形式化为双层优化问题，并提出了对应的MCTS框架。
在运筹学问答数据集上验证了框架的有效性，表明优化后的技能提升了Agent性能。
analysis.experiments: 在开源运筹学问答数据集上评估，实验结果表明双层优化框架提升了使用优化技能的Agent性能。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM的辅助质量，LLM的偏差会影响优化结果。
仅在一个数据集上验证，泛化性有待进一步检验。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较高，双层优化结合MCTS解决技能优化问题，但实验规模有限，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于蒙特卡洛树搜索的双层优化框架，用于自动优化LLM Agent的技能结构及内容。

papers.title: APC: Transferable and Efficient Adversarial Point Counterattack for Robust 3D Point Cloud Recognition
papers.abstract: The advent of deep neural networks has led to remarkable progress in 3D point cloud recognition, but they remain vulnerable to adversarial attacks. Although various defense methods have been studied, they suffer from a trade-off between robustness and transferability. We propose Adversarial Point Counterattack (APC) to achieve both simultaneously. APC is a lightweight input-level purification module that generates instance-specific counter-perturbations for each point, effectively neutralizing attacks. Leveraging clean-adversarial pairs, APC enforces geometric consistency in data space and semantic consistency in feature space. To improve generalizability across diverse attacks, we adopt a hybrid training strategy using adversarial point clouds from multiple attack types. Since APC operates purely on input point clouds, it directly transfers to unseen models and defends against attacks targeting them without retraining. At inference, a single APC forward pass provides purified point clouds with negligible time and parameter overhead. Extensive experiments on two 3D recognition benchmarks demonstrate that the APC achieves state-of-the-art defense performance. Furthermore, cross-model evaluations validate its superior transferability. The code is available at https://github.com/gyjung975/APC.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种轻量级输入净化模块APC，通过生成实例特定的反扰动同时提升3D点云识别的鲁棒性和可迁移性。
analysis.research_motivation: 3D点云识别模型易受对抗攻击，现有防御方法在鲁棒性和可迁移性之间存在权衡，亟需一种能兼顾两者的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种轻量级、可迁移的防御方法，在不牺牲效率的前提下同时提升对多种攻击的鲁棒性和跨模型迁移能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有防御方法在鲁棒性和可迁移性上存在权衡，难以同时优化。
analysis.method: 提出对抗点反攻击（APC），一种轻量级输入级净化模块，为每个点生成实例特定的反扰动，利用干净-对抗对在数据空间强制几何一致性、在特征空间强制语义一致性，并采用混合训练策略使用多种攻击类型的对抗点云提升泛化性。
contributions: 提出APC模块，同时实现鲁棒性和可迁移性，且轻量高效。
设计混合训练策略，利用多种攻击类型提升泛化能力。
在多个基准和跨模型评估中达到SOTA防御性能。
analysis.experiments: 在两个3D识别基准上进行广泛实验，APC达到SOTA防御性能；跨模型评估验证了其优越的可迁移性。
limitations: 可能对未见过的攻击类型泛化能力有限。
反扰动生成可能引入额外噪声影响干净样本精度。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实验充分，对3D点云对抗防御有重要贡献，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种轻量级输入净化模块APC，通过生成实例特定的反扰动同时提升3D点云识别的鲁棒性和可迁移性。

papers.title: LP$^{2}$DH: A Locality-Preserving Pixel-Difference Hashing Framework for Dynamic Texture Recognition
papers.abstract: Spatiotemporal Local Binary Pattern (STLBP) is a widely used dynamic texture descriptor, but it suffers from extremely high dimensionality. To tackle this, STLBP features are often extracted on three orthogonal planes, which sacrifice inter-plane correlation. In this work, we propose a Locality-Preserving Pixel-Difference Hashing (LP$^{2}$DH) framework that jointly encodes pixel differences in the full spatiotemporal neighbourhood. LP$^{2}$DH transforms Pixel-Difference Vectors (PDVs) into compact binary codes with maximal discriminative power. Furthermore, we incorporate a locality-preserving embedding to maintain the PDVs' local structure before and after hashing. Then, a curvilinear search strategy is utilized to jointly optimize the hashing matrix and binary codes via gradient descent on the Stiefel manifold. After hashing, dictionary learning is applied to encode the binary vectors into codewords, and the resulting histogram is utilized as the final feature representation. The proposed LP$^{2}$DH achieves state-of-the-art performance on three major dynamic texture recognition benchmarks: 99.80% against DT-GoogleNet's 98.93% on UCLA, 98.52% against HoGF$^{3D}$'s 97.63% on DynTex++, and 96.19% compared to STS's 95.00% on YUPENN. The source code is available at: https://github.com/drx770/LP2DH.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种保持局部性的像素差异哈希框架，用于动态纹理识别，在三个基准上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: STLBP动态纹理描述子维度极高，现有方法在三个正交平面上提取特征牺牲了平面间相关性，亟需一种能联合编码全时空邻域像素差异的紧凑且判别性强的表示方法。
analysis.problem: 解决STLBP高维度和忽略平面间相关性的问题，实现低维、判别性强的动态纹理特征表示。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出LP²DH框架：将像素差异向量通过保持局部性的哈希转换为紧凑二进制码，在Stiefel流形上联合优化哈希矩阵和二进制码，再通过字典学习生成直方图特征。
contributions: 提出LP²DH框架，联合编码全时空邻域像素差异并生成紧凑二进制码。
引入保持局部性的嵌入和Stiefel流形上的梯度下降优化策略。
在三个动态纹理基准上取得SOTA结果，并开源代码。
analysis.experiments: 在UCLA、DynTex++和YUPENN三个动态纹理基准上评估，准确率分别为99.80%、98.52%和96.19%，均超过对比方法。
limitations: 可能对噪声敏感，因为基于像素差异。
优化过程可能计算开销较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较强，实验充分且达到SOTA，但与当前重点方向（VLM/视频生成等）相关性中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种保持局部性的像素差异哈希框架，用于动态纹理识别，在三个基准上达到SOTA。

papers.title: P3T: Prototypical Point-level Prompt Tuning with Enhanced Generalization for 3D Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: With the rise of pre-trained models in the 3D point cloud domain for a wide range of real-world applications, adapting them to downstream tasks has become increasingly important. However, conventional full fine-tuning methods are computationally expensive and storage-intensive. Although prompt tuning has emerged as an efficient alternative, it often suffers from overfitting, thereby compromising generalization capability. To address this issue, we propose Prototypical Point-level Prompt Tuning (P$^3$T), a parameter-efficient prompt tuning method designed for pre-trained 3D vision-language models (VLMs). P$^3$T consists of two components: 1) \textit{Point Prompter}, which generates instance-aware point-level prompts for the input point cloud, and 2) \textit{Text Prompter}, which employs learnable prompts into the input text instead of hand-crafted ones. Since both prompters operate directly on input data, P$^3$T enables task-specific adaptation of 3D VLMs without sacrificing generalizability. Furthermore, to enhance embedding space alignment, which is key to fine-tuning 3D VLMs, we introduce a prototypical loss that reduces intra-category variance. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method matches or outperforms full fine-tuning in classification and few-shot learning, and further exhibits robust generalization under data shift in the cross-dataset setting. The code is available at \textcolor{violet}{https://github.com/gyjung975/P3T}.

analysis.tldr: 提出原型级点级提示调优方法，提升3D视觉-语言模型在下游任务中的泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 全微调方法计算和存储成本高，而现有提示调优方法容易过拟合，损害泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 如何设计参数高效的提示调优方法，使预训练3D视觉-语言模型在适应下游任务时保持泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出提示调优方法容易过拟合，导致泛化能力下降。
analysis.method: 提出P3T方法，包含点提示器（生成实例感知的点级提示）和文本提示器（使用可学习提示），并引入原型损失减少类内方差以增强嵌入空间对齐。
contributions: 提出P3T，一种参数高效的提示调优方法，用于预训练3D视觉-语言模型。
引入原型损失，增强嵌入空间对齐，减少类内方差。
实验表明在分类和少样本学习上匹配或超越全微调，并在跨数据集设置下展现鲁棒泛化。
analysis.experiments: 在分类和少样本学习任务上进行了实验，结果匹配或超越全微调；跨数据集设置下展现鲁棒泛化。
limitations: 可能仅在特定3D VLM架构上验证。
原型损失的有效性可能依赖类别数量。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验充分，与3D视觉-语言模型方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出原型级点级提示调优方法，提升3D视觉-语言模型在下游任务中的泛化能力。

papers.title: The Price of Paranoia: Robust Risk-Sensitive Cooperation in Non-Stationary Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Cooperative equilibria are fragile. When agents learn alongside each other rather than in a fixed environment, the process of learning destabilizes the cooperation they are trying to sustain: every gradient step an agent takes shifts the distribution of actions its partner will play, turning a cooperative partner into a source of stochastic noise precisely where the cooperation decision is most sensitive. We study how this co-learning noise propagates through the structure of coordination games, and find that the cooperative equilibrium, even when strongly Pareto-dominant, is exponentially unstable under standard risk-neutral learning, collapsing irreversibly once partner noise crosses the game's critical cooperation threshold. The natural response to apply distributional robustness to hedge against partner uncertainty makes things strictly worse: risk-averse return objectives penalize the high-variance cooperative action relative to defection, widening the instability region rather than shrinking it, a paradox that reveals a fundamental mismatch between the domains where robustness is applied and instability originates. We resolve this by showing that robustness should target the policy gradient update variance induced by partner uncertainty, not the return distribution. This distinction yields an algorithm whose gradient updates are modulated by an online measure of partner unpredictability, provably expanding the cooperation basin in symmetric coordination games. To unify stability, sample complexity, and welfare consequences of this approach, we introduce the Price of Paranoia as the structural dual of the Price of Anarchy. Together with a novel Cooperation Window, it precisely characterizes how much welfare learning algorithms can recover under partner noise, pinning down the optimal degree of robustness as a closed-form balance between equilibrium stability and sample efficiency.

analysis.tldr: 合作均衡在共学噪声下指数级不稳定，风险厌恶反而加剧不稳定，提出针对梯度更新方差的鲁棒性方法扩大合作区域。
analysis.research_motivation: 多智能体强化学习中，智能体相互学习导致合作均衡脆弱，标准风险中性学习下合作极易崩溃，而现有鲁棒方法（风险厌恶）反而恶化问题，亟需新思路。
analysis.problem: 如何设计鲁棒的多智能体强化学习算法，在非平稳环境中维持合作均衡，避免共学噪声导致的合作崩溃。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 合作均衡在风险中性学习下指数级不稳定；风险厌恶（分布鲁棒）反而扩大不稳定区域，形成悖论。
analysis.method: 提出针对策略梯度更新方差（而非回报分布）的鲁棒性方法，利用在线伙伴不可预测性度量调节梯度更新，扩大对称协调博弈中的合作盆地。
contributions: 揭示共学噪声导致合作均衡指数级不稳定的现象，以及风险厌恶加剧不稳定的悖论。
提出针对梯度更新方差的鲁棒性算法，理论证明其扩大合作盆地。
引入“偏执代价”作为“无政府代价”的结构对偶，并定义“合作窗口”精确刻画鲁棒性与样本效率的权衡。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论分析主要针对对称协调博弈，非对称或更复杂博弈的适用性未知。
在线伙伴不可预测性度量的计算开销和实际实现细节未提及。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.reason: 理论创新强，揭示反直觉现象并给出解决方案，但缺乏实验验证，适合精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 合作均衡在共学噪声下指数级不稳定，风险厌恶反而加剧不稳定，提出针对梯度更新方差的鲁棒性方法扩大合作区域。

papers.title: Horizon-Constrained Rashomon Sets for Chaotic Forecasting
papers.abstract: Predictive multiplicity and chaotic dynamics represent two fundamental challenges in machine learning that have evolved independently despite their conceptual connections. We bridge this gap by introducing horizon-constrained Rashomon sets, a theoretical framework that characterizes how model multiplicity evolves with prediction horizon in chaotic systems. Unlike static prediction tasks where the Rashomon set remains fixed, chaos induces exponential divergence among initially similar models, fundamentally transforming the nature of predictive equivalence. We prove that the effective Rashomon set contracts exponentially with lead time at a rate determined by the maximum Lyapunov exponent and introduce Lyapunov-weighted metrics that provide tighter bounds on predictive disagreement. Leveraging these insights, we develop decision-aligned selection algorithms that choose among near-optimal models based on downstream utility rather than forecast accuracy alone. Extensive experiments on synthetic chaotic systems (Lorenz-96, Kuramoto-Sivashinsky) and real-world applications (wind power, traffic, weather) demonstrate that our framework improves decision quality by 18-34\% while maintaining competitive predictive performance. This work establishes the first rigorous connection between chaos theory and predictive multiplicity, providing principled guidance for deploying machine learning in safety-critical chaotic domains.

analysis.tldr: 提出地平线约束的Rashomon集理论，揭示混沌系统中模型多重性随预测时域指数收缩的规律，并开发决策对齐的模型选择算法。
analysis.research_motivation: 预测多重性和混沌动力学是机器学习中两个独立发展的基本挑战，但它们在概念上存在联系，现有研究缺乏对混沌系统中模型多重性动态演化的理论理解。
analysis.problem: 如何刻画混沌系统中预测模型的多重性随预测时域的变化，并利用该理论指导模型选择以提升下游决策质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出地平线约束的Rashomon集理论框架，证明有效Rashomon集以最大Lyapunov指数决定的速率随提前时间指数收缩；引入Lyapunov加权度量以提供更紧的预测分歧界；开发决策对齐的模型选择算法，基于下游效用而非仅预测精度选择近优模型。
contributions: 首次建立混沌理论与预测多重性之间的严格联系。
提出地平线约束的Rashomon集理论，揭示混沌系统中模型多重性随预测时域指数收缩的规律。
引入Lyapunov加权度量并提供更紧的预测分歧界。
开发决策对齐的模型选择算法，在合成和真实混沌系统上提升决策质量18-34%。
analysis.experiments: 在合成混沌系统（Lorenz-96, Kuramoto-Sivashinsky）和真实应用（风电、交通、天气）上进行实验，决策质量提升18-34%，同时保持竞争性预测性能。
limitations: 理论框架可能依赖于混沌系统的可预测性假设，对非混沌或弱混沌系统适用性未知。
决策对齐算法需要定义下游效用函数，可能在某些场景下难以获取。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on time series and dynamical systems
analysis.reason: 理论创新强，实验充分，对混沌预测和模型选择有重要指导意义。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出地平线约束的Rashomon集理论，揭示混沌系统中模型多重性随预测时域指数收缩的规律，并开发决策对齐的模型选择算法。

papers.title: Self-Supervised Angular Deblurring in Photoacoustic Reconstruction via Noisier2Inverse
papers.abstract: Photoacoustic tomography (PAT) is an emerging imaging modality that combines the complementary strengths of optical contrast and ultrasonic resolution. A central task is image reconstruction, where measured acoustic signals are used to recover the initial pressure distribution. For ideal point-like or line-like detectors, several efficient and fast reconstruction algorithms exist, including Fourier methods, filtered backprojection, and time reversal. However, when applied to data acquired with finite-size detectors, these methods yield systematically blurred images. Although sharper images can be obtained by compensating for finite-detector effects, supervised learning approaches typically require ground-truth images that may not be available in practice. We propose a self-supervised reconstruction method based on Noisier2Inverse that addresses finite-size detector effects without requiring ground-truth data. Our approach operates directly on noisy measurements and learns to recover high-quality PAT images in a ground-truth-free manner. Its key components are: (i) PAT-specific modeling that recasts the problem as angular deblurring; (ii) a Noisier2Inverse formulation in the polar domain that leverages the known angular point-spread function; and (iii) a novel, statistically grounded early-stopping rule. In experiments, the proposed method consistently outperforms alternative approaches that do not use supervised data and achieves performance close to supervised benchmarks, while remaining practical for real acquisitions with finite-size detectors.

papers.title: Hierarchical Active Inference using Successor Representations
papers.abstract: Active inference, a neurally-inspired model for inferring actions based on the free energy principle (FEP), has been proposed as a unifying framework for understanding perception, action, and learning in the brain. Active inference has previously been used to model ecologically important tasks such as navigation and planning, but scaling it to solve complex large-scale problems in real-world environments has remained a challenge. Inspired by the existence of multi-scale hierarchical representations in the brain, we propose a model for planning of actions based on hierarchical active inference. Our approach combines a hierarchical model of the environment with successor representations for efficient planning. We present results demonstrating (1) how lower-level successor representations can be used to learn higher-level abstract states, (2) how planning based on active inference at the lower-level can be used to bootstrap and learn higher-level abstract actions, and (3) how these learned higher-level abstract states and actions can facilitate efficient planning. We illustrate the performance of the approach on several planning and reinforcement learning (RL) problems including a variant of the well-known four rooms task, a key-based navigation task, a partially observable planning problem, the Mountain Car problem, and PointMaze, a family of navigation tasks with continuous state and action spaces. Our results represent, to our knowledge, the first application of learned hierarchical state and action abstractions to active inference in FEP-based theories of brain function.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于后继表征的分层主动推理模型，实现高效规划与强化学习。

papers.title: HyCal: A Training-Free Prototype Calibration Method for Cross-Discipline Few-Shot Class-Incremental Learning
papers.abstract: Pretrained Vision-Language Models (VLMs) like CLIP show promise in continual learning, but existing Few-Shot Class-Incremental Learning (FSCIL) methods assume homogeneous domains and balanced data distributions, limiting real-world applicability where data arises from heterogeneous disciplines with imbalanced sample availability and varying visual complexity. We identify Domain Gravity, a representational asymmetry where data imbalance across heterogeneous domains causes overrepresented or low-entropy domains to disproportionately influence the embedding space, leading to prototype drift and degraded performance on underrepresented or high-entropy domains. To address this, we introduce Cross-Discipline Variable Few-Shot Class-Incremental Learning (XD-VSCIL), a benchmark capturing real-world heterogeneity and imbalance where Domain Gravity naturally intensifies. We propose Hybrid Prototype Calibration (HyCal), a training-free method combining cosine similarity and Mahalanobis distance to capture complementary geometric properties-directional alignment and covariance-aware magnitude-yielding stable prototypes under imbalanced heterogeneous conditions. Operating on frozen CLIP embeddings, HyCal achieves consistent retention-adaptation improvements while maintaining efficiency. Experiments show HyCal effectively mitigates Domain Gravity and outperforms existing methods in imbalanced cross-domain incremental learning.

analysis.tldr: 提出HyCal，一种无需训练的原型校准方法，用于跨学科少样本类增量学习，缓解域引力导致的原型漂移。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有FSCIL方法假设同质域和平衡数据分布，无法处理真实世界中来自异质学科、样本不平衡和视觉复杂度变化的数据，导致性能下降。
analysis.problem: 解决跨学科少样本类增量学习中的域引力问题，即数据不平衡导致过表示或低熵域主导嵌入空间，造成原型漂移。

analysis.method: 提出HyCal，一种无需训练的方法，结合余弦相似度和马氏距离来捕获方向对齐和协方差感知幅度，在冻结的CLIP嵌入上生成稳定原型。
contributions: 识别了域引力现象并形式化跨学科变量少样本类增量学习（XD-VSCIL）基准。

analysis.experiments: 实验表明HyCal有效缓解域引力，在跨学科不平衡增量学习中优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖CLIP嵌入的固定质量，在极端域偏移下效果有限。
未探索训练或微调策略，可能无法适应更复杂的动态场景。

papers.title: PixDLM: A Dual-Path Multimodal Language Model for UAV Reasoning Segmentation
papers.abstract: Reasoning segmentation has recently expanded from ground-level scenes to remote-sensing imagery, yet UAV data poses distinct challenges, including oblique viewpoints, ultra-high resolutions, and extreme scale variations. To address these issues, we formally define the UAV Reasoning Segmentation task and organize its semantic requirements into three dimensions: Spatial, Attribute, and Scene-level reasoning. Based on this formulation, we construct DRSeg, a large-scale benchmark for UAV reasoning segmentation, containing 10k high-resolution aerial images paired with Chain-of-Thought QA supervision across all three reasoning types. As a benchmark companion, we introduce PixDLM, a simple yet effective pixel-level multimodal language model that serves as a unified baseline for this task. Experiments on DRSeg establish strong baseline results and highlight the unique challenges of UAV reasoning segmentation, providing a solid foundation for future research.

analysis.tldr: 提出无人机推理分割任务、构建DRSeg基准并设计PixDLM双路径多模态语言模型作为统一基线。

papers.title: CPU Optimization of a Monocular 3D Biomechanics Pipeline for Low-Resource Deployment
papers.abstract: Markerless 3D movement analysis from monocular video enables accessible biomechanical assessment in clinical and sports settings. However, most research-grade pipelines rely on GPU acceleration, limiting deployment on consumer-grade hardware and in low-resource environments. In this work, we optimize a monocular 3D biomechanics pipeline derived from the MonocularBiomechanics framework for efficient CPU-only execution. Through profiling-driven system optimization, including model initialization restructuring, elimination of disk I/O serialization, and improved CPU parallelization. Experiments on a consumer workstation (AMD Ryzen 7 9700X CPU) show a 2.47x increase in processing throughput and a 59.6\% reduction in total runtime, with initialization latency reduced by 4.6x. Despite these changes, biomechanical outputs remain highly consistent with the baseline implementation (mean joint-angle deviation 0.35$^\circ$, $r=0.998$). These results demonstrate that research-grade vision-based biomechanics pipelines can be deployed on commodity CPU hardware for scalable movement assessment.

analysis.tldr: 通过CPU优化实现单目3D生物力学流水线在低资源设备上的高效部署。

papers.title: CodeMMR: Bridging Natural Language, Code, and Image for Unified Retrieval
papers.abstract: Code search, framed as information retrieval (IR), underpins modern software engineering and increasingly powers retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), improving code discovery, reuse, and the reliability of LLM-based coding. Yet existing code IR models remain largely text-centric and often overlook the visual and structural aspects inherent in programming artifacts such as web interfaces, data visualizations, SVGs, schematic diagrams, and UML. To bridge this gap, we introduce MMCoIR, the first comprehensive benchmark for evaluating multimodal code IR across five visual domains, eight programming languages, eleven libraries, and show the challenge of the task through extensive evaluation. Therefore, we then propose CodeMMR, a unified retrieval model that jointly embeds natural language, code, and images into a shared semantic space through instruction-based multimodal alignment. CodeMMR achieves strong generalization across modalities and languages, outperforming competitive baselines (e.g., UniIR, GME, VLM2Vec) by an average of 10 points on nDCG@10. Moreover, integrating CodeMMR into RAG enhances code generation fidelity and visual grounding on unseen code generation tasks, underscoring the potential of multimodal retrieval as a core enabler for next-generation intelligent programming systems. Datasets are available at HuggingFace.

analysis.tldr: 提出CodeMMR统一检索模型，通过指令对齐将自然语言、代码和图像嵌入共享语义空间，在跨模态代码检索任务上显著超越现有基线。
