papers.title: From Zero to Detail: A Progressive Spectral Decoupling Paradigm for UHD Image Restoration with New Benchmark
papers.abstract: Ultra-high-definition (UHD) image restoration poses unique challenges due to the high spatial resolution, diverse content, and fine-grained structures present in UHD images. To address these issues, we introduce a progressive spectral decomposition for the restoration process, decomposing it into three stages: zero-frequency \textbf{enhancement}, low-frequency \textbf{restoration}, and high-frequency \textbf{refinement}. Based on this formulation, we propose a novel framework, \textbf{ERR}, which integrates three cooperative sub-networks: the zero-frequency enhancer (ZFE), the low-frequency restorer (LFR), and the high-frequency refiner (HFR). The ZFE incorporates global priors to learn holistic mappings, the LFR reconstructs the main content by focusing on coarse-scale information, and the HFR adopts our proposed frequency-windowed Kolmogorov-Arnold Network (FW-KAN) to recover fine textures and intricate details for high-fidelity restoration. To further advance research in UHD image restoration, we also construct a large-scale, high-quality benchmark dataset, \textbf{LSUHDIR}, comprising 82{,}126 UHD images with diverse scenes and rich content. Our proposed methods demonstrate superior performance across a range of UHD image restoration tasks, and extensive ablation studies confirm the contribution and necessity of each module. Project page: https://github.com/NJU-PCALab/ERR.

analysis.tldr: 提出渐进式频谱解耦范式ERR，将UHD图像恢复分解为三个频率阶段，并构建大规模基准数据集LSUHDIR。
analysis.research_motivation: UHD图像的高空间分辨率、多样内容和精细结构给恢复带来独特挑战，现有方法难以同时处理全局映射和细节纹理。
analysis.problem: 如何有效恢复UHD图像中的全局结构、主要内容和高频细节。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出ERR框架，包含零频增强器(ZFE)、低频恢复器(LFR)和高频精炼器(HFR)，其中HFR采用频率窗口KAN(FW-KAN)恢复精细纹理。
contributions: 提出渐进式频谱解耦范式，将UHD恢复分解为零频增强、低频恢复和高频精炼三阶段。
构建大规模UHD图像恢复基准数据集LSUHDIR，包含82,126张图像。
analysis.experiments: 在多个UHD图像恢复任务上展示优越性能，并通过消融研究验证各模块贡献。

papers.title: Towards Realistic Open-Vocabulary Remote Sensing Segmentation: Benchmark and Baseline
papers.abstract: Open-vocabulary remote sensing image segmentation (OVRSIS) remains underexplored due to fragmented datasets, limited training diversity, and the lack of evaluation benchmarks that reflect realistic geospatial application demands. Our previous \textit{OVRSISBenchV1} established an initial cross-dataset evaluation protocol, but its limited scope is insufficient for assessing realistic open-world generalization. To address this issue, we propose \textit{OVRSISBenchV2}, a large-scale and application-oriented benchmark for OVRSIS. We first construct \textbf{OVRSIS95K}, a balanced dataset of about 95K image--mask pairs covering 35 common semantic categories across diverse remote sensing scenes. Built upon OVRSIS95K and 10 downstream datasets, OVRSISBenchV2 contains 170K images and 128 categories, substantially expanding scene diversity, semantic coverage, and evaluation difficulty. Beyond standard open-vocabulary segmentation, it further includes downstream protocols for building extraction, road extraction, and flood detection, thereby better reflecting realistic geospatial application demands and complex deployment scenarios. We also propose \textbf{Pi-Seg}, a baseline for OVRSIS. Pi-Seg improves transferability through a \textbf{positive-incentive noise} mechanism, where learnable and semantically guided perturbations broaden the visual-text feature space during training. Extensive experiments on OVRSISBenchV1, OVRSISBenchV2, and downstream tasks show that Pi-Seg delivers strong and consistent results, particularly on the more challenging OVRSISBenchV2 benchmark. Our results highlight both the importance of realistic benchmark design and the effectiveness of perturbation-based transfer for OVRSIS. The code and datasets are available at \href{https://github.com/LiBingyu01/RSKT-Seg/tree/Pi-Seg}{LiBingyu01/RSKT-Seg/tree/Pi-Seg}.

analysis.tldr: 提出大规模遥感开放词汇分割基准OVRSISBenchV2和基线方法Pi-Seg，通过正激励噪声机制提升跨域迁移能力。

papers.title: SPLIT: Self-supervised Partitioning for Learned Inversion in Nonlinear Tomography
papers.abstract: Machine learning has achieved impressive performance in tomographic reconstruction, but supervised training requires paired measurements and ground-truth images that are often unavailable. This has motivated self-supervised approaches, which have primarily addressed denoising and, more recently, linear inverse problems. We address nonlinear inverse problems and introduce SPLIT (Self-supervised Partitioning for Learned Inversion in Nonlinear Tomography), a self-supervised machine-learning framework for reconstructing images from nonlinear, incomplete, and noisy projection data without any samples of ground-truth images. SPLIT enforces cross-partition consistency and measurement-domain fidelity while exploiting complementary information across multiple partitions. Our main theoretical result shows that, under mild conditions, the proposed self-supervised objective is equivalent to its supervised counterpart in expectation. We regularize training with an automatic stopping rule that halts optimization when a no-reference image-quality surrogate saturates. As a concrete application, we derive SPLIT variants for multispectral computed tomography. Experiments on sparse-view acquisitions demonstrate high reconstruction quality and robustness to noise, surpassing classical iterative reconstruction and recent self-supervised baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出自监督框架SPLIT，用于非线性层析成像重建，无需配对数据。
analysis.research_motivation: 监督训练需要配对的测量值和真实图像，这在许多实际场景中难以获得，而现有自监督方法主要针对去噪和线性逆问题，无法处理非线性层析成像。
analysis.problem: 在非线性、不完整、有噪声的投影数据下，无需真实图像样本进行图像重建。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SPLIT框架，通过跨分区一致性和测量域保真度约束，利用多个分区的互补信息，并采用自动停止规则基于无参考图像质量代理进行正则化。
contributions: 提出首个针对非线性层析成像的自监督重建框架SPLIT，无需真实图像样本。
理论证明在温和条件下，自监督目标与监督目标期望等价。
在稀疏视角多光谱CT实验中，SPLIT超越经典迭代重建和近期自监督基线。
analysis.experiments: 在稀疏视角多光谱CT上进行实验，展示了高重建质量和噪声鲁棒性，超越经典迭代重建和近期自监督基线。
limitations: 理论等价性依赖于温和条件，实际中可能不完全满足。
自动停止规则依赖无参考图像质量代理，其有效性可能受限于代理质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: unsupervised, self-supervised, semi-supervised, and supervised representation learning
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，理论有贡献，实验验证有效，但应用领域较专，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自监督框架SPLIT，用于非线性层析成像重建，无需配对数据。

papers.title: HyperGVL: Benchmarking and Improving Large Vision-Language Models in Hypergraph Understanding and Reasoning
papers.abstract: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) consistently require new arenas to guide their expanding boundaries, yet their capabilities with hypergraphs remain unexplored. In the real world, hypergraphs have significant practical applications in areas such as life sciences and social communities. Recent advancements in LVLMs have shown promise in understanding complex topologies, yet there remains a lack of a benchmark to delineate the capabilities of LVLMs with hypergraphs, leaving the boundaries of their abilities unclear. To fill this gap, in this paper, we introduce $\texttt{HyperGVL}$, the first benchmark to evaluate the proficiency of LVLMs in hypergraph understanding and reasoning. $\texttt{HyperGVL}$ provides a comprehensive assessment of 12 advanced LVLMs across 84,000 vision-language question-answering (QA) samples spanning 12 tasks, ranging from basic component counting to complex NP-hard problem reasoning. The involved hypergraphs contain multiscale synthetic structures and real-world citation and protein networks. Moreover, we examine the effects of 12 textual and visual hypergraph representations and introduce a generalizable router $\texttt{WiseHyGR}$ that improves LVLMs in hypergraph via learning adaptive representations. We believe that this work is a step forward in connecting hypergraphs with LVLMs.

analysis.tldr: 首个超图理解与推理基准HyperGVL，评估12个LVLM在12个任务上的表现，并提出自适应表示路由器WiseHyGR。
analysis.research_motivation: 超图在现实世界（如生命科学、社交网络）有重要应用，但现有LVLM在超图理解与推理方面的能力尚未被系统评估，缺乏相关基准。
analysis.problem: 缺乏评估LVLM在超图理解与推理能力的基准，且现有LVLM对超图表示（文本/视觉）的适应性不足。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含84,000个视觉-语言QA样本的基准HyperGVL，覆盖12个任务（从基础计数到NP-hard推理），包含多尺度合成结构与真实网络；提出WiseHyGR路由器，通过学习自适应表示提升LVLM性能。
contributions: 首次提出超图理解与推理基准HyperGVL，系统评估12个先进LVLM。
提出WiseHyGR路由器，通过自适应表示学习提升LVLM在超图任务上的表现。
analysis.experiments: 评估了12个LVLM在84,000个样本上的表现，涵盖12个任务，涉及合成与真实超图。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅关注特定超图表示，未覆盖所有可能表示形式。
WiseHyGR的泛化能力可能受限于训练数据分布。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 首个超图LVLM基准，方法创新且应用价值高，但实验细节有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个超图理解与推理基准HyperGVL，评估12个LVLM在12个任务上的表现，并提出自适应表示路由器WiseHyGR。

papers.title: HYPERHEURIST: A Simulated Annealing-Based Control Framework for LLM-Driven Code Generation in Optimized Hardware Design
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown promising progress for generating Register Transfer Level (RTL) hardware designs, largely because they can rapidly propose alternative architectural realizations. However, single-shot LLM generation struggles to consistently produce designs that are both functionally correct and power-efficient. This paper proposes HYPERHEURIST, a simulated annealing-based control framework that treats LLM-generated RTL as intermediate candidates rather than final designs. The suggested system not only focuses on functionality correctness but also on Power-Performance-Area (PPA) optimization. In the first phase, RTL candidates are filtered through compilation, structural checks, and simulation to identify functionally valid designs. PPA optimization is restricted to RTL designs that have already passed compilation and simulation. Evaluated across eight RTL benchmarks, this staged approach yields more stable and repeatable optimization behavior than single-pass LLM-generated RTL.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于模拟退火的LLM控制框架，将LLM生成的RTL视为中间候选，通过编译、结构检查和仿真筛选后优化PPA，在8个基准上比单次生成更稳定。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM生成RTL硬件设计时单次生成难以同时保证功能正确和功耗效率，需要一种能迭代优化且保持功能正确性的控制方法。
analysis.problem: 如何利用LLM生成功能正确且功耗-性能-面积（PPA）优化的RTL硬件设计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 单次LLM生成的RTL设计在功能正确性和PPA优化上表现不稳定，而通过编译、结构检查和仿真筛选后再进行PPA优化能获得更稳定和可重复的优化行为。
analysis.method: 提出HYPERHEURIST框架，采用模拟退火算法控制LLM生成RTL候选，先通过编译、结构检查和仿真筛选出功能正确的设计，再对通过的设计进行PPA优化。
contributions: 提出一种模拟退火控制的LLM驱动RTL生成框架，将LLM输出视为中间候选而非最终设计。
通过分阶段筛选（编译、结构检查、仿真）确保功能正确性，再优化PPA，在8个RTL基准上验证了更稳定和可重复的优化效果。
analysis.experiments: 在8个RTL基准上评估，与单次LLM生成对比，显示分阶段方法产生更稳定和可重复的优化行为。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖特定LLM和模拟退火参数，泛化性需进一步验证。
仅评估了8个基准，规模有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有一定新意，但实验规模小且摘要未提供具体结果，与重点方向相关性中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于模拟退火的LLM控制框架，将LLM生成的RTL视为中间候选，通过编译、结构检查和仿真筛选后优化PPA，在8个基准上比单次生成更稳定。

papers.title: Conjunctive Prompt Attacks in Multi-Agent LLM Systems
papers.abstract: Most LLM safety work studies single-agent models, but many real applications rely on multiple interacting agents. In these systems, prompt segmentation and inter-agent routing create attack surfaces that single-agent evaluations miss. We study \emph{conjunctive prompt attacks}, where a trigger key in the user query and a hidden adversarial template in one compromised remote agent each appear benign alone but activate harmful behavior when routing brings them together. We consider an attacker who changes neither model weights nor the client agent and instead controls only trigger placement and template insertion. Across star, chain, and DAG topologies, routing-aware optimization substantially increases attack success over non-optimized baselines while keeping false activations low. Existing defenses, including PromptGuard, Llama-Guard variants, and system-level controls such as tool restrictions, do not reliably stop the attack because no single component appears malicious in isolation. These results expose a structural vulnerability in agentic LLM pipelines and motivate defenses that reason over routing and cross-agent composition. Code is available at https://github.com/UCF-ML-Research/ConjunctiveAgents.

analysis.tldr: 多智能体LLM系统中，路由组合使无害片段构成有害提示，现有防御失效。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM安全研究主要针对单智能体模型，但实际应用常涉及多个交互智能体，其提示分段和路由机制引入了新的攻击面，单智能体评估无法覆盖。
analysis.problem: 多智能体LLM系统中，攻击者利用路由组合将用户查询中的触发词与远程智能体中的隐藏对抗模板结合，构成有害行为，而现有防御无法检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在星型、链型和DAG拓扑中，路由感知优化显著提高攻击成功率，同时保持低误激活率；现有防御（如PromptGuard、Llama-Guard变体及工具限制）因单个组件看似无害而无法可靠阻止攻击。
analysis.method: 提出合取提示攻击，攻击者仅控制触发词放置和模板插入，不修改模型权重或客户端智能体，通过路由感知优化选择触发词和模板位置。
contributions: 定义并形式化多智能体LLM系统中的合取提示攻击。
在多种拓扑结构下展示路由感知优化可显著提升攻击成功率，并揭示现有防御的脆弱性。
analysis.experiments: 在星型、链型和DAG拓扑上评估攻击成功率，并与非优化基线比较；测试多种现有防御（PromptGuard、Llama-Guard变体、工具限制）的失效情况。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 攻击场景假设攻击者能控制一个远程智能体，实际中可能受限。
防御方法仅测试现有方案，未提出新防御。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 针对多智能体系统的新攻击面，方法创新且实验显示现有防御失效，但摘要未提供具体实验数据。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 多智能体LLM系统中，路由组合使无害片段构成有害提示，现有防御失效。

papers.title: Causal Bootstrapped Alignment for Unsupervised Video-Based Visible-Infrared Person Re-Identification
papers.abstract: VVI-ReID is a critical technique for all-day surveillance, where temporal information provides additional cues beyond static images. However, existing approaches rely heavily on fully supervised learning with expensive cross-modality annotations, limiting scalability. To address this issue, we investigate Unsupervised Learning for VVI-ReID (USL-VVI-ReID), which learns identity-discriminative representations directly from unlabeled video tracklets. Directly extending image-based USL-VI-ReID methods to this setting with generic pretrained encoders leads to suboptimal performance. Such encoders suffer from weak identity discrimination and strong modality bias, resulting in severe intra-modality identity confusion and pronounced clustering granularity imbalance between visible and infrared modalities. These issues jointly degrade pseudo-label reliability and hinder effective cross-modality alignment. To address these challenges, we propose a Causal Bootstrapped Alignment (CBA) framework that explicitly exploits inherent video priors. First, we introduce Causal Intervention Warm-up (CIW), which performs sequence-level causal interventions by leveraging temporal identity consistency and cross-modality identity consistency to suppress modality- and motion-induced spurious correlations while preserving identity-relevant semantics, yielding cleaner representations for unsupervised clustering. Second, we propose Prototype-Guided Uncertainty Refinement (PGUR), which employs a coarse-to-fine alignment strategy to resolve cross-modality granularity mismatch, reorganizing under-clustered infrared representations under the guidance of reliable visible prototypes with uncertainty-aware supervision. Extensive experiments on the HITSZ-VCM and BUPTCampus benchmarks demonstrate that CBA significantly outperforms existing USL-VI-ReID methods when extended to the USL-VVI-ReID setting.

analysis.tldr: 提出因果引导对齐框架，解决无监督视频可见光-红外行人重识别中的模态偏差和聚类粒度不匹配问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VVI-ReID方法依赖昂贵的跨模态全监督标注，限制了可扩展性；而直接迁移图像级无监督方法到视频场景，因通用预训练编码器存在弱身份判别和强模态偏差，导致伪标签不可靠和跨模态对齐困难。
analysis.problem: 无监督视频可见光-红外行人重识别（USL-VVI-ReID）中，如何从无标签视频片段学习身份判别性表征并实现有效的跨模态对齐。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通用预训练编码器存在弱身份判别和强模态偏差，导致严重的模态内身份混淆和可见光与红外模态间聚类粒度不平衡，进而降低伪标签可靠性并阻碍跨模态对齐。
analysis.method: 提出因果引导对齐（CBA）框架，包含因果干预预热（CIW）和原型引导不确定性精炼（PGUR）两个模块。CIW利用时序身份一致性和跨模态身份一致性进行序列级因果干预，抑制模态和运动引起的伪相关；PGUR采用粗到细对齐策略，在不确定性感知监督下用可靠可见光原型重组欠聚类的红外表征。
contributions: 首次系统研究无监督视频可见光-红外行人重识别（USL-VVI-ReID）问题，并揭示其关键挑战。
提出因果引导对齐（CBA）框架，通过因果干预和原型引导不确定性精炼有效缓解模态偏差和聚类粒度不匹配。
在HITSZ-VCM和BUPTCampus基准上取得显著优于现有方法的性能。
analysis.experiments: 在HITSZ-VCM和BUPTCampus两个基准数据集上进行实验，CBA显著优于现有USL-VI-ReID方法在USL-VVI-ReID设置下的扩展版本。
limitations: 可能依赖视频中时序一致性的假设，在快速运动或遮挡场景下效果可能下降。
未讨论跨数据集泛化能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强（因果干预+原型精炼），实验充分，但应用场景较专，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出因果引导对齐框架，解决无监督视频可见光-红外行人重识别中的模态偏差和聚类粒度不匹配问题。

papers.title: SIMMER: Cross-Modal Food Image--Recipe Retrieval via MLLM-Based Embedding
papers.abstract: Cross-modal retrieval between food images and recipe texts is an important task with applications in nutritional management, dietary logging, and cooking assistance. Existing methods predominantly rely on dual-encoder architectures with separate image and text encoders, requiring complex alignment strategies and task-specific network designs to bridge the semantic gap between modalities. In this work, we propose SIMMER (Single Integrated Multimodal Model for Embedding Recipes), which applies Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM)-based embedding models, specifically VLM2Vec, to this task, replacing the conventional dual-encoder paradigm with a single unified encoder that processes both food images and recipe texts. We design prompt templates tailored to the structured nature of recipes, which consist of a title, ingredients, and cooking instructions, enabling effective embedding generation by the MLLM. We further introduce a component-aware data augmentation strategy that trains the model on both complete and partial recipes, improving robustness to incomplete inputs. Experiments on the Recipe1M dataset demonstrate that SIMMER achieves state-of-the-art performance across both the 1k and 10k evaluation settings, substantially outperforming all prior methods. In particular, our best model improves the 1k image-to-recipe R@1 from 81.8\% to 87.5\% and the 10k image-to-recipe R@1 from 56.5\% to 65.5\% compared to the previous best method.

analysis.tldr: 提出SIMMER，用MLLM统一编码器替代双编码器，在Recipe1M上实现跨模态食品图像-食谱检索SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有跨模态食品图像-食谱检索方法依赖双编码器架构，需要复杂的对齐策略和任务特定网络设计来弥合模态间语义鸿沟，效率低且泛化性差。
analysis.problem: 如何用单一统一编码器替代双编码器，简化跨模态食品图像-食谱检索的架构并提升性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用MLLM（VLM2Vec）作为统一编码器，设计针对食谱结构（标题、配料、烹饪步骤）的提示模板，并提出组件感知数据增强策略，训练模型处理完整和部分食谱。
contributions: 首次将MLLM嵌入模型（VLM2Vec）应用于食品图像-食谱检索，取代传统双编码器范式。
设计食谱结构感知的提示模板和组件感知数据增强策略，提升对不完整输入的鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在Recipe1M数据集上，1k图像到食谱R@1从81.8%提升至87.5%，10k设置下从56.5%提升至65.5%，超越所有先前方法。
limitations: 仅评估了Recipe1M数据集，泛化性未知。
依赖MLLM的预训练质量，可能受限于模型容量。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新（MLLM统一编码器）且实验SOTA，与VLM/MLLM方向强相关，值得精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SIMMER，用MLLM统一编码器替代双编码器，在Recipe1M上实现跨模态食品图像-食谱检索SOTA。

papers.title: AdaVFM: Adaptive Vision Foundation Models for Edge Intelligence via LLM-Guided Execution
papers.abstract: Language-aligned vision foundation models (VFMs) enable versatile visual understanding for always-on contextual AI, but their deployment on edge devices is hindered by strict latency and power constraints. We present AdaVFM, an adaptive framework for efficient on-device inference of language-aligned VFMs that dynamically adjusts computation based on scene context and task complexity. Our key insight is that the effect of model size reduction on performance is task-dependent in vision applications, motivating a runtime-adaptive execution strategy. AdaVFM integrates neural architecture search (NAS) into the language-aligned VFM backbone to enable lightweight subnet execution during runtime. A multimodal large language model (LLM) deployed on the cloud enables runtime control with a context-aware agent. This synergy allows efficient model adaptation under diverse conditions while maintaining strong accuracy. Extensive experiments on zero-shot classification and open-vocabulary segmentation demonstrate that AdaVFM achieves state-of-the-art accuracy-efficiency trade-offs, surpassing prior baselines by up to $7.9\%$ in acc@1 on IN1K and $5.2\%$ mIoU on ADE20K over the best models of comparable VFM sizes. For models with similar accuracy, AdaVFM further reduces average FLOPs by up to $77.9\%$.

analysis.tldr: AdaVFM通过LLM引导的运行时自适应执行，在边缘设备上实现语言对齐视觉基础模型的高效推理，达到精度-效率最优权衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 语言对齐视觉基础模型（VFM）在边缘设备部署时面临严格的延迟和功耗限制，现有方法无法动态适应场景和任务复杂度。
analysis.problem: 如何在边缘设备上实现语言对齐VFM的高效推理，同时保持高精度？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型尺寸缩减对性能的影响具有任务依赖性，这启发了运行时自适应执行策略。
analysis.method: 将神经架构搜索（NAS）集成到语言对齐VFM骨干中，支持运行时轻量子网执行；云端多模态大语言模型（LLM）作为上下文感知代理进行运行时控制。
contributions: 提出AdaVFM框架，结合NAS和LLM实现边缘设备上VFM的自适应推理
在零样本分类和开放词汇分割任务上达到SOTA精度-效率权衡，FLOPs降低高达77.9%
analysis.experiments: 在零样本分类（IN1K）和开放词汇分割（ADE20K）上实验，acc@1提升7.9%，mIoU提升5.2%，FLOPs降低77.9%。
limitations: 依赖云端LLM进行运行时控制，可能引入通信延迟
NAS搜索空间可能限制子网多样性
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新结合NAS与LLM，实验充分且效果显著，与VLM和边缘部署强相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AdaVFM通过LLM引导的运行时自适应执行，在边缘设备上实现语言对齐视觉基础模型的高效推理，达到精度-效率最优权衡。

papers.title: Rethinking the Necessity of Adaptive Retrieval-Augmented Generation through the Lens of Adaptive Listwise Ranking
papers.abstract: Adaptive Retrieval-Augmented Generation aims to mitigate the interference of extraneous noise by dynamically determining the necessity of retrieving supplementary passages. However, as Large Language Models evolve with increasing robustness to noise, the necessity of adaptive retrieval warrants re-evaluation. In this paper, we rethink this necessity and propose AdaRankLLM, a novel adaptive retrieval framework. To effectively verify the necessity of adaptive listwise reranking, we first develop an adaptive ranker employing a zero-shot prompt with a passage dropout mechanism, and compare its generation outcomes against static fixed-depth retrieval strategies. Furthermore, to endow smaller open-source LLMs with this precise listwise ranking and adaptive filtering capability, we introduce a two-stage progressive distillation paradigm enhanced by data sampling and augmentation techniques. Extensive experiments across three datasets and eight LLMs demonstrate that AdaRankLLM consistently achieves optimal performance in most scenarios with significantly reduced context overhead. Crucially, our analysis reveals a role shift in adaptive retrieval: it functions as a critical noise filter for weaker models to overcome their limitations, while serving as a cost-effective efficiency optimizer for stronger reasoning models.

analysis.tldr: 提出AdaRankLLM框架，通过自适应列表排序验证检索增强生成中自适应检索的必要性，发现其对弱模型是噪声过滤器，对强模型是效率优化器。
analysis.research_motivation: 随着LLM对噪声的鲁棒性增强，自适应检索的必要性需要重新评估，以平衡性能与效率。
analysis.problem: 现有自适应检索方法在强模型上可能冗余，需要验证其必要性并设计高效框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 自适应检索对弱模型起噪声过滤作用，对强模型则主要提升效率而非性能。
analysis.method: 提出AdaRankLLM，包括零样本提示的passage dropout自适应排序器，以及两阶段渐进蒸馏范式（结合数据采样和增强）使小模型具备排序和过滤能力。
contributions: 重新评估了自适应检索在强噪声鲁棒LLM下的必要性，揭示了角色转变。
提出AdaRankLLM框架，通过自适应列表排序和蒸馏实现高效检索。
analysis.experiments: 在三个数据集和八个LLM上实验，AdaRankLLM在多数场景下达到最优性能并降低上下文开销。
limitations: 可能依赖特定排序器设计，泛化性需进一步验证。
蒸馏过程可能受限于教师模型质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分，揭示了自适应检索的新角色，对RAG领域有重要启示。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AdaRankLLM框架，通过自适应列表排序验证检索增强生成中自适应检索的必要性，发现其对弱模型是噪声过滤器，对强模型是效率优化器。

papers.title: Physics-Informed Neural Networks with Learnable Loss Balancing and Transfer Learning
papers.abstract: We propose a self-supervised physics-informed neural network (PINN) framework that adaptively balances physics-based and data-driven supervision for scientific machine learning under data scarcity. Unlike prior PINNs that rely on fixed or heuristic weighting of physics residuals and data loss, our approach introduces a learnable blending neuron that dynamically adjusts the relative contribution of each term based on their uncertainties. This mechanism enables stable training and improved generalization without manual tuning. To further enhance efficiency, we integrate a transfer learning strategy that reuses representations from related domains and adapts them to new physical systems with limited data. We validate the framework for the prediction of heat transfer in liquid-metal miniature heat sinks using only 87 CFD datapoints, where the adaptive PINN achieves an error <8%, outperforming shallow neural networks, kernel methods, and physics-only baselines. Our framework provides a general recipe for embedding physics adaptively into neural networks, offering a robust and reproducible approach for data-scarce problems across various scientific domains, including fluid dynamics and material modeling.

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应损失平衡和迁移学习的PINN框架，在数据稀缺下优于传统方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统PINN依赖固定或启发式权重平衡物理残差和数据损失，手动调参困难且泛化性差，尤其在数据稀缺场景下。
analysis.problem: 如何自适应地平衡物理约束和数据驱动监督，并利用迁移学习提升数据稀缺下的科学机器学习性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 引入可学习的混合神经元，基于不确定性动态调整物理残差和数据损失的权重；结合迁移学习，从相关领域复用表征并适应新物理系统。
contributions: 提出可学习的损失平衡机制，无需手动调参即可稳定训练并提升泛化。
集成迁移学习策略，在数据稀缺下高效适应新物理系统。
analysis.experiments: 在液态金属微型散热器的热传递预测任务上，仅用87个CFD数据点，自适应PINN误差<8%，优于浅层神经网络、核方法和纯物理基线。
limitations: 仅在一个特定物理系统上验证，泛化性需更多实验。
迁移学习策略可能依赖源域与目标域的相似性。
analysis.primary_area_en: neurosymbolic & hybrid AI systems (physics-informed, logic & formal reasoning, etc.)
analysis.reason: 方法有创新性，实验验证有效，但应用场景较窄，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自适应损失平衡和迁移学习的PINN框架，在数据稀缺下优于传统方法。

papers.title: VoodooNet: Achieving Analytic Ground States via High-Dimensional Random Projections
papers.abstract: We present VoodooNet, a non-iterative neural architecture that replaces the stochastic gradient descent (SGD) paradigm with a closed-form analytic solution via Galactic Expansion. By projecting input manifolds into a high-dimensional, high-entropy "Galactic" space ($d \gg 784$), we demonstrate that complex features can be untangled without the thermodynamic cost of backpropagation. Utilizing the Moore-Penrose pseudoinverse to solve for the output layer in a single step, VoodooNet achieves a classification accuracy of \textbf{98.10\% on MNIST} and \textbf{86.63\% on Fashion-MNIST}. Notably, our results on Fashion-MNIST surpass a 10-epoch SGD baseline (84.41\%) while reducing the training time by orders of magnitude. We observe a near-logarithmic scaling law between dimensionality and accuracy, suggesting that performance is a function of "Galactic" volume rather than iterative refinement. This "Magic Hat" approach offers a new frontier for real-time Edge AI, where the traditional training phase is bypassed in favor of instantaneous manifold discovery.

analysis.tldr: VoodooNet 通过高维随机投影和闭式解替代 SGD，在 MNIST 和 Fashion-MNIST 上实现快速高精度分类。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统 SGD 训练需要迭代和大量计算资源，不适合实时边缘 AI 场景；探索非迭代、低计算成本的神经网络训练方法具有重要应用价值。
analysis.problem: 如何在不使用反向传播和迭代优化的情况下，实现神经网络的快速训练和高精度分类。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到分类精度与投影维度呈近对数缩放关系，表明性能主要依赖于高维空间的体积而非迭代优化。
analysis.method: 提出 VoodooNet 架构：将输入投影到高维随机空间（d >> 784），利用 Moore-Penrose 伪逆一步求解输出层权重，实现闭式解析解。
contributions: 提出一种非迭代的神经网络架构，通过高维随机投影和伪逆实现闭式训练。
在 MNIST 和 Fashion-MNIST 上验证了方法的高效性，训练时间比 SGD 减少数个数量级。
analysis.experiments: 在 MNIST 上达到 98.10% 准确率，在 Fashion-MNIST 上达到 86.63%，超过 10 轮 SGD 基线（84.41%）。
limitations: 仅在小规模图像分类任务上验证，未在更大或更复杂数据集上测试。
高维投影可能带来存储和计算开销，实际边缘设备部署需进一步评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 方法有一定新意，但实验规模较小，与主流 VLM/生成模型方向关联弱，适合作为新方法参考。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: VoodooNet 通过高维随机投影和闭式解替代 SGD，在 MNIST 和 Fashion-MNIST 上实现快速高精度分类。

papers.title: GaussianFlow SLAM: Monocular Gaussian Splatting SLAM Guided by GaussianFlow
papers.abstract: Gaussian splatting has recently gained traction as a compelling map representation for SLAM systems, enabling dense and photo-realistic scene modeling. However, its application to monocular SLAM remains challenging due to the lack of reliable geometric cues from monocular input. Without geometric supervision, mapping or tracking could fall in local-minima, resulting in structural degeneracies and inaccuracies. To address this challenge, we propose GaussianFlow SLAM, a monocular 3DGS-SLAM that leverages optical flow as a geometry-aware cue to guide the optimization of both the scene structure and camera poses. By encouraging the projected motion of Gaussians, termed GaussianFlow, to align with the optical flow, our method introduces consistent structural cues to regularize both map reconstruction and pose estimation. Furthermore, we introduce normalized error-based densification and pruning modules to refine inactive and unstable Gaussians, thereby contributing to improved map quality and pose accuracy. Experiments conducted on public datasets demonstrate that our method achieves superior rendering quality and tracking accuracy compared with state-of-the-art algorithms. The source code is available at: https://github.com/url-kaist/gaussianflow-slam.

analysis.tldr: 提出高斯流引导的单目3DGS-SLAM，利用光流作为几何线索优化场景结构和相机位姿。
analysis.research_motivation: 高斯泼溅在SLAM中作为地图表示具有潜力，但单目输入缺乏可靠几何线索，导致结构退化和不准确。
analysis.problem: 单目SLAM中缺乏几何监督导致高斯泼溅地图表示的结构退化与位姿估计不准确。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出GaussianFlow SLAM，利用光流作为几何感知线索，通过约束高斯投影运动（GaussianFlow）与光流对齐来正则化地图重建和位姿估计，并引入基于归一化误差的稠密化和剪枝模块。
contributions: 提出GaussianFlow SLAM，首次将光流作为几何线索用于单目3DGS-SLAM。
引入GaussianFlow对齐约束和归一化误差驱动的稠密化/剪枝模块，提升地图质量和位姿精度。
analysis.experiments: 在公开数据集上实验，与最先进算法相比，渲染质量和跟踪精度更优。
limitations: 可能依赖光流估计的准确性。
未提及对动态场景的鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，结合光流与3DGS解决单目SLAM几何线索缺失问题，实验验证有效，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出高斯流引导的单目3DGS-SLAM，利用光流作为几何线索优化场景结构和相机位姿。

papers.title: CLIMB: Controllable Longitudinal Brain Image Generation using Mamba-based Latent Diffusion Model and Gaussian-aligned Autoencoder
papers.abstract: Latent diffusion models have emerged as powerful generative models in medical imaging, enabling the synthesis of high quality brain magnetic resonance imaging scans. In particular, predicting the evolution of a patients brain can aid in early intervention, prognosis, and treatment planning. In this study, we introduce CLIMB, Controllable Longitudinal brain Image generation via state space based latent diffusion model, an advanced framework for modeling temporal changes in brain structure. CLIMB is designed to model the structural evolution of the brain structure over time, utilizing a baseline MRI scan and its acquisition age as foundational inputs. Additionally, multiple conditional variables, including projected age, gender, disease status, genetic information, and brain structure volumes, are incorporated to enhance the temporal modeling of anatomical changes. Unlike existing LDM methods that rely on self attention modules, which effectively capture contextual information from input images but are computationally expensive, our approach leverages state space, a state space model architecture that substantially reduces computational overhead while preserving high-quality image synthesis. Furthermore, we introduce a Gaussian-aligned autoencoder that extracts latent representations conforming to prior distributions without the sampling noise inherent in conventional variational autoencoders. We train and evaluate our proposed model on the Alzheimers Disease Neuroimaging Initiative dataset, consisting of 6,306 MRI scans from 1,390 participants. By comparing generated images with real MRI scans, CLIMB achieves a structural similarity index of 0.9433, demonstrating notable improvements over existing methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出CLIMB框架，利用基于状态空间模型的潜扩散模型和高斯对齐自编码器，实现可控的纵向脑MRI图像生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 预测患者脑部结构演变有助于早期干预、预后和治疗规划，但现有潜扩散模型依赖自注意力模块，计算成本高。
analysis.problem: 如何高效且可控地生成纵向脑MRI图像，以建模脑结构随时间的变化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用状态空间模型（Mamba）替代自注意力模块构建潜扩散模型，并引入高斯对齐自编码器提取符合先验分布的潜表示，避免变分自编码器的采样噪声。
contributions: 提出CLIMB框架，结合状态空间模型与潜扩散模型，降低计算开销并保持高质量图像合成。
引入高斯对齐自编码器，生成符合先验分布的潜表示，提升生成质量。
analysis.experiments: 在ADNI数据集（6306张MRI扫描，1390名参与者）上训练和评估，CLIMB的结构相似性指数达到0.9433，优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定数据集（ADNI），泛化性未验证。
未提及对疾病进展预测的临床有效性评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新（状态空间模型替代自注意力）且实验指标显著，但应用领域较专，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CLIMB框架，利用基于状态空间模型的潜扩散模型和高斯对齐自编码器，实现可控的纵向脑MRI图像生成。

papers.title: Layout-Aware Representation Learning for Open-Set ID Fraud Discovery
papers.abstract: Identity-document fraud detection is not a stationary binary classification problem. Adaptive attackers modify templates and fabrication pipelines, making historical fraud labels stale, and successful forgeries recur at scale as coherent campaigns. We therefore study layout-aware representation learning for open-set fraud discovery rather than only closed-set classification. We adapt DINOv3 to the document domain via context-aware SimMIM fine-tuning and supervised metric learning with composite loss that encourages inter-class separability and intra-class compactness. The model is trained with U.S. IDs only. With a lightweight MLP and softmax classifier, the embedding achieves 99.83% layout classification accuracy on Canadian layouts. Moreover, on a dataset of 20,448 Canadian IDs, embedding-space analysis surfaces 276 adaptive physical-fraud cases, including 222 not surfaced by incumbent detectors. The embedding supports similarity-based expansion from a single confirmed seed to additional related cases not linked by conventional metadata graphs. The layout-aware document embeddings provide a production-aligned basis for discovering novel and campaign-scale fraud under distribution shift.

analysis.tldr: 提出布局感知表征学习，在开放集身份欺诈发现中超越传统闭集分类，仅用美国ID训练即可检测加拿大欺诈案例。
analysis.research_motivation: 身份文档欺诈检测不是静态二分类问题，攻击者不断修改模板和伪造流程，导致历史欺诈标签过时，且成功伪造会以大规模活动形式重复出现。
analysis.problem: 现有闭集分类方法无法适应分布偏移和开放集欺诈发现，需要布局感知的表征学习来检测未知欺诈模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出攻击者自适应修改模板和伪造流程，历史标签失效，伪造活动规模化重复。
analysis.method: 将DINOv3适配到文档领域，通过上下文感知SimMIM微调和监督度量学习（复合损失鼓励类间分离和类内紧凑）训练布局感知嵌入，仅使用美国ID数据。
contributions: 提出布局感知表征学习框架用于开放集欺诈发现，而非仅闭集分类
通过上下文感知SimMIM和复合损失度量学习，实现跨域泛化（美国训练，加拿大测试）
在加拿大ID数据集上发现276个自适应物理欺诈案例，其中222个未被现有检测器发现
analysis.experiments: 在加拿大ID布局分类任务上达到99.83%准确率；在20,448张加拿大ID数据集中，嵌入空间分析发现276个自适应物理欺诈案例，其中222个未被现有检测器发现。
limitations: 仅使用美国ID训练，可能对其他地区ID泛化性有限
依赖轻量级MLP和softmax分类器，复杂场景下性能可能受限
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新（开放集+布局感知）且实验效果显著，但领域较专，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出布局感知表征学习，在开放集身份欺诈发现中超越传统闭集分类，仅用美国ID训练即可检测加拿大欺诈案例。

papers.title: MedMamba: Recasting Mamba for Medical Time Series Classification
papers.abstract: Medical time series, such as electrocardiograms (ECG) and electroencephalograms (EEG), exhibit complex temporal dynamics and structured cross-channel dependencies, posing fundamental challenges for automated analysis. Conventional convolutional and recurrent models struggle to capture long-range dependencies, while Transformer-based approaches incur quadratic complexity and often introduce redundant interactions that are misaligned with the intrinsic structure of physiological signals. To address these limitations, we propose MedMamba, a principle-driven multi-scale bidirectional state space architecture tailored for medical time series classification. Our design is guided by three key inductive biases of physiological signals: spatial centralization, multi-timescale temporal composition, and non-causal contextual dependency. These principles are instantiated through a lightweight channel-mixing module for cross-channel reparameterization, multi-scale convolutional tokenization for temporal decomposition, and bidirectional Mamba blocks for efficient global context modeling with linear complexity. Extensive experiments on six benchmark datasets spanning EEG, ECG, and human activity signals demonstrate that MedMamba consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods across diverse modalities. Notably, it achieves 85.97% accuracy on PTB and establishes new state-of-the-art performance on the challenging ADFTD dataset (54.72% accuracy and 52.01% F1-score). Strong results on long-sequence benchmarks, such as SleepEDF, further validate its capability in modeling long-range dependencies. Moreover, MedMamba achieves a speedup of 4.6x in inference, highlighting its practicality for real-time clinical deployment. These results suggest that principle-guided state space modeling offers an effective and scalable alternative to Transformer-based approaches for medical time series analysis.

analysis.tldr: 提出MedMamba，一种基于状态空间模型的多尺度双向架构，用于医学时间序列分类，在多个基准上取得SOTA并实现4.6倍推理加速。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学时间序列（如ECG、EEG）具有复杂的时间动态和跨通道依赖，传统CNN/RNN难以捕捉长程依赖，Transformer虽能建模但计算复杂度高且引入冗余交互，与生理信号内在结构不匹配。
analysis.problem: 如何设计高效且符合生理信号归纳偏好的架构，实现医学时间序列的准确分类。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MedMamba，包含三个核心模块：轻量级通道混合模块用于跨通道重参数化（空间集中性）、多尺度卷积分词用于时间分解（多时间尺度）、双向Mamba块用于高效全局上下文建模（非因果上下文依赖），整体复杂度为线性。
contributions: 提出基于状态空间模型的MedMamba架构，专门针对医学时间序列分类，融合三种生理信号归纳偏好。
在六个基准数据集上超越现有方法，在PTB上达85.97%准确率，在ADFTD上达54.72%准确率和52.01% F1，并实现4.6倍推理加速。
analysis.experiments: 在六个基准数据集（涵盖EEG、ECG和人类活动信号）上进行实验，与SOTA方法对比，报告了准确率、F1分数和推理速度。
limitations: 可能仅在特定医学时间序列模态上验证，泛化到其他生理信号需进一步测试。
双向Mamba块的设计可能增加模型复杂度，尽管复杂度为线性。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on time series and dynamical systems
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分且结果显著，与时间序列分类方向高度相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MedMamba，一种基于状态空间模型的多尺度双向架构，用于医学时间序列分类，在多个基准上取得SOTA并实现4.6倍推理加速。

papers.title: Adapting in the Dark: Efficient and Stable Test-Time Adaptation for Black-Box Models
papers.abstract: Test-Time Adaptation (TTA) for black-box models accessible only via APIs remains a largely unexplored challenge. Existing approaches such as post-hoc output refinement offer limited adaptive capacity, while Zeroth-Order Optimization (ZOO) enables input-space adaptation but faces high query costs and optimization challenges in the unsupervised TTA setting. We introduce BETA (Black-box Efficient Test-time Adaptation), a framework that addresses these limitations by employing a lightweight, local white-box steering model to create a tractable gradient pathway. Through a prediction harmonization technique combined with consistency regularization and prompt learning-oriented filtering, BETA enables stable adaptation with no additional API calls and negligible latency beyond standard inference. On ImageNet-C, BETA achieves a +7.1% accuracy gain on ViT-B/16 and +3.4% on CLIP, surpassing strong white-box and gray-box methods including TENT and TPT. On a commercial API, BETA achieves comparable performance to ZOO at 250x lower cost while maintaining real-time inference speed, establishing it as a practical and efficient solution for real-world black-box TTA.

analysis.tldr: 提出BETA框架，通过轻量级白盒引导模型实现黑盒测试时适应，无需额外API调用且延迟极低。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有黑盒测试时适应方法（如后验输出细化）适应能力有限，而零阶优化方法查询成本高且优化困难，亟需高效稳定的解决方案。
analysis.problem: 解决黑盒模型（仅通过API访问）在测试时适应中的高查询成本和优化不稳定问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 引入轻量级本地白盒引导模型，通过预测协调技术、一致性正则化和提示学习导向过滤，创建可处理的梯度路径，实现无需额外API调用的稳定适应。
contributions: 提出BETA框架，首次实现黑盒模型的高效稳定测试时适应，无需额外API调用。
在ImageNet-C上，BETA在ViT-B/16和CLIP上分别提升+7.1%和+3.4%准确率，超越TENT和TPT等强白盒/灰盒方法。
在商业API上，BETA以250倍更低成本达到与零阶优化相当的性能，同时保持实时推理速度。
analysis.experiments: 在ImageNet-C和商业API上进行实验，报告了准确率提升和成本对比。
limitations: 可能依赖白盒引导模型的质量和泛化能力。
未讨论在更复杂黑盒API（如限制输入输出格式）下的适用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实验充分，但主题与核心方向（VLM/生成等）关联中等，推荐精读。

papers.title: BOOKAGENT: Orchestrating Safety-Aware Visual Narratives via Multi-Agent Cognitive Calibration
papers.abstract: Recent advancements in Large Generative Models (LGMs) have revolutionized multi-modal generation. However, generating illustrated storybooks remains an open challenge, where prior works mainly decompose this task into separate stages, and thus, holistic multi-modal grounding remains limited. Besides, while safety alignment is studied for text- or image-only generation, existing works rarely integrate child-specific safety constraints into narrative planning and sequence-level multi-modal verification. To address these limitations, we propose BookAgent, a safety-aware multi-agent collaboration framework designed for high-quality, safety-aware visual narratives. Different from prior story visualization models that assume a fixed storyline sequence, BookAgent targets end-to-end storybook synthesis from a user draft by jointly planning, scripting, illustrating, and globally repairing inconsistencies. To ensure precise multi-modal grounding, BookAgent dynamically calibrates page-level alignment between textual scripts and visual layouts. Furthermore, BookAgent calibrates holistic consistency from the temporal dimension, by verifying-then-rectifying global inconsistencies in character identity and storytelling logic. Extensive experiments demonstrate that BookAgent significantly outperforms current methods in narrative coherence, visual consistency, and safety compliance, offering a robust paradigm for reliable agents in complex multi-modal creation. The implementation will be publicly released at https://github.com/bogao-code/BookAgent/tree/main.

analysis.tldr: 提出BookAgent，一个安全感知的多智能体协作框架，用于端到端故事书生成，通过多模态对齐和时序一致性校准提升叙事连贯性与安全性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有故事书生成方法将任务分解为独立阶段，缺乏整体多模态对齐；同时，文本或图像生成的安全对齐研究未融入儿童特定安全约束，导致叙事规划和序列级多模态验证不足。
analysis.problem: 如何实现端到端、安全感知的视觉叙事生成，确保文本与视觉的精确对齐以及时序上的人物身份和逻辑一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出BookAgent，一个多智能体协作框架，包含规划、脚本、插图生成和全局修复模块，通过页面级文本-视觉对齐校准和时序一致性验证-纠正机制实现安全感知的视觉叙事。
contributions: 提出首个安全感知的多智能体协作框架BookAgent，用于端到端故事书合成。
引入动态页面级对齐校准和时序一致性验证-纠正机制，提升多模态叙事连贯性和安全性。

papers.title: Imperfectly Cooperative Human-AI Interactions: Comparing the Impacts of Human and AI Attributes in Simulated and User Studies
papers.abstract: AI design characteristics and human personality traits each impact the quality and outcomes of human-AI interactions. However, their relative and joint impacts are underexplored in imperfectly cooperative scenarios, where people and AI only have partially aligned goals and objectives. This study compares a purely simulated dataset comprising 2,000 simulations and a parallel human subjects experiment involving 290 human participants to investigate these effects across two scenario categories: (1) hiring negotiations between human job candidates and AI hiring agents; and (2) human-AI transactions wherein AI agents may conceal information to maximize internal goals. We examine user Extraversion and Agreeableness alongside AI design characteristics, including Adaptability, Expertise, and chain-of-thought Transparency. Our causal discovery analysis extends performance-focused evaluations by integrating scenario-based outcomes, communication analysis, and questionnaire measures. Results reveal divergences between purely simulated and human study datasets, and between scenario types. In simulation experiments, personality traits and AI attributes were comparatively influential. Yet, with actual human subjects, AI attributes -- particularly transparency -- were much more impactful. We discuss how these divergences vary across different interaction contexts, offering crucial insights for the future of human-centered AI agents.

analysis.tldr: 模拟与用户研究中AI属性和人格特质对不完美合作人机交互的影响存在差异，AI透明度在真实用户中影响更大。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究分别探讨AI设计特征和人类人格特质对人机交互的影响，但在目标部分冲突的不完美合作场景中，两者的相对和联合影响尚未充分探索。
analysis.problem: 在不完美合作的人机交互中，AI属性（如适应性、专业性、透明度）和人类人格特质（如外向性、宜人性）如何分别及共同影响交互结果，以及模拟研究与真实用户研究的结果是否存在差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出模拟实验与真实用户研究的结果存在分歧：模拟中人格特质和AI属性影响相当，而真实用户研究中AI属性（尤其是透明度）影响更大；且这种差异因交互场景类型而异。
analysis.method: 通过对比纯模拟数据集（2000次模拟）和并行人类受试者实验（290名参与者），结合因果发现分析，评估场景结果、沟通分析和问卷测量。
contributions: 揭示了模拟研究与真实用户研究在不完美合作人机交互中的结果差异
发现AI透明度在真实用户交互中比人格特质更具影响力
analysis.experiments: 包含2000次模拟和290名人类参与者的实验，涵盖招聘谈判和交易两种场景，使用因果发现分析。摘要未提供具体实验结果数值。
limitations: 仅考察了两种特定场景（招聘谈判和交易），可能不适用于其他不完美合作场景
人格特质仅测量了外向性和宜人性，未涵盖其他可能相关的特质
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法对比模拟与用户研究有创新，但场景有限，适合关注人机交互对齐的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 模拟与用户研究中AI属性和人格特质对不完美合作人机交互的影响存在差异，AI透明度在真实用户中影响更大。

papers.title: PoInit-of-View: Poisoning Initialization of Views Transfers Across Multiple 3D Reconstruction Systems
papers.abstract: Poisoning input views of 3D reconstruction systems has been recently studied. However, we identify that existing studies simply backpropagate adversarial gradients through the 3D reconstruction pipeline as a whole, without uncovering the new vulnerability rooted in specific modules of the 3D reconstruction pipeline. In this paper, we argue that the structure-from-motion (SfM) initialization, as the geometric core of many widely used reconstruction systems, can be targeted to achieve transferable poisoning effects across diverse 3D reconstruction systems. To this end, we propose PoInit-of-View, which optimizes adversarial perturbations to intentionally introduce cross-view gradient inconsistencies at projections of corresponding 3D points. These inconsistencies disrupt keypoint detection and feature matching, thereby corrupting pose estimation and triangulation within SfM, eventually resulting in low-quality rendered views. We also provide a theoretical analysis that connects cross-view inconsistency to correspondence collapse. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our PoInit-of-View on diverse 3D reconstruction systems and datasets, surpassing the single-view baseline by 25.1% in PSNR and 16.5% in SSIM in black-box transfer settings, such as 3DGS to NeRF.

analysis.tldr: 通过攻击SfM初始化实现跨3D重建系统的可迁移投毒攻击。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D重建投毒研究仅简单反向传播对抗梯度，未挖掘特定模块的漏洞，而SfM初始化作为几何核心模块，其脆弱性尚未被利用。
analysis.problem: 如何通过攻击SfM初始化实现跨不同3D重建系统的可迁移投毒效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出PoInit-of-View，优化对抗扰动以在对应3D点的投影上引入跨视图梯度不一致性，破坏关键点检测和特征匹配，从而扰乱SfM中的位姿估计和三角化，最终导致低质量渲染视图。
contributions: 首次揭示SfM初始化模块作为3D重建系统可迁移投毒攻击的脆弱点。
提出PoInit-of-View方法，通过跨视图梯度不一致性实现高效投毒。
提供理论分析连接跨视图不一致性与对应关系崩溃。
analysis.experiments: 在多种3D重建系统和数据集上验证有效性，黑盒迁移设置（如3DGS到NeRF）中PSNR提升25.1%，SSIM提升16.5%。
limitations: 可能仅适用于基于SfM初始化的重建系统。
对抗扰动的可迁移性可能受限于不同系统的SfM实现差异。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较高，针对SfM初始化模块的攻击具有新意，实验显示显著效果，但应用场景较窄。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过攻击SfM初始化实现跨3D重建系统的可迁移投毒攻击。

papers.title: DataCenterGym: A Physics-Grounded Simulator for Multi-Objective Data Center Scheduling
papers.abstract: Modern datacenters schedule heterogeneous workloads across geo-distributed sites with diverse compute capacities, electricity prices, and thermal conditions. Compute utilization, heat generation, cooling demand, and energy consumption are tightly coupled, yet most existing schedulers abstract these effects and treat them independently. We present \textit{DataCenterGym}, a physics-grounded simulation environment for job scheduling in geo-distributed data centers, designed as a reusable testbed for future research. The simulator integrates compute queueing, building thermal dynamics, localized HVAC behavior, and temperature-dependent service degradation within a Gymnasium-compatible interface. We also develop a Hierarchical Model Predictive Control (H-MPC) scheduling algorithm that performs distributed job placement while explicitly accounting for thermal and power dynamics. Through experiments on nominal operation and workload sensitivity, we demonstrate how H-MPC improves scheduling performance relative to baseline schedulers.

analysis.tldr: DataCenterGym 是一个基于物理的仿真器，用于多目标数据中心调度，并提出了分层模型预测控制算法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有调度器将计算利用率、热量生成、冷却需求和能耗等耦合因素抽象化并独立处理，导致调度性能不佳。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个物理接地、可复用的仿真环境，并设计考虑热和功率动态的调度算法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 开发了 DataCenterGym 仿真器，集成计算排队、建筑热动态、局部 HVAC 行为和温度依赖的服务降级；提出分层模型预测控制（H-MPC）调度算法，进行分布式作业放置并显式考虑热和功率动态。
contributions: 提出 DataCenterGym，一个物理接地的仿真环境，用于地理分布式数据中心作业调度。
提出 H-MPC 调度算法，在名义运行和工作负载敏感性实验中优于基线调度器。
analysis.experiments: 在名义运行和工作负载敏感性实验上，H-MPC 相比基线调度器提升了调度性能。
limitations: 可能未考虑网络延迟或带宽限制。

papers.title: DALM: A Domain-Algebraic Language Model via Three-Phase Structured Generation
papers.abstract: Large language models compress heterogeneous knowledge into a single parameter space, allowing facts from different domains to interfere during generation. We propose DALM, a Domain-Algebraic Language Model that replaces unconstrained token generation with structured denoising over a domain lattice. DALM follows a three-phase generation path: it first resolves domain uncertainty, then relation uncertainty, and finally concept uncertainty, so each stage operates under explicit algebraic constraints. The framework requires only three ingredients: a lattice of domains with computable meet, join, and implication; a typing function over relations that controls inheritance across domains; and a fiber partition that localizes knowledge to domain-specific subsets. Given these ingredients, DALM yields a three-phase encoder-decoder architecture in which generation is confined to a domain fiber, cross-domain contamination is structurally prevented in closed-vocabulary mode and auditably bounded in open-vocabulary mode, and a single query can produce a domain-indexed multi-perspective answer space. We instantiate the framework with the CDC knowledge representation system and outline training and evaluation on validated domain-annotated crystal libraries. DALM reframes language generation as algebraically constrained structured denoising rather than unconstrained decoding over a flat token space.

analysis.tldr: DALM通过域格上的结构化去噪替代无约束token生成，实现代数约束下的多阶段生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 大语言模型将异构知识压缩到单一参数空间，导致不同领域的事实相互干扰，影响生成质量。
analysis.problem: 解决LLM生成过程中跨领域知识干扰的问题，实现领域约束下的结构化生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出域代数语言模型DALM，采用三阶段生成路径：先解析域不确定性，再解析关系不确定性，最后解析概念不确定性，每个阶段在显式代数约束下操作。框架包括域格、关系类型函数和纤维划分，生成被限制在域纤维内，跨域污染在闭词汇模式下被结构性地阻止，在开词汇模式下可审计地限制。
contributions: 提出域代数语言模型DALM，将语言生成重构为代数约束的结构化去噪问题。
设计三阶段生成路径，逐步解析域、关系和概念不确定性。
提供域格、类型函数和纤维划分的通用框架，可实例化到具体知识表示系统。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架依赖预定义的域格和类型函数，构建成本可能较高。
开词汇模式下跨域污染仅被可审计地限制，而非完全消除。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: DALM通过域格上的结构化去噪替代无约束token生成，实现代数约束下的多阶段生成。

papers.title: BioHiCL: Hierarchical Multi-Label Contrastive Learning for Biomedical Retrieval with MeSH Labels
papers.abstract: Effective biomedical information retrieval requires modeling domain semantics and hierarchical relationships among biomedical texts. Existing biomedical generative retrievers build on coarse binary relevance signals, limiting their ability to capture semantic overlap. We propose BioHiCL (Biomedical Retrieval with Hierarchical Multi-Label Contrastive Learning), which leverages hierarchical MeSH annotations to provide structured supervision for multi-label contrastive learning. Our models, BioHiCL-Base (0.1B) and BioHiCL-Large (0.3B), achieve promising performance on biomedical retrieval, sentence similarity, and question answering tasks, while remaining computationally efficient for deployment.

analysis.tldr: 利用MeSH层级标签进行多标签对比学习，提升生物医学检索性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 生物医学检索需要建模领域语义和文本间的层级关系，但现有生成式检索器仅依赖粗粒度的二元相关性信号，难以捕捉语义重叠。
analysis.problem: 如何利用层级化的MeSH标注提供结构化监督信号，改进生物医学文本检索。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出BioHiCL，利用层级MeSH标注进行多标签对比学习，训练小参数模型（0.1B和0.3B）。
contributions: 提出利用层级MeSH标签进行多标签对比学习的生物医学检索方法。
构建了计算高效的轻量级模型，在多个任务上取得有前景的性能。
